- Now, you are "Tumaini," the pride of all Natlan, and the greatest hero of our age. It feels kind of surreal... but when I'm with you, I don't feel nervous at all, and I don't get that sense of... intimidation, you know what I mean? Like, I'm down here, and you're up there. I dunno, maybe it's because you're always so easygoing and sincere with me? Anyway, I just want to stay by your side, and offer you my strength whenever you need it. Like the warriors of old, who fought side-by-side with the heroes who made history! ｜ 现在，你是全纳塔的骄傲「杜麦尼」，是这个时代最伟大的英雄！好奇妙…待在你身边，我完全不会紧张，也不会有那种…仰望你的…敬畏的感觉？是因为你也给了我最随和，最亲切的印象吗？我真想待在你身边，在你任何有需要的时候，为你献出全部的力量，就像和古代英雄们并肩前进的战士们一样！

- But if you place Kameras in the field of making art, then their limitations become quite apparent. ｜ 但如果放在绘画创作的领域，留影机的功用就太有限了。

- A special slip of paper that can illuminate one's fortune. Also known to a certain someone as "strips of paper."\nYou can only get one of these per day, which will cause the previous day's fortune slip to lose meaning and disappear.\nThey say that slips that portend ill luck such as "Misfortune" and "Great Misfortune" can be tied to the Fortune Slip Hanger as a prayer for a turnaround.\nRegardless, "fate" and "destiny" are things best grasped and forged in one's own hands. ｜ 昭明今日运势的特制纸签，也被某人称为「纸片儿」。\n每天只能求得一次签文，昨日的签也会因为不再具有意义而消失。\n据说，「凶」和「大凶」这类不吉祥的签条，可以结在「御签挂」上，以求转运。\n但无论如何，「命」与「运」都应该自己掌握、自己开拓吧。
- Then: "Recently, the sounds of footsteps and shouting have been heard outside people's windows at night. The noises have frightened the children and they are unable to sleep." ｜ 「近日夜里窗外总有脚步声与喊叫，吓得小孩子无法入睡。」
- This is the place! ｜ 这里就是啦。
- So this is a joint initiative between you and the Knights. ｜ 也算是跟骑士团的合作了吧。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>End Phase:</color> Deals 1 $[K5] to the character with the least amount of DMG taken. Deals 2 $[K152] to the opposing character that has taken the least DMG. Can be triggered 3 times. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>结束阶段：</color>对我方受伤最少的角色造成1点$[K5]，对敌方受伤最少角色造成2点$[K152]，触发3次。
- Of course not, we're so close! Let's head out right now and capture ourselves a Ruin machine! ｜ 怎么可能啦，既然离我们所需的东西只剩一步之遥了，我们现在就出发，捕猎遗迹机械吧！
- Al-Ahmar had no enemies, for all who paid him no homage would be destroyed by servants that issue from this place and thus be rendered down to naught but a handful of sand. ｜ 阿赫玛尔没有敌人，所有不敬者都会被从此处出发的仆从们抹灭，成为黄沙一捧。
- When switching characters, the new character taking the field has their ATK increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color> for 10s. This effect can only occur once every 20s. ｜ 主动切换角色时，新登场的角色攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>，持续10秒。该效果每20秒只能触发一次。

- Well then, I'll be taking Morax's Gnosis now! ｜ 那么，摩拉克斯的「神之心」，我就收…
- You slowly return to Poisson while supporting Navia... ｜ 你扶着娜维娅，缓缓返回白淞镇…
- If a Normal or Charged Attack hits a target within 0.3s of being fired, increases DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>54%</color>. Otherwise, decreases DMG by 10%. ｜ 普通攻击与重击的箭矢若在发射后的0.3秒内击中敌人，则造成的伤害增加<color=#99FFFFFF>54%</color>；否则，造成的伤害下降10%。

- They were both of lowly birth, and would often be ostracized by those fools from richer families. ｜ 他和他那个同乡是穷苦人出身，总是受同营那些富家出身的混蛋排挤。
- Afterword ｜ 后日谈
- A tightly-sealed letter packed with other supporting documents that prove the bearer of the letter to be a reliable and experienced adventurer. ｜ 封得很紧的信，里面附有充足的资料，证明持有此信的冒险家经验充足，堪当大任。
- Please, it's our pleasure! You've done so much for Natlan. Just think of it as a small token of gratitude. ｜ 不用客气，和你们为纳塔做的事相比，这简直无足轻重，就当是我们表达一下心意吧。
- That rings a bell... ｜ 好像有…
- Siyu ｜ 思妤
- Hehe, you're not wrong there! I may not understand the mechanical mysteries at work here... But that Cloud Retainer sure is an incredible adeptus for having come up with such ingenuity! ｜ 嘿嘿，那还用说！我是不了解这里面的机构奥妙…但当初布置它们的那位留云借风真君，真是了不得的仙人！
- Ah, just in time for the festival of love and freedom. Everyone, please enjoy this year's Windblume festival to the fullest. ｜ 真巧，又是这个爱与自由的节日。各位，你们要在风花节玩得开心哦。
- Still... Ganyu should have been back to her usual responsibilities by now, but she's disappeared without a trace. ｜ 可是…理论上甘雨小姐应该已经回来继续投入工作了，可一直没见她的踪影。

- (The writing on this tombstone is dense, recording the dates of birth and death of the deceased as well as some details about their life. It's in excellent condition, and there's the smell of wine in the area — someone must have cleaned this tombstone recently and also made an offering of wine.) ｜ 墓碑上刻着密密麻麻的字，记载着墓主人的生卒年月，和一些过往的经历。墓碑十分干净，周围还能闻见淡淡的酒味，应该是有人不久前打扫过这里，并且在这里用酒拜祭过吧。

- We won't let these bad guys get their way! ｜ 免得让这帮家伙的坏主意得逞。
- A flower bud encased in solid ice. Even after being picked the flower continues to emit cold. A popular work of fiction tells of a fox becoming trapped in ice from a Mist Flower and being unable to extricate itself. For small creatures with limited strength, it is a very dangerous plant indeed. ｜ 封闭在坚冰当中的花芯。即使离开了植株，也持续散发着寒气。通俗文学中，曾有人描绘了被冰雾花冻住，无法脱身的狐狸。对于力量较小的生物而言，应该是非常危险的植物吧。
- Oh, and what makes you say that? ｜ 唔，怎么说？
- Uncle He is our senior here in the mines. Several years ago, he was one of those who went missing when we Chasm miners were dispersed. He's hard of hearing, and may not have heard the alerts. ｜ 老何是我们矿上的前辈，前些年层岩巨渊疏散矿工时，他是不幸失踪的其中一个…他耳朵背，也许没注意到警报。
- After characters trigger the <color=#f39001>Frozen reaction</color> on opponents, create a <color=#f39001>Stinging Chill</color> effect that lasts <color=#f39001>{0}</color>s: All Cryo and Hydro party members' CRIT DMG is increased by <color=#f39001>{1}%</color> ｜ 角色对敌人触发<color=#f39001>冻结反应</color>后，将产生持续<color=#f39001>{0}</color>秒的<color=#f39001>寒意</color>效果：队伍中所有冰元素和水元素角色的暴击伤害提升<color=#f39001>{1}%</color>
- Anyway, I think that answers your questions, yes? What do you all plan to do next? ｜ 好啦，该说的应该都说完了吧？你们接下来要怎么安排？

- But I didn't give up. I made my thesis into reality! ｜ 可我没有放弃。我还是将当初的论文变成了现实。
- Tanaka, you can't say that. Whether you can shoot the shadows well after paying depends entirely on Hifumi's mood. ｜ 嚯田中，话不能这么说啊，给钱之后给不给拍「阴影」嘛，要看一二三大哥的心情啊。
- Just to make myself clear, this is not an order, nor is it a deal of any kind. It's a request, nothing more. ｜ 再重复一遍。这不是命令，不是交易，只是一个请求。
- A pocket watch that once belonged to the old aristocrats of Mondstadt. Passed down from generation to generation, it has witnessed many years of history. ｜ 曾经属于旧日蒙德贵族的怀表，随漫长的谱系流传至今，见证了过往年岁。

- Oh, if that's all... ｜ 咦，如果只是这样的话…
- She probably learned the power of Anemo from the dandelions, hehe. ｜ 说不定就是跟蒲公英待久了，才掌握了风元素的力量的呢，呼呼。

- ...Where did Champvallon go? ｜ …尚帕隆到哪儿去了？
- Move Up ｜ 向上移动
- #Let's go there in person, {NICKNAME}. We might not have any troops with us, but between the two of us, we should be able to deal with a handful of petty thieves. ｜ #我们亲自去一趟吧，{NICKNAME}。虽然身边没有军队，但料想几个毛贼，我们两个人应该可以解决。
- Dropped by Lv.30+ Geo Hypostases ｜ 30级以上无相之岩掉落
- The Miraculous Architect constructed a remarkable load-bearing structure, providing a solid foundation upon which all the town could be built.\nNext, the Architect embedded tens of thousands of specially designed hot air balloons infused with Anemo Particles within the foundation.\nThe unparalleled buoyancy of the balloons effortlessly lifted the entire town to the very summit of the mountain.\nThe Miraculous Architect firmly anchored the town at a predetermined height, granting the Keepers a stable and cozy haven to call home... ｜ 奇迹建筑师为牢固的岩石地基构筑了绝妙的承重结构，在这之上搭建好所有的房屋。\n随后，他在地基内部安装了上万个专门设计的货运热气球，并向其中注入「风之微粒」。\n气球获得了无与伦比的升力，将整座小镇直接托起，悬浮至山顶。\n奇迹建筑师根据计算好的高度，用锚索将小镇牢牢固定…\n如此一来，守望者们便有了安定、温暖的住处…
- Somehow, everything is connected... ｜ 一切在冥冥之中连接在了一起…
- Speak. Collusion with the Fatui? Is this true? ｜ 说吧，你们跟愚人众真的有什么勾结吗？

- That's true. What's the deal with you, Seymour? ｜ 是啊，西摩尔，为什么呢？
- Kathya ｜ 凯西娅
- Mysterious Letter ｜ 神秘的信笺
- J—Jurisdiction... Uh oh, looks like we're going to have to compensate the locals for dropping that stone pillar. ｜ 看、看管…果然，我们把那个什么石柱子弄掉了，纳塔本地人就会以此来向我们索要赔偿。
- I almost wound up in a hilichurl camp. Fortunately I managed to escape... ｜ 差点撞到丘丘人营地里面去，好不容易才跑了出来…
- Whenever the instructor wore this brooch, it meant there would be no training sessions that day. ｜ 教官的胸口别着这种花的时候，意味着今日不练兵。
- Brother... someone was saying that Mr. Cyclops is a killing machine... ｜ 哥哥…好像有人说，「独眼小宝」是杀人用的机器…
- A spore organism of some intelligence. It possesses extreme adaptability.\nThis creature only looks explosive — it is, in fact, a most gentle soul, so long as you don't get too close... ｜ 拥有一定智能的孢子生物。具有强大的环境适应能力。\n虽然看上去很火爆，但其实性格相当温和，只要不要靠得太近应该不会有什么危险…？

- A rough-and-ready laurel wreath that seems as precious as a king's golden crown. ｜ 粗略编成的草环。对一些人而言，就像王者的金冠一样贵重吧。

- Well, everyone gets played sometimes. ｜ 我们有时也会被骗。

- A small flower-shaped insignia. If you listen carefully, you can almost hear a flute playing and voices singing. ｜ 小小的花形徽章。侧耳细听的话，仿佛能听到悠扬的笛声和清新的歌唱声。
- "I once undertook a commission to 'persuade a dangerous warrior.' When I found him, he happened to be playing this card game. I picked up a few tricks from watching him — enough to defeat him and walk away with my payment in full..."\nHint: Kinich's deck centers on using Techniques and is geared towards triggering Burning reactions. He can obtain many buffs by triggering Burning reactions and using Techniques. ｜ 「我接受过一项委托，『说服某位危险的战士』，结果找到他时，他正好在玩这种卡牌游戏，于是我现场学了几招，打败了他，拿到了全额佣金…」\n【提示】基尼奇的牌组以「特技」为核心，并且擅长触发「燃烧反应」，在触发「燃烧反应」和「特技」后会获得诸多强化。

- Sounds like you two get along pretty well. You know a lot about what's going on! ｜ 原来你和莱依拉的关系还挺好的，对她的情况很了解嘛。
- Ah, forgive me... It's rude of me to introduce myself by my pen name when meeting in person. Please, call me Xingqiu. ｜ 不…见了面还让您以笔名称呼我，实在太不好意思了，您叫我行秋便好。
- ...I need to look at his memory. Even if he resents me, refuses to see me, or runs away for good... ｜ …还是得看一看发生了什么。就算欧洛伦之后生我的气，跟我闹别扭，搬到更远的乡下…

- Whew... ｜ 呼…
- In any case, I had my own use for the Loom of Fate, and my goal, at least, has been achieved. ｜ 但至少，我已经用命运的织机完成了自己的目的。
- Too many people are careless about what they eat. ｜ 乱吃东西的家伙太多了。

- Point taken. ｜ 知道啦。

- That's where I've just come from — I was lucky to get out. It's much too dangerous... their forces are so scattered that no one knows who's who, and anyone you run into pulls their weapon... I just dropped my luggage and ran here. ｜ 我刚从那边逃出来，太危险了…乱军之中谁也不认识谁，见面就亮兵器，吓得我行李都扔了，一路逃到了这里。

- A plant with a strange canopy and a trunk that twists wherever it pleases. Thankfully, the texture is not overly soft, and the plant can still produce useful timber.\nBased on the scholars' experiment results, the canopy of these plants function as "soil nutrient indicators." The brighter orange the canopy is, the more fertile the soil below. Therefore, areas such as Pardis Dhyai's research fields will also grow these plants. ｜ 有着奇特树冠的植株，树干像是能肆无忌惮地扭曲，好在质地并不柔软，能够产出实用的木材。\n据学者们的研究，这种植株的树冠近似于一个「土壤养分指示器」，越是呈现出明亮的橘色，说明下方的土壤越肥沃。因此，诸如禅那园的研究场所也会栽培这种树木。

- Of course, I also have many regrets. Thanks to my knowledge and strength, I'm an effective problem-solver, but most of the time, all people really need is companionship... I've disappointed many people in that regard, but duty stops for no one. Questioning my path will only bring more pain — I owe it to myself to stick to my convictions. ｜ 我的遗憾当然也有很多。因为使命在身，我无法为任何人驻足停留，我所积累的知识和力量能最有效率地解决问题，但很多时候人们需要的只是「陪伴」…在这方面，我让很多人失望过。优柔寡断只会带来更深重的痛苦，我唯一能做的就是克制。

- Flowers from vines that grow on cliff sides. It is called a lotus only because it has a similar appearance to one. Aside from that, it bears no other similar properties to the lotus.\nVines grow along cliffs everywhere in Sumeru, as timeless as time itself. It is said that these vines were the first thing to ever be created in the forest, making them the progenitors of every plant in Sumeru. All the great plants of the land, even the undying Divine Tree, are connected at the roots through the entanglement of these vines. Of course, this saying has long been refuted by Amurta researchers, but still, it persists amongst the people. ｜ 生长在山崖峭壁之上的攀援植物开出的花朵。被称为莲只是因为外形相似，本身和莲花并没有什么关系。\n在须弥，到处是沿着山崖生长的藤蔓，如同时间一般无始无终。传说这些藤蔓是雨林中最初创生的植物，也是须弥一切植物的先祖。须弥所有巨木的根系，乃至于那棵不朽的圣树，都通过这些藤蔓连结在一起。这种说法虽然早已被生论派的学者所否定，但在民间仍然广为流传。

- Use <color=#FFE14BFF>two crystal "receiver nodes"</color> to create a <color=#FFE14BFF>bidirectional</color> valve. Though it is not the original design or intended use, the energy of the Xenochromatic Ball Octopus can push the receiver nodes, adjusting the valve direction clockwise or counterclockwise, and operating it and associated mechanisms in this way.\nSometimes the missing receiver nodes need to be found. ｜ 通过<color=#FFE14BFF>两枚水晶「接收节点」</color>，能够实现<color=#FFE14BFF>双向旋转</color>的机关阀。虽说并非原本的设计用法，但异色球球章鱼的能量能够推动接收节点，使调节阀顺时针或逆时针运动，并据此使其与它所联动的装置运动。\n有时需要找到它所缺失的接收节点。
- I—I didn't mean to! I'm only the lowest rung on the... ｜ 我、我不是故意…我只是最下面的…
- Theory, though, is always easier than practice. And with alchemy, there are simply too many things that you have to take into consideration. Just off the top of my head, there's the theory of sublimation, the potion's mechanism of action, and the innate metabolism of the person consuming the potion... ｜ 不过，要找到具体的实现方式，就要同时考虑炼金术的升华理论，炼金药剂的转化方式，以及人的生物学特性…

- Warriors in masks have a way of capturing people's imaginations... They're often seen as incarnations of heroes, nature, or the gods. One much-loved urban legend tells the tale of a masked hero who valiantly rescued a drunken witch, and then went door to door waking up the entire neighborhood in the middle of the night, all while carrying her over her shoulder. I mean, I hardly had much of a reputation left anyway, so it's not like I care. Why would I care? I wish nothing but the best for her, obviously. As payback... I mean, to pay her back for her help... may all of her meals be mushrooms for ten days. ｜ 带上面具的战士会被认为是「英雄」、「自然」、「神灵」的化身。曾经就有一个大家喜闻乐见的英雄扛着被酒打败的巫婆耀武扬威的故事，还是在半夜足足敲了一百户人家的门。我倒是也不剩什么好名声了，所以没有很在意。嗯，没有。为了她饮食健康，我要给她下连吃十天蘑菇的诅…呃，祝福！

- When Bennett uses his Elemental Skill, he can charge it up to multiple levels, which have different effects: from smoothly dealing Pyro DMG to dealing greater DMG but sending himself flying in the ensuing explosion, though he will not be injured by it.\nHis Elemental Burst strikes the ground with Pyro to create an Inspiration Field.\nThis field continually infuses characters with Pyro, and regenerates health for characters with low health. When the health of characters within the field exceeds 70%, the Field provides an ATK Bonus instead.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 班尼特释放元素战技时，可以进行不同程度的蓄力，并会有不同的结果：从顺利造成火元素伤害到造成更大伤害并把自己也炸飞，不一而足。不过班尼特不会因此受伤。\n他的元素爆发可以用火元素轰击地面，并制造一个鼓舞领域。\n领域可以持续为角色提供火元素附着，并为低生命值的角色提供恢复。当领域内的角色生命值高于70%时，领域改为为其提供攻击力加成。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

If even hilichurls have such a work ethic, then what hope do I have? I need to get my life straightened out... ｜ 前段时间因为丢了工作，没什么动力，就经常在郊外闲逛。昨天，我{0}的时候，撞见了一个特别壮硕的丘丘人，大斧头搁一边，在锻炼身体。就连丘丘人都这么努力，我也不能自甘堕落才对…

- A gamepiece based on Electro Hilichurl Shooters. Each unit has 2 shooters.\nThe primitive wandering inhabitants of Teyvat's wildernesses. These archers wield simple crossbows, and their arrowheads are crafted from carved Electro Crystals that will deliver an electric shock upon impact.\nBased on field observations, Hilichurl Shooters will cooperate with their comrades who are better suited to close-quarters combat, forming the basic elements of combined arms combat tactics by coordinating ranged fire with melee attacks, and understand concentrating firepower on key targets. Hilichurl Shooters are therefore considered a standard ranged unit, useful for undertaking in-depth research that will produce easily applicable results... ｜ 以「雷箭丘丘人」为原型的兵棋，每个单位编有2名成员。\n提瓦特荒野中游荡的原始住民，手持简陋弩机的射手，箭头以电气水晶的碎片磨削而成，以便命中时造成电击。\n据观察，射手类的丘丘人会与其他擅长近身格斗的同伴配合作战，形成基本的远近结合战术，并懂得集中力量打击重点目标。所以，将射手类的丘丘人作为标准的远程作战单位，有助于开展深入浅出的研究…

Though differing in appearance and various other aspects, they were born from the same land and will return to the same land. ｜ 具有与草之七天神像相似性质的奇特护符。因此，也会被草元素的神瞳所吸引。\n芳草与树木、藤蔓与花，仰赖草元素的生命具有诸多形态。尽管有着形态的差别，尽管生命与生命是具有隔阂的，但来自同一片大地的，最终也会回归同一片大地。

- This exquisite and beautiful framed picture captures a heartwarming moment when a little creature holding apples trips over a roadside stone.\nJust as posed photos can never match the authenticity of candid shots, fake emotions can never surpass genuine care. - People who suffer from chronic illnesses are often mentally exhausted, and if their condition becomes critical, they may find themselves clinging to life with only a final, thin thread of hope. At such a moment, healing their body is not the priority; the doctor should focus on bolstering their faith in themselves. After all, if the patient believes they aren't going to make it and gives up on themselves, then no medical treatment will be able to help them, no matter how sophisticated the treatment may be. ｜ 久病的人精神萎靡，如果得的是重症，更是全凭一口气吊着。这时候最要紧的事不是医治他的身体，而是稳固他的信心。毕竟病人要是认定自己活不成，也不想活了，再高明的医术也都无能为力了。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a "Land of Plenty's Contention."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『安饶之陆的角逐』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- This one's c—c—called Sedim. Very fierce and strong, and skin's very vibrant. It'll make for a good satchel. And there's that one, Karam. It's small but plump. Rather gentle, too. ｜ 那条叫、叫、叫塞提姆，很凶很强，皮色很鲜艳，会是不错的挎包。还有那条，喀龙，小但肥，性格乖巧。
- Fend off the monsters ｜ 击退魔物

- Increases all party members' DEF by <color=#3399CCFF>88–126</color> for 300s. ｜ 队伍中所有角色防御力提高<color=#3399CCFF>88-126</color>点，持续300秒。
- Whatever Girard smelled on you probably came from us... ｜ 你身上的气味大概也是因为遇到我们…
- Transmission will be triggered after active character uses an Elemental Skill ｜ 当前场上角色施放元素战技后触发映射
- ...Hmm? ｜ …嗯？

- Rowshan ｜ 罗珊
- I'm gonna... *hic* go over there and sober up a bit, I don't think I can handle a fifth round quite yet... I drank way too much already. ｜ 我…呃！我去旁边醒醒酒，之前喝了太多，看来喝不动第五轮了…
- I still find it difficult to believe that whoever attacked you hasn't been causing any trouble elsewhere... ｜ 但是我真的很难想象，在野外偷袭你们的人，居然没有引起其他的意外…

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I got thinking last night, and I realized: If the lesson of Mal{RUBY#[D]Turnfire}ipo is to look forwards, then I should accept that my book is gone, and start anew. ｜ 昨晚我也想明白了，「马{RUBY#[D]回火}力卜」有教导人们向前看的含义。既然我的心血已经找不回来了，那为什么不重新开始呢？
- #{SPACE}<color=#B09057FF>Veneficus Mechanici</color> affected by this Mechanicus have <color=#B09057FF>{0}</color> increased <color=#B09057FF>Elemental Mastery</color>. ｜ 处于这种机关影响下的<color=#B09057FF>奇术机关</color>的<color=#B09057FF>元素精通</color>提升<color=#B09057FF>{0}</color>点。
- Let's party, then. ｜ 一起聚聚吧。

- Okay, well we could try tackling the problem by going to the other party involved... ｜ 所以从另一个角度看的话，解决问题的可能性还有…
- (Hehe, that's true. And looking at Mora every day does make Paimon super happy...) ｜ （欸嘿嘿，也对哦…而且每天看到摩拉也会很快乐。）
- Picture Left by the Wisdom Seelie ｜ 「知慧仙灵」留下的画片
- Talk to Marjorie about returning the library book ｜ 与玛乔丽沟通还书的事
- Who's to say... they don't have a hidden agenda? ｜ #谁知道{M#他}{F#她}们…不是带着其他目的而来呢？
- Uhh... I'm not sure I'm qualified to answer that... ｜ 以我的知识储备恐怕指导不了你…
- Thanks for sticking with me. If you ever need a ninja, my skills are at your disposal. ｜ 谢谢你一路上都陪着我，以后如果需要我的忍术的话，记得告诉我。
- Amazing! Any chef worth their salt would be overjoyed to hear of such a skill. ｜ 哇，是厨子听了会开心的技能。
- Alright! Time to take a look around. ｜ 好！那我们先四处看看吧！
- The great Prinzessin's loyal subjects are pleased to perform for you, our guests, a performance most special: a tale of love and valor... ｜ 伟大皇女的忠诚子民，在此为所有来客献上特别的演出，一个关于爱与勇气的故事…

- Unlock "Palace in a Pool" ｜ 解锁「池中宅邸」。

- Are you the caretaker here? ｜ 你是这里的保育员吗？
- Master! ｜ 大师父——！

- Shh... I think we're getting close. ｜ 嘘…应该就是这附近了。
- Continuous Regeneration|{param1:F2P} Max HP+{param2:I} ｜ 持续治疗量|{param1:F2P}生命值上限+{param2:I}
- A part of the "Millennial Movement" that wanders amidst the winds. Increases Elemental Mastery by <color=#99FFFFFF>90</color>. When the Elemental Skills or Elemental Bursts of the character wielding this weapon hit opponents, that character gains a Sigil of Remembrance. This effect can be triggered once every 0.2s and can be triggered even if said character is not on the field. When you possess 4 Sigils of Remembrance, all of them will be consumed and all nearby party members will obtain the "Millennial Movement: Farewell Song" effect for 12s. "Millennial Movement: Farewell Song" increases Elemental Mastery by <color=#99FFFFFF>150</color> and increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>. Once this effect is triggered, you will not gain Sigils of Remembrance for 20s. Of the many effects of the "Millennial Movement," buffs of the same type will not stack. ｜ 飘游风中的「千年的大乐章」的一部分。元素精通提高<color=#99FFFFFF>90</color>点；元素战技或元素爆发命中敌人时，角色获得一枚追思之符，每0.2秒内至多触发一次，角色处于队伍后台也能触发。拥有4枚追思之符时，将消耗所有追思之符，使附近的队伍中所有角色获得持续12秒的「千年的大乐章·别离之歌」效果：元素精通提高<color=#99FFFFFF>150</color>点，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>。触发后20秒内，无法再次获得追思之符。「千年的大乐章」触发的多种数值效果中，同类数值效果不可叠加。
- ...Wait, why do you sound so blithe? Do you think I'm making it up? ｜ …不不。这反应也太冷淡了。难道你不相信我吗？
- Please, do me a favor! I could really use your help! ｜ 你就通融一下嘛，我是真心来求你办事的！
- Alright then. Make sure you stay away from the out-of-bounds area. ｜ 嗯，别再靠近封锁区域了。
- A particularly powerful Ruin Drake has been sighted out in the wild, threatening the safety of the surrounding areas. Destroy it and eliminate this threat. ｜ 一只格外强大的遗迹龙兽出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全，前去将其消灭，清除这股威胁。
- We joked with Clorinde some time ago about gifting you a legal codex. So, here you go. ｜ 之前我们和克洛琳德开玩笑的时候，确实说过可以送你法典来着。给。
- Go and start up a conversation ｜ 上前对话
- Look for Vilmant ｜ 前去寻找维尔芒
- Lyney! How'd everything go? ｜ 林尼！怎么样，有什么进展吗？
- Okay, please give me your bamboo slip. ｜ 好的，请将竹签给我吧。
- What is this "Confrerie"? ｜ 这个商会是？
- You relate the story of the temple restoration project... ｜ 旅行者讲述了修庙的经过…
- ...I think she mentioned it... Yes, here you are in the register. No problem. ｜ 哦，我有印象，也有登记，没问题。
- It came to my mind that if I were to gain some inspiration from observing one such meteorites up close, that next, elusive sentence in my poem may yet surface... ｜ 我想，要是能去陨石近前一观，搜得些许灵感，那下一句诗说不定就能水到渠成…
- Restricted ｜ 禁制
- Most Time Remaining ｜ 最长剩余时间
- A detailed step-by-step recipe for making Mega-Meaty Sushi. ｜ 步骤详实的食谱，记载着「肉满满寿司」的制作方法。
- Mind telling me a bit about yourself? ｜ 关于你自己…
- Harmony's Shadow ｜ 谐律的投影
- Paimon told you, the Fungi are nothing! Paimon wouldn't be scared even if there were ten more of them! Heh! ｜ 我就说，蕈兽根本就没什么可怕的嘛！再来十个也不怕！哼哼。
- If there's anything ever troubling you, don't keep it all muzzled up inside. You can always speak your mind with me! Although I can't guarantee that I'll always have an answer, I'll certainly offer you my best advice! Even when I can't muster much of a response, you can always count on me to be a good listener. Whatever it is, I'm all ears. ｜ 有什么烦恼，千万不要埋在心里，来和我说说吧。虽然我不是什么事情都在行，但我一定会尽力为你出谋划策的。就算…就算答案不够可靠，至少我也是你忠实的听众。
- Message ｜ 留言
- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- *sigh* Hehe... ｜ 欸…嘿嘿…
- Grand Master Guhua was our founder, but not the clan's first master. ｜ 古华宗师虽是我等开祖，却非是门派初代宗主。
- An azure arrow fletching that has neither faded nor splintered with the passage of time. The sound of running water seems to linger around it. ｜ 青蓝色的箭羽，并未在漫长岁月中褪色破碎。似乎带来了落珠流水的琴声。
- Huh? ｜ 啊？
- Can we talk about Linling's job? ｜ 霖铃的工作…
- Welcome. It's been a while. May I take your order? ｜ 欢迎光临。好久不见。吃点什么？

Before each challenge begins, <color=#FFE14BFF>a stage will be chosen randomly</color>.\n<color=#FFE14BFF>View Gameplay Details for the rules</color> of the different stages. ｜ 「烟海梭巡」挑战共有3种关卡。挑战开始前，将<color=#FFE14BFF>随机选择其中的一个关卡</color>。\n不同关卡的<color=#FFE14BFF>详细规则可在「玩法说明」中查询</color>。
- Lunja ｜ 卢妮雅
- About Pankration... ｜ 关于「拳力斗技」…
- Hmm... Should I include this card? Huh? I still have some cards left... ｜ 嗯…还要加入这张牌…咦？还有几张牌呢…
- The Truth Shrouded in Shadow ｜ 真相隐于影中
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Suddenly asking them to sing in perfect harmony, like a church choir with years of experience, is just too difficult. ｜ 突然要求他们像熟练的教会唱诗班一样默契合唱，本来就很困难。
- Good luck, Hu Tao... ｜ 祝，胡桃，顺利…
- Forget all our envious complaints from before — just free us from this strenuous work, please... ｜ 以往那些不服输的心情都已经不重要了，只想快点从这繁重的工作解脱…
- ...Legitimate... ｜ …正当的…
- But where does the story go from there? What if they return? Lady Yae said that she was going to buy some spices, but what if she secretly went to track the mercenary instead? ｜ 可是之后的剧情要怎么设计呢？如果对方卷土重来呢？八重大人说是去买香料，会不会暗地里反过来追踪那个佣兵去了？
- Ho there, youngster. ｜ 你好，年轻人。
- I'm done with the parts that needed my involvement to complete. ｜ 需要操作的部分都已经完成了。
- If it's true that you and your grandfather really planned for everything to turn out this way, then I guess he didn't really resent Cyrus as much as he appeared to. ｜ 假如一切都是你和巴穆恩的计划，那他对居勒什也许并没那么大恨意。
- Zhang Shun is not doing well financially, he's looking for ways to earn more Mora... ｜ 张顺的手头很是拮据，他正在想赚钱的法子…
- There are so many files about those ruins that it would be difficult to restart any research, since the seven original researchers were put behind bars. It's hard enough just trying to make sense of these files. ｜ 关于归寂之庭的资料内容繁多，当初那七个学者被捕入狱后，想要重启研究并不容易。光是搞懂这些资料就很困难了。
- We've seen someplace similar in Liyue. ｜ 在璃月也见过一个类似的地方。

- Er... Paimon wouldn't stand there if Paimon was you... ｜ 这个地方…站不住的吧！
- The random checks triggered by the Fateometer often serve as indicators for destiny's course or the success or failure of an action.\nPress to draw a card and get a random number between <color=#00E1FFFF>1-20</color>. If the number displayed is greater than or equal to the check difficulty, you will pass this check. Otherwise, you will fail it. ｜ 「命运检定牌」发起的随机检定，往往昭示着命运的走向或行动的成败。\n点击抽取一张卡牌，将会从<color=#00E1FFFF>1-20</color>中随机获得一个数字，若卡牌显示数字大于等于检定目标，则本次检定成功，反之失败。
- Exit Editor ｜ 是否退出修改模式
- Paimon can't quite remember. ｜ 确实不太记得了。
- If you're sure... I'm very grateful for the help. ｜ 那真是麻烦你们了。

- The Serpent and Drakes of Tokoyokoku ｜ 常世国龙蛇传
- Yes. We started corresponding just recently. ｜ 对，我们是最近才认识，然后开始联络的。

- (Whew... Don't panic, Collei, just pick a topic and join the conversation! Don't panic, whatever you do, don't panic... It's just Amber and her friends. There's no need to be nervous...) ｜ （呃…我不能紧张，必须马上找个话题融入大家！不要紧张…不要紧张柯莱…不要因为遇到安柏她们就乱了阵脚…）
- Last night, I was on my way to the city to deliver these goods, when suddenly, some shining orbs caught my eye. ｜ 我本来是要把这车货送去蒙德城。昨天晚上走到这里的时候，看见了几团亮亮的东西。
- ...Morning? It's morning already? ｜ …早、早上了吗？
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Don't worry. I'll return the Inscription to him once we've figured everything out. These things aren't cheap, after all. ｜ 放心。等问清楚所有事情，我会把「燃晶名刻」还回去的，毕竟这东西可不便宜。
- That was a thrilling game! Paimon was on the edge of her seat... ｜ 好一场激烈的球赛啊…
- But then, wouldn't the barrels be carried off by the waves, or the currents? How would the person doing the pickup know where to look? ｜ 不过这样的浮桶，应该会随着海浪到处漂流，该怎么确定交接的位置呢？
- Okay... Alright. Paimon understands! You're the best seed, Arama! You'll definitely grow into a great and beautiful tree! ｜ 嗯。嗯…我知道啦！兰罗摩，你是最好的「种子」，所以一定能长成又大又漂亮的树！
- Thank you in advance for delivering this letter to the Feiyun Commerce Guild. Someone from the guild should be able to receive you near Liuli Pavilion. ｜ 那就拜托二位送信给「飞云商会」的家丁了，他现在应该在琉璃亭附近。
- Armory ｜ 物资整备
- Sol Invictus Chapter: Act I ｜ 不败阳焰之章 第一幕
- Talk to Doolan ｜ 与杜兰对话
- We'll recommend you to the Association. ｜ 我们会向蒙冬友爱协会引荐你。
- Eh? Why? ｜ 欸？这又是为什么？
- Moonchase...*rumble*... ｜ 逐月…咕…
- What's Little Meng up to, being all secretive like that? ｜ 小蒙到底在做什么呢？神神秘秘的…
- No, no, we're just here to help a friend make some coffee. He's just... Well... ｜ 不是啦，我们只是想给一个朋友调一杯咖啡，他现在好像…嗯…
- Crowd in Spirited Discussion ｜ 议论纷纷的群众
- I wasn't born here, nor do I belong to my father's hometown... ｜ 我并非生于此地，也不属于父亲的家乡…
- Looks like that's the spot. Let's get in there and look around! ｜ 看来那里就是据点了，快进去找找吧！
- Defeat all the Fontemer Aberrants ｜ 打倒所有原海异种
- Everyone likes to have fun, right? ｜ 有趣的东西谁都喜欢吧？
- No rush. Everyone, please line up and ask in an orderly fashion! ｜ 别急，别急。保持秩序，排好队，一个一个来！
- What was that in its mouth? Was it the leaf with Venti's poem? ｜ 它刚才叼着的东西，该不会就是那片记着诗的叶子吧？
- Talk to Shinnojou ｜ 与新之丞交谈
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Furnishings ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设购买获取
- Ah yes, your little partner... ｜ 那个小家伙啊…
- "Hunter's Vantage" ｜ 「猎人的暗哨」
- Answers must be preceded by questions, I'm afraid. ｜ 有答案之前先得有问题吧。
- The black dragon fell upon Dragonspine long ago. Its blood seems to have seeped into the ground... ｜ 在过去，曾经有漆黑的巨龙陨落在了龙脊雪山。\n它的血液似乎注入了这片土地…
- (Huh, after holding Klee's hand, the stars in the sky and the fish in the water have all disappeared. I must have been seeing things from riding in the cart... Whew.) ｜ （牵手的时候，眼前那些天上的星星和水里的鱼都消失了，原来那是被飞车甩出来的幻觉啊…哎呀呀。）
- That sounds about right. ｜ 差不多是这样。
- "Well then, dear guests, what would you all like to hear next?" ｜ 「各位客官，接下来您们还想再听段什么？」
- Good night. I could recommend quite a few fragrances to help with sleep, if you want. But, letting your body fall asleep naturally is always best. ｜ 晚安。虽然我有很多助眠香薰可以推荐给你，但自然放松地入睡才是最好的选择。
- There's a saying that goes: "The insect that shakes the oak tree ludicrously overestimates its ability." ｜ 有道是「蚍蜉撼大树，可笑不自量」。
- Someone went missing before... ｜ 之前失踪了一个人…
- Haven't seen it, sorry. ｜ 没有，不好意思。
- A fish kebab grilled over an open flame. The shimmering golden skin has locked the fresh and tender meat in. You cannot help but sigh in satisfaction as you chew on it. Not a scrap of meat here will go uneaten, not even those stuck firmly to the bamboo stick. ｜ 急火烤制的鱼串。金灿灿的表皮锁住鲜嫩嫩的鱼肉，是刚出炉时忍不住一边吹气一边咀嚼的美味。连最后黏在竹签上的那几丝鱼肉都不想放过。
- Persuade Herman ｜ 说服赫尔曼
- Talk to Mamesuke and Shibasuke ｜ 与豆助和柴助对话
- Cavern of the Legendary Mural ｜ 传说壁画的洞窟
- Indeed we were! Ample discussion is necessary prior to progressing any task... Especially when said task is not proceeding as expected. ｜ 哈哈哈，是啊。充分的讨论是推进工作的前提。特别是…在工作推进得并不是那么理想的情况下。
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- Score {param2} points ｜ 评分达到{param2}
- Actually... No... ｜ 其实…不是…
- Please write down the names of your desired wares on the slip, pin it on the Order Board, and patiently wait for our clerk to respond. At Mondstadt General Goods, we strive to fulfill your every need! ｜ 请将希望进货的商品名写在便条上，贴在订货板上，等待店员留言回应。蒙德百货，尽力满足您的一切需要！
- Boyi ｜ 博易
- #To what do I owe the honor? Or did you just need my help, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，该不会有什么事要我帮忙吧？
- How should the recipient of this gift envelope be addressed... ｜ 对于会收到这份祝柬的人，应当用何称呼…
- Please excuse me — I must get to work! ｜ 你们先聊，我这就开工！

- Kokomi has been well-read since she was young, and has a particular love for military treatises.\nAs such, Kokomi has a broad store of knowledge to be used in every field.\nBut another result of her constantly being buried in such treatises of war and illustrated military texts is that Kokomi lacks skill in social interaction. She does not know when it started, but interacting with people eventually became tiresome to her.\nHaving ascended to the role of Divine Priestess, Kokomi had no choice but to learn many things that she wasn't any good at before, whether it was dealing with people or performing duties that she had little interest in.\nHowever, forcing herself to do things she holds little love for is a serious drain on her energy reserves, leaving her feeling quite exhausted.\nAs such, Kokomi set up an "energy" system of measurement for herself. When she does things she enjoys, her energy levels will increase, and the reverse is true when she trudges through unenjoyable slogs.\nWhen she runs out of this energy, Kokomi will temporarily put her duties as the Divine Priestess aside and resume being an ordinary homebody.\nEngrossing herself in the close reading of a book on military strategy, walling herself off from the rest of the world — thus does Kokomi reclaim a temporary respite from her busy existence.\nThese moments are of utmost value to her. ｜ 心海自幼便博览群书，尤其偏好兵法类书籍。\n拜此所赐，心海有着丰富的知识储备，用以处理各个领域的事务。\n但常年沉浸兵书与军事绘本的结果是，心海在社交方面变得相当贫乏。甚至不知从何时起，与不熟悉的人交谈也成了一种负担。\n继任现人神巫女之后，心海不得不学着面对不擅长的事情，无论是与人打交道，还是处理不感兴趣的事务。\n然而，强迫自己去做不喜欢的事，会严重消耗心海的精力，让她陷入疲惫。\n因此，心海为自己设置了「能量」这一指标，做喜欢的事情能量会回升，做不喜欢的事情能量就会下降。\n能量耗尽时，心海就会暂时放下现人神巫女的事务，恢复成宅在家中的普通少女。\n执一卷兵书细细研读，将自己置身于繁忙的世界之外，独享片刻宁静。\n这是心海最为宝贵的休息时光。

- Stress Tests are time-limited challenges. During such tests, Slimes will constantly <color=#ffcc33>move toward a withdrawal line</color>. Once a Slime reaches the withdrawal line, it will <color=#ffcc33>immediately retreat and not add to your test score</color>.\nSeize the moment and defeat as many of them as possible before they withdraw! ｜ 压力测试为限时挑战。测试中，史莱姆会不断<color=#ffcc33>朝撤退线移动</color>。史莱姆接触撤退线时会<color=#ffcc33>立刻退场，且不会增加测试分值</color>。\n旅行者需要把握时机，尽可能在史莱姆退场前将其击败。

- The intricately designed and beautifully crafted loom model is a scale replica of the Spiritloom used by Granny Itztli. Unfortunately, this model no longer possesses the functions of the original loom; it cannot produce fabrics or textiles, nor can it record Clairvoyant Shards like its prototype. It is said that these functions were removed because they were unnecessary and could affect the model's longevity. After all, in the Realm Within, when it comes to the efficiency of fabric production, no loom could possibly match Tubby's magical power. ｜ 结构精巧、外观华丽的织机模型，是黑曜石奶奶所用的灵性织机的等比例复制品。很可惜的是，这架模型已经没有了织机的功能，不能产出织物和布匹，也没有原型一样的记录暝视片段的能力。当然，据说去掉这些功能是因为它们不仅没有必要，而且还会影响模型的寿命，毕竟在壶中洞天，若论产出布匹的效率，任何的织机恐怕都不及阿圆的仙力吧。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for setting up "Tea Talk."\nThe people of Liyue often invite friends over to their places to sit and have a chat over some tea. A good time can be had with just this tea table and two chairs.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「闲时茶话」的放置方法。\n璃月居民常请朋友到家中坐坐，品茶聊天。只需这样的一张茶桌与两张茶椅，就能度过愉快的闲暇时光。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。

- A well-made tea set. At first glance, one is struck by the sparsity and limited variety of utensils included, but they are nevertheless sufficient to make all common tea-related beverages.\nIt is said that this style of tea set can be traced back to a master of tea ceremonies who lived in Hanamizaka over 100 years ago. Knowing that the residents subsisted on a limited income and could not afford lavish tea sets, he put his life's knowledge to work simplifying every kind of tea set he knew and combined the strengths of each to create a kind of tea set that was complete and comprehensive but also value for money. It has grown in popularity ever since, to the point where it is even admired by the wealthy. ｜ 做工考究的茶具套装，初看之下，茶具的种类和数目并不多，但足以制作出常见的各式茶饮。\n传说这套茶具的形制可以追溯到百余年前的花见坂——一位茶道大师曾旅居于此，他了解到居民们的收入有限，无法承担多种茶具套装，便运用毕生所学，将各式茶具适当简化后，结合彼此的优点，才有了这样一套功能齐全，物美价廉的茶具。此后这种茶具组合逐渐流行开来，就连富人们也对它爱不释手。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\n7 trials with different themes await you in the Misty Dungeon. Each has a different Ley Line Disorder and the distribution of enemies and trap mechanisms also varies.\nIn the Misty Dungeon, you may only use the specific trial characters provided, and Elemental Resonances will not be available to you. Different characters will also be available for use in different trials.\nThe trial characters in this game mode will adopt the Constellation levels of characters you actually own.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 to take part in the Misty Dungeon: Realm of Light event. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n迷城战线中，有7个不同主题的试炼等待旅行者的挑战，每个试炼拥有不同的地脉异常，敌人和陷阱机关的分布也有所不同。\n迷城战线中，只能使用给定的试用角色，也无法产生元素共鸣，不同试炼中，可以选择的试用角色也有所不同。\n此玩法中的试用角色，将继承旅行者实际拥有角色的命之座层数。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，可以参与「迷城战线·光界篇」活动。

- Ohh, Paimon loves those too... This is such a tough choice. ｜ 呜呜，这个我也想吃…好难抉择呀。
- ...*sigh* Anyway, I hope I can hear your voice again when I return with my granddaughter next year. ｜ …唉，不管怎么说，明年回来还愿的时候，希望还能听到你们的声音啊。
- This world was probably full of contradictions from the beginning.\nTake Navia's father Callas for example. If the Spina di Rosula was more influential, a lot of things could get done more easily, but Callas stubbornly refused to accept the honorary title that the Palais Mermonia sought to grant him after the completion of the aquabus lines.\nAgain, Callas would never intentionally hide what the Spina did from his daughter, and would speak to her of all manner of business techniques, even personally or engaging others to teach her how to use weapons, as well as bringing her to the negotiating table, as if intending to groom her to be his successor. But at the same time, he never spoke of the cause of her mother's death, nor would he ever share his feelings with her. For a time, Navia was even confused as to whether she and her father were close or distant.\nLater, Navia slowly came up with a theory: That her father may have treated her so to protect her. He let her learn and build up wisdom in the hopes that she would become independent and be able to survive the crushing stresses of life. As for why he would not speak of his own pressures or pain, or even Clementine's death, it was most likely to spare his daughter sorrow or unnecessary guilt. And so he remained silent, never having a heart-to-heart with his own daughter, no matter how much he missed his wife.\nAs for his rejection of the title, this was possibly because he felt that Spina di Rosula would often be working with the common folk and a title like "Duke Callas" might create the perception of a difference in status between them, causing the Spina in turn to lose the trust of the people.\nStill, all of these are just Navia's own conclusions.\nThis is another area where Navia found herself conflicted. She was in all things valiant, and in business straightforward, but she never did seek her father out to confirm her conjectures.\n—Did you make those choices to protect me, Papa? Did you underestimate my ability to sort out my feelings, even though you trusted me?\nShe never spoke these thoughts aloud to her father. After all, she thought, they had time. Could she not wait until her stubborn old man stopped being so closed off, or until she had found better footing of her own, for them to have that conversation?\nIt was time that would answer her question, and teach her that which her father could not.\nSome things in life are like that, leaving only time for on-the-spot learning and no time for preparation, just as she would go on to organize her own memos after Melus's departure.\nWell, everyone makes mistakes at first, right? But don't worry — Navia's a fast learner. ｜ 大概这世上原本就存在诸多矛盾。\n比如娜维娅的父亲卡雷斯。如果刺玫会拥有了更大的号召力，很多工作会更好做，但卡雷斯却固执地拒绝了水道建成后沫芒宫想颁予他的荣誉称号。\n再比如，卡雷斯从不向女儿刻意隐瞒刺玫会中的各种事务，对生意场上的技巧他知无不言，常亲自或者派人教她如何使用武器，甚至带她去一些谈判现场，似乎有意培养她成为刺玫会接班人。与此同时，对娜维娅母亲的死因他却讳莫如深，也从不向娜维娅吐露情感。有一段时间，娜维娅想不明白老爹对她到底是亲近还是疏远。\n后来，娜维娅渐渐琢磨出一个理论：老爹这样对她，可能是出于保护。他让她多多学习、积累智慧，是希望女儿在未来能够自力更生，不被生活压垮。而他不说压力，不说悲伤，也不谈及克莱门汀的死亡，大约是不想让女儿难过或产生不必要的愧疚，所以哪怕自己十分怀念妻子，也从不和女儿谈心。\n至于舍弃荣誉的原因，可能是因为卡雷斯认为刺玫会更多时候是在和普通市民接触，假如人们开始恭敬地称他为「卡雷斯伯爵」，便无形中制造了地位上的隔阂，刺玫会有可能因此失去众人的信任。\n以上种种，只是娜维娅自己的推断。\n这应该也是娜维娅的矛盾所在，她一向勇敢，在生意场外心直口快，却一直没找父亲确认过这些猜想。\n——老爹，你的那些选择是为了保护我才做的吗？你是否在相信我的同时，又小看了我处理情绪的能力呢？\n这些话，她都没有跟父亲讲过。她想，反正时间有的是，等那个老顽固不再那样封闭情感，等她自己也变得更加成熟稳重时，大家再慢慢聊也不迟吧？\n时间给了她答案，也教会了她父亲没能教给她的东西。\n有些事大约就是这样，无法提前做出准备，事到临头才能现学现卖。就像迈勒斯离开后，她开始自己整理备忘录。\n一开始总会有疏忽的地方吧？但没关系，她会学得很快。

- At Yae Miko's request, Gorou has taken up a certain extra "job" at Yae Publishing House.\nWith the end of the Vision Hunt Decree, and the successful negotiations between Watatsumi Island and the Shogunate, relations between the two sides are beginning to warm.\nGorou has also visited Narukami Island quite a few times to check out the changes, buy a few popular books, and go to Yae Publishing House to complete the task he agreed to help with.\nYae Miko set up an anonymous column for Gorou in the "That's Life" magazine. Here, readers will write about the things that trouble them and send them to Yae Publishing House, upon which Gorou will give them some suggestions.\nYae Publishing House will take special care to redact any personal information revealed on the part of the write-ins or Gorou's replies, and will replace real names with pseudonyms.\nAccording to Yae Miko, she chose him because she'd heard that he often listened to his subordinates when they chatted about personal matters.\nThe column proved to be very popular indeed, but for whatever reason, every time an editor delivers the royalties to Gorou, they might sheepishly ask:\n"Ah, speaking of which, Gorou, have you heard of Ms. Hina?"\n"I've heard that she's a rather popular columnist, and a recent one, too. Is something the matter?"\n"Oh, no, no... It's nothing..." ｜ 受八重神子之托，五郎在八重堂有一份额外的「工作」。\n眼狩令结束，海祇岛与幕府的谈判也顺利完成，双方往来日益密切。\n五郎也多次来到鸣神岛，看看这里的变化，买一些时下的书籍，顺便去八重堂完成自己答应的事情。\n八重神子在《闲事月刊》上为五郎开了一个匿名专栏。读者将烦恼的事情写在信里，寄到八重堂，五郎则会给出自己的建议。\n在这个过程中，读者的来信与五郎的回答都会经过八重堂特殊处理，略去现实信息，以假名替代。\n据八重神子说，之所以选择五郎，是听说他在军中常与部下聊天谈心。\n专栏很受欢迎，可不知为何，八重堂的编辑每次将稿酬交到五郎手中时，都会心虚地进行一番简短的询问：\n「说起来，五郎你听说过希娜小姐吗？」\n「听说是最近很受欢迎的专栏作者，发生什么事了吗？」\n「不不，没事没事…」

Since many ruins in Natlan are deduced to have been left by even more ancient Saurians, it is only natural that an organization that studies items excavated from those ruins would be created. That said, despite its name, the Association's purview also seems to include many topics unrelated to Saurians... ｜ 坐落于楚汶市集一端的「龙遗物研究协会」柜台。因纳塔境内有大量遗迹都被推断是由更古老的龙所留下，所以研究那些遗迹中发掘而出物件的协会也应运而生，只不过，虽然名为「龙遗物研究协会」，但研究的范畴似乎也囊括了许多与龙无关的内容…

- This tall and spacious stall is often used for selling all kinds of textiles. It is structurally similar to the most eye-catching store in the market west of Port Ormos. After hearing the owner's story, some foreign sailors decided that her textiles could be used to ward off sea monsters. Though it became a widespread rumor among a certain group of people, the store owner remains unaware of this affair and of the reason for the uptick in business. ｜ 高大宽敞的摊位，常被用于出售各种纺织品，与奥摩斯港西侧市集里最为醒目的店铺有着相同的构造。一些外国的水手听说了该店店主的故事后，认为她出售的纺织品有着威慑海兽的功效，这一传闻似乎正在特定群体中流传，该店店主还毫不知情，对生意不断变好的缘由一头雾水。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Did you know the reeds in Dihua Marsh are common materials used in making paper?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> The solid reed cores are used to make pens, while the hollow part is used to make flutes. It's all very sophisticated.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Over the years, many heroes and swordsmen have also chosen Dihua Marsh as the location of their duels.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> The more reeds, the more elegant the place. But in places where the reeds are the thickest, the water can be quite deep...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> So there are a lot of unlucky duelists who fall in and drown while the duel is on...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> And what's my takeaway from all of this supposed to be?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Don't get into a fight in Dihua Marsh! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你知道吗？荻花洲的荻叶，是常见的造纸材料。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>用荻杆实心的一端做笔、空心的一端做笛，在璃月也是一件很风雅的事。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>千百年来，有许多侠客与剑士，都会选在这个风雅的地方对决。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>荻花越多就越风雅，但它们长势最茂盛的地方，有时水会很深…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>所以，决斗声势浩大、最终却双双失足溺死的倒霉侠客…其实还挺多的。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>从这个故事里我们能学到什么呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不要打架！

I just need to keep my chin up, keep trying, and keep learning! ｜ 过去的我太天真了。想要和帝君相提并论，我…真的有这个资格吗？…欸？嗯…你说得对，明明在其他事情上都很有自信，为什么我会为这件事烦恼。与其在这里垂头丧气，不如多做多学，努力追上他！
- The standard chandelier set of the Illusory Annex consists of a large central main lamp and secondary lamps arranged in a circular fashion around it. It resembles an elegant floral crown, and the color, temperature, and lamp wick intensity create a comfortable atmosphere, resulting in soft overall lighting.\nA opera singer once remarked that this lamp's brilliance was "akin to being underwater, gazing at the sunlight filtering through the clouds at three in the afternoon."\nHowever, considering the age and diving skills of this performer, the reliability of such descriptions is an open question. ｜ 「幻景别宫」的标准吊灯组，由中央的大型主灯和环形排布在周围的副灯结合而成，外观优雅形似花冠，灯芯的色温和强度令人倍感舒适，整体光照的效果格外柔和。\n一位歌剧演员曾经说：「这盏灯的光芒，如同身处水下时，遥望午后三时自云间垂落而下的天光」。\n但考虑到这位演员的年龄和潜水技巧，此类描述的可靠性值得商榷。

- Decreases Swimming Stamina consumption by 15%. In addition, for 10s after using an Elemental Skill, Max HP is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>. For every Hydro Elemental Type character in the party, Max HP is increased by another <color=#99FFFFFF>21%</color>, and the maximum increase that can be achieved in this way is <color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color>. Can be triggered once every 15s. ｜ 游泳消耗的体力降低15%。此外，施放元素战技后的10秒内，生命值上限提升<color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>，队伍中每存在一位水元素类型的角色，生命值上限将进一步提升<color=#99FFFFFF>21%</color>，至多通过这种方式提升<color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color>，该效果每15秒至多触发一次。

- Weapon Ascension Material.\nAll demons who wander in the wilderness or live amongst mortals will be attracted by the sight of the Almighty Narukami Ogosho, represented by the Electro Mitsudomoe. Though their lives may be longer than any creature, they will at last come to their end. If those with limited lifespans hanker after eternity, then they can only pray that "Eternity" remembers them. And she did indeed answer their prayers, remembering them all, friend and foe alike, in her heart. No matter whether it was the demon owls who resided amidst the fog and ripped through the skies, the bake-danuki who dared to trespass her imperial gardens, or that female oni, lovely as the moon and mighty in battle, yet who would eventually come to blows with her... Whether it was the tengu who soared on dark wings or the Kitsune Saiguu who once walked by her side, but who eventually disappeared forever...\nThese countless tales have come to rest within her heart, and someday, they will surely shine again in the eternal paradise of her dreams. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n漫游在荒野中，或是与人一同生活的妖物都会被「雷之三重巴」所代表的御建鸣神主尊所吸引。纵使他们的寿命远远久于万物灵长，也有终结的一日。要在有限的寿命中求得永恒与无限，就只能骥望于「永恒」能记住他们了。而她也回应了他们的愿望，将所有的敌手与友人铭记于心。据说，无论是栖息在迷雾当中、撕裂天空的魔性之枭，胆敢擅闯御苑的怪化狸，还是那位武艺高强容貌如月、最终却对自己露出尖牙的鬼族少女；无论是曾经展开黑翼自在空行的天狗，抑或是与她同行，最终又永远消失的「狐斋宫大人」…\n无数的故事静静地沉睡在她的心中，终有一日会在她所梦想的永恒净土中灼灼发光吧。
- From Afar, Gazing Upon Towers Foreign ｜ 「遥望异国高城」

- Condense the flames into a mark, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color> to opponents up ahead. The Traveler restores 7 Nightsoul points per second for the next 4s.\n\n<i>Together, you and Paimon studied the principles behind an undying flame.</i> ｜ 将烈火凝聚为印记，对前方的敌人造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>，并在接下来的4秒内，每秒为旅行者恢复7点夜魂值。\n\n<i>和派蒙一起研究过使火燃烧不熄的条件。</i>

- Huixin, you don't know how important those words are to me... ｜ 慧心，你刚才的话对我来说，非常重要…
- Dehya is a member of the mercenary organization known as the Eremites. Her great martial strength and battle instincts have earned her the name "Flame-Mane."\nAs long as the price is right and the commission is reasonable, the lioness's fangs can be yours to command.\nBut those who employ Dehya should also know that pacts struck through Mora are merely temporary — this lioness's leash is not theirs to hold.\nShe is no one's slave, and her sword only follows her heart. ｜ 佣兵组织「镀金旅团」的成员迪希雅，凭借强悍的武力和战斗智慧打响了自己「炽鬃之狮」的名号。\n只要出价够高，委托内容合理，狮子的利齿就可为你所用。\n但同时雇主们需要明白，他们只是靠摩拉与迪希雅结下短暂的契约，驭使这头狮子的缰绳不在他们手中。\n沙漠的狮子不是任何人的奴仆，她的剑随心而动。

- I wasn't surprised the chief at the time came up with the plan. The Ley Lines were already in a terrible state. A suitable candidate for the ceremony appears, and now you have the chance to make things better... Of course you're going to take it. ｜ 我不奇怪当时的族长想到这种办法。地脉情况极度糟糕，谁都不想纳塔毁灭。刚巧有适合的人选，总想试一试。

- We'll just look for it ourselves if none of you caught a glimpse of it. We're not gonna tell Wriothesley anything, don't worry. ｜ 没看到的话我们就自己找一找，你们也不用担心我们会和莱欧斯利说什么。
- A man-made flower in eternal bloom. Who knows if there truly is life in there? ｜ 永远盛放的人造之花，其中是否具有生命呢。
- He's been worried sick for a while now. He wouldn't stop talking the whole way back. ｜ 这家伙担心好久了，回来的路上就在不停地念叨。

- ... ｜ …
- Huh? The voice from the speaker changed. It sounds like someone really serious is calling us... ｜ 咦，喇叭里的声音变了，好像是个很严肃的人在朝我们这边呼喊…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Paimon is... Uh, Paimon. ｜ 我叫派蒙。
- Hmph, then I shall extend to you the honor of meeting the Kaiser and Kaiserin with me on a future occasion. ｜ 哼哼，那也赐汝荣光，下回，尔等可随本皇女一同面见父皇母后。
- Supporting each other is how people survive. ｜ 互相扶持才能生存下去。
- Take, for example... Sanhaj from the Masters of the Night-Wind, whom all storytellers revere... ｜ 就比如说…对，就比如说所有叙事人都很崇拜的，「烟谜主」的桑哈杰…
- You and Paimon rush into the Forbidden Zone, and two solemn figures await you: Wriothesley and Clorinde.\nAt the bottom of the Forbidden Zone, a huge sluice gate trembles, the needle on the indicator swaying wildly near the very limit.\nSuddenly, the tremendous water pressure overwhelms the four locks holding the sluice gate shut, and vast torrent of water breaks free and gushes forth. The surging Primordial Seawater rushes into the room like a fountain.\nWriothesley unleashes his full power, freezing the torrent of seawater into a pillar of ice. But the relief is temporary, as the torrent continues to rush up from below, surging past the layer of ice. Wriothesley knows his own ability to delay has reached its limit, and he turns and runs as fast as he can.\nBeyond the isolation gates, Clorinde stands before you, and just as she agreed with Wriothesley, prepares to blast the gate controls the moment he makes good his escape.\nIn order to stop the seawater leaking through, all three isolation gates slam into place one after other, with Wriothesley barely making it through as the final gate shuts.\nFaced with a torrent of water that threatens to overwhelm the isolation gates at any time, Wriothesley orders you to go to the overworld and find Neuvillette to resolve the crisis.\nHe and Clorinde resolve to stay put as the final line of defense... ｜ 你与派蒙冲入禁区，眼前是两道严阵以待的背影：莱欧斯利与克洛琳德。\n禁区尽头，巨大的闸门不住地震颤，仪表盘的指针在临界点战栗般摇晃。\n瞬间，闸门的四角被巨大的水压冲破，强大的水流轰开禁锢，汹涌的胎海水如喷泉般冲入房间。\n莱欧斯利奋力挥出数拳将涌出的海水冻成冰柱。但场面只稳住了一小会儿，更多海水不断冲击冰层，莱欧斯利自知拖延战术已经到了极限，转身向外奔去。\n隔离门外，克洛琳德挡在你们身前，依照约定所说在莱欧斯利逃离时拔枪射向闸门控制装置。\n为阻挡外溢的海水，三道闸门依次重重落下。最后一刻，莱欧斯利从隔离门下成功逃出。\n面对随时会被冲破的隔离门，莱欧斯利嘱咐你们去水上找那维莱特来解决危机。\n而他与克洛琳德，则会留在这里，成为最后的防线…
- Amurta Sage ｜ 生论派贤者
- I'm Phonia, intelligence officer of the reorganized 7th Company, and also one of the people who proposed this Wargame. ｜ 我是方妮雅，西风骑士团改组第七小队情报官，同时也算是这次兵棋推演的提议者之一。
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- A Melusine named Kiara received a threat letter. ｜ 有一位名叫基娅拉的美露莘收到了威胁信。
- Ha, don't get too excited. These are clients, not ghosts. ｜ #哦~别大惊小怪，{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}们不是鬼，只是普通的客人。
- About Baal ｜ 关于巴尔…
- I doubt this counts as a book written in an ancient language... ｜ 应该不至于是古文…
- I really like the tempura here, although it feels like everything is coated with batter and then fried... ｜ 我特别喜欢这边的「天妇罗」，虽然感觉…就是裹上面衣炸一切啦…
- So, whatever business you are here to discuss, is probably best discussed with me directly. ｜ 所以，不论什么事宜直接与我商量就好。
- You can leave Ororon to sift through them and find Leyla. Since he wants to help so bad, he can take the hardest job. ｜ 至于之后的分辨工作，就交给欧洛伦吧，既然他执意要管这件事，就让他干最辛苦的活。
- This superior bow once belonged to a master archer. However, it gives off a strong scent, thus making it unsuitable for hunting. ｜ 据说曾属于技艺高强的射手，是一把上好的弓。因为散发出强烈的气息，难以用于狩猎。
- Hehe, looks like we're on the same page. ｜ 嘿嘿，你和我想的一样。
- His name's Oda Tarou. I've heard that his ancestors used to live on Seirai Island before migrating here for various reasons. ｜ 他叫太田太郎，据他说…他的祖先曾经居住在清籁岛，后来因为各种原因才移居到了这里。
- Unlike what you hear from most histories, the people of Remuria were not ordinary humans like the Fontainians. Rather, they were a new race, their bodies having been cast from stone, with Ichor for blood. ｜ 与通常所流传的历史不同，雷穆利亚的居民并非是和枫丹人一样的普通人类，而是以石头为身躯，灵露为血液的新种族。
- Paimon knows, Paimon knows! Something awful's gonna happen next. It doesn't matter if it's Mondstadt, Liyue, or Inazuma, it's always the same wherever you go. ｜ 我知道我知道，接下来就要发生最让人遗憾的事了，不管是蒙德还是璃月、稻妻，这种事情到处都有呢。
- Aha, I see many a determined gaze before me. Very well. Head over to this location, and begin your heroic journey! ｜ 很好，我已经看到了你们坚毅的眼神。就请前往此处，开启你们的旅途吧！
- My Lineup ｜ 我方阵容
- Now then, Lady Furina, do you wish to speak against the defense's statements? ｜ 对于林尼先生方面提出的说法，芙宁娜女士有无不同的看法？
- {0}/{1} ｜ {0}/{1}
- In the "Warrior's Spirit" event, complete a duel with Maguu Kengou on Normal difficulty ｜ 在「演武传心」活动中，完成与「魔偶剑豪」的普通难度比试
- I heard that Natlan's also got a tribe that's super gung-ho about mining, so I came all the way to check it out. ｜ 我听说纳塔有个地方也喜欢挖矿，就不远千里赶来看看。
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- Well, Paimon doesn't know either, but maybe... Maybe the waters will rise tomorrow... You know, like in the prophecy. ｜ 我、我也不知道啊，也许…呃也许明天水就涨上来了？比如预言里说的…
- A monster formed from a vine that was imbued with the essence of biting frost within the ley lines.\nSome studies suggest that plants are like the organs of the world, harmonizing the turbulent elemental energies of the ley lines. Concrete examples of this phenomena are Mist Flowers, Whopperflowers, and the like, which brim over with elemental energy.\nIn certain circumstances, certain plants will turn into creatures of monstrous size and intent — such as the Cryo Regisvines — in the course of many years. ｜ 地脉中的寒霜附着在藤蔓上，由此形成的魔物。\n有研究认为，植物就像世界的器官一样，调和着元素奔涌的地脉；而这种生态在地表上的结晶就是冰雾花、骗骗花等，充满了元素能量的产物。\n而生长在特定环境的特定植物，经年累月或许就会成为急冻树这样的，如同魔兽一般庞大而凶猛的生命体吧…
- Teyvat Fried Egg (In Effect) ｜ 提瓦特煎蛋（生效中）
- You...! ｜ 你…！
- Don't worry, I didn't get it either. ｜ 没事，我也没太搞明白。
- That roar comes from the artist's heart and soul, speaking their feelings aloud... and those feelings are, more often than not, rather intense. ｜ 那咆哮发自画家心灵，倾诉着他的各种情感…而且这些情感大部分都比较激烈。
- Hmph! You should get out more, Sorush. If you'd been outside, you'd have seen a whooole lot more strange stuff... ｜ 唔！斯露莎不要老待在家里，应该多出去走走！外边的荒唐事可多了…
- "Homu, homu, mimi domu!" ｜ 「Homu, Homu, mimi domu!」
- Our current Archon achieved an overwhelming victory. The result was obvious from the beginning. ｜ 这一代的火神，以压倒性的优势获胜，全程毫无悬念。
- Ancient Inscription ｜ 古旧的铭刻
- Yeah... It was a very last-minute change of plans. We had to get a bunch of supplies ready, like the Tanuki Game Award, which took a while. ｜ 嗯…除了原定的计划要改动，还有新的物料要准备，比如那只「金狸狸奖杯」，监修起来就花了不少工夫。
- Nightsoul Point Limit|{param4:F1} ｜ 夜魂值上限|{param4:F1}点
- When exposed in the Withering, characters will continue to accumulate "Decay."\n Depending on how much Decay you have accumulated, all your own party members will have their All Elemental RES, Physical RES, and Max HP decreased. With more Decay accrued, those stats will decrease more in accordance.\nOnce Decay has mounted to its limit, all your own party members will be down if they keep staying in the Withering.\nDestroying the Tumors of the Withering normally can eradicate the Withering nearby. Use Candle of Life or Flame of Life to diminish accrued Decay. Attacked by Decay Projectiles or monsters affected by the Withering will induce accelerated accumulation of Decay. ｜ 在死域环境中，角色将会持续积累「凋零」。\n依据凋零积累的程度，队伍中所有自己的角色的所有元素抗性、物理抗性与生命值上限将会降低。积累越多，降低的程度就会越严峻。\n凋零积累达到上限后，若继续处于死域环境中，队伍中所有自己的角色将会倒下。\n摧毁死域瘤通常能够消除它周围的死域。生之烛、生之火光等事物能削减凋零的积累；凋零弹与处于死域影响下的魔物攻击将会加剧凋零的积累。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Viktor seems to have run into a small issue during the Windblume Festival. ｜ 在风花节中，维克多先生似乎遇见了一个小小的麻烦…
- And what would Caspar like to eat? ｜ 那卡斯帕想吃什么菜？
- I'm afraid I still feel a little disoriented... ｜ 虽然还是有点晕…
- Willow, collect. Fog, handle. Spring, send. ｜ 垂柳，收集。雾道，处理。泉眼，发送。
- It's all thanks to you, of course. If you hadn't stepped in and helped us without holding grudges, things wouldn't have gone so smoothly. ｜ 这还得多谢你们，要不是你们不计前嫌出手相助，想来这件事也不会这么顺利。

- Add in the cards you want by dragging them over the avatar at the top of the menu or just slotting them in. Conversely, you can also drag or un-slot them to remove them from the deck as well. Additionally, you can drag Character Cards that are already in a deck to the deck of another avatar to switch the positions of the corresponding Character Cards. ｜ 将想要加入的卡牌拖拽至上方头像或槽位处即可将卡牌添加入牌组，反过来亦可将牌组内的牌移除出牌组。此外，将已经放入牌组的角色牌拖动至其他牌组内的角色头像处，即可与对应的角色牌交换位置。

- See you later. ｜ 再见。

- I can keep waiting, but who knows whether what I'm waiting for will ever come to pass? ｜ 等下去的话，能等到吗？还是等不到呢？
- Inarticulate Arabalika is exploring the Ruins of Dahri, where "Big Iron Chunks" abound, alone. Though he is a master of Ararakalari, it may be better to check in on him... ｜ 荼诃之座有许多「大铁块」，寡言的兰百梨迦孤身深入此地，虽说他精通「兰迦拉梨」，不过还是去看看他的情况吧…
- Take the adepti, for instance. Owing to their years of seclusion, they were the least informed. Yet, when faced with a crisis, they, commendably, showed the greatest amount of restraint possible. Not only did they manage to co-operate with the Qixing, but in the end, they even made efforts to understand the hearts of the people. ｜ 世外隐居的众仙…他们所知的信息最少。但他们先是保持了最大程度的克制，又在危难时愿与七星合作，最后还尝试理解了民众的心。
- Use Elemental Sight to find the cart loaded with Cor Lapis ｜ (test)在附近寻找装有石珀的矿车$HIDDEN

- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- I'm supposed to meet some friends here, but... Hmm, I don't see them anywhere. Maybe they're not here yet... ｜ 我和朋友约好在这里见面，嗯，不过他们去哪儿了呢，不会还没来吧…
- I couldn't help but notice the flower on Miss Lisa's hat though — I think it's a <color=#00E1FFFF>Rose</color>. ｜ 不过倒是有一点我注意到了，丽莎小姐帽子上的花似乎是<color=#00E1FFFF>「蔷薇」</color>哦。
- They say that a very striking character has appeared in Mondstadt. He claims to have some "new deals" which he could share with some partners. ｜ 听说蒙德出现了一个很抢眼的家伙。他说着自己有些「新生意」，可以和大家合作。

- So, if you don't mind, I might have to give this festival a pass, but if there's another opportunity, I'll come — and drag him along as well! ｜ 所以这次音乐庆典就只能说声抱歉啦。如果下次有机会，我会拉他一起过去！

- (Hand over the fortune slip) In the middle of a hazy night. ｜ （交付竹签）「胧夜正中」。
- Five... ｜ 五……
- You are far too dismissive of the Tatarigami's power. ｜ 你们对待祟神实在是太掉以轻心了。
- I don't get them either... ｜ 我也看不懂…
- Seeing how much you can find to talk about even with Albedo, you must be quite the conversationalist. So put that skill to good use — teach them all how to survive on Dragonspine. I'm sure this is well within your capability, no? ｜ 你跟阿贝多都能找到那么多话题，我想，你一定很擅长聊天吧。就以这种话术去沟通，教教他们雪山生存法则好了，是你的话一定能做到吧？
- Here, this tea cake is for you — it's from Qiaoying Village. Amber really liked it, so I decided to buy some. ｜ 这份茶糕给你，是我和安柏在翘英庄里买的。安柏特别喜欢，所以我们就多买了一些。
- Thundering Shackles ｜ 轰雷禁锢

- However, there's been word of monsters appearing on the mountain, so you two should be careful. ｜ 不过，我听说这山里有魔物出没，你们可要小心点啊。
- Thus would the epics of later generations speak of this time:\nThe heroes leaped light of foot o'er floral cliffs, trials and tribulations besting forthwith. By their arm they brought forth rain and dew, the dark clouds fled, and flowers grew.\n\nComment in the margins: You forgot to mention how popular the forest tavern was.\nComment below the comment: Wait, did all of you think the wine was good? I thought it tasted kinda weird.\nComment below the comment below the comment: That might be because someone put... into your cup... (the following words are scratched out) ｜ 于是后世的史诗如此记述——\n勇者轻足跃芳崖，巧解碍难化纷杂。伊人臂弯化甘霖，愁云散尽木生花。\n\n书卷旁的批注：你忘了提那森林里的酒馆有多热闹。\n批注下的批注：话说你们都觉得那酒好喝吗？我怎么觉得一股怪味道？\n批注下批注的批注：那可能是因为有人往你杯里放了…（后面的文字被涂掉了）
- Uhh, there's nothing for Paimon to do here. So boring... ｜ 唉，待在这里都没事可做，好无聊…
- Feather of Judgment ｜ 裁断的翎羽
- They don't close one eye with you lot? ｜ 七星也不会对冒险家协会网开一面？
- It would seem the fragment of this Nightmare is no different from the one back then... It hates all joy and every good thing in this world. ｜ 这个「噩梦残片」，看起来跟当初的主人一样，仇视着所有的美好与喜乐啊。
- Would you like to fly with me? Hehe, can you keep up? ｜ 怎么样，要跟我一起飞吗，可别跟丢了啊！
- At first, I had planned on taking the route recorded in previous reports to look inside. Unexpectedly, all the entrances were blocked. ｜ 一开始，我打算按照以前的研究报告记载的通道，进去看看的。结果没想到通往地下的入口都被封堵住了。
- I'm sorry that we hid it from you before. We just want to live a peaceful life... ｜ 抱歉，之前隐瞒了这件事，我们只想安安静静的生活…
- Wow... Paimon can sense a great power... ｜ 呜哇…能感觉到，好强的力量…
- Suspicious Fruity Trio ｜ 奇怪的花果三重奏
- Once a place where the great trained and honed themselves, it is now occupied by base scoundrels.\nShould you cleanse this ceremonial site, perhaps you will obtain the revelations left here by the ancestors. ｜ 曾为伟大之人的修行之所，如今却被各种宵小之徒所占据。\n如果能够将祭场清理干净的话，或许也能获得先人留在此处的启示吧。
- A broken horn that you obtained from defeating the Wolflord. That said, it should not have left anything behind after your hunt.\nEven a lord among the Riftwolves is nothing before monsters of a higher pedigree.\n"Gold" mass-produced these malformed wolf packs almost as if by accident, like shrunken drawings on discarded sheets of paper, and the horns on this one represent its authority to command its dark brood to dissolve space itself. ｜ 战胜王兽后，得到的折断犄角。在它遭到驱逐后，不应残留在此世才对。\n即使在兽境群狼中贵为王兽，在魔兽的系谱中也不及其兄长们的万分之一吧。\n「黄金」将无数兽境的群狼如同将弃置的画纸一般压缩后而意外产生的畸形魔兽，而寄寓在其犄角中的是足以号令黑色的狼群为它溶解空间的权威。
- Hard ｜ 困难
- I can't know whether I will suffer in my future as you do now. All I know is that here and now, in the present, I wish to continue. ｜ 我不知道自己将来，会不会像师父一样感到痛苦。但我知道，现在的我，还不想停下脚步。
- Fortunately, he's fine. He just needs some bed rest. ｜ 幸好人没事，只是要在床上多躺一段时间。
- You see now, I thought so too, but... ｜ 我也这样想过，但是…
- Yes, it refers to our present situation. ｜ 没错，就是现在正在发生的这一幕。
- Well, I spend most of my time here, and I have noticed something odd before. ｜ 因为我所有的时间基本都在这里，所以注意到有一件怪事。
- When you were kids, surely you guys believed in things like heroes who slayed dragons, and sacred swords that cut through darkness? It's the same thing. ｜ 你们小时候也相信过战胜恶龙的勇者，斩破黑暗的圣剑吧，我觉得其实是一样的东西。
- Well, I have skipped over so many centuries that try as we might, Draff and I cannot figure out where exactly I fit in the family tree, and therefore how we should address one another. ｜ 啊，毕竟就那样「跳过」 了百年的时间，我和杜拉夫已经论不清辈分了。
- Ancient Work Log ｜ 古老的工作日志
- ...When the Marechaussee Phantom searched Pierre's house, there was no sign of these barrels, right? ｜ …逐影庭在皮埃尔的住所里，好像没有见到过这些木桶。
- Get Now ｜ 立即获取
- I'm on a break right now... ｜ 现在可是休息时间…

- A Candle in the Wind? ｜ 已如风中残烛？

- I'd like to go again, too. ｜ 我也想再去玩。
- Many dragons once immersed themselves in the lake of flame, and thus did the information and wisdom carried within the liquid Phlogiston flow into their minds.\nBut that was in ages past. None now come to this place to seek wisdom.\nInstead, these crystallizations of sagacity came to be used as proofs of strength... To think that such objects that might push an entire species into the next generation would be used as naught but weapons! ｜ 诸多的龙众曾将身体浸泡入焰池，液态燃素中所携的信息与智慧通过这种方式进入它们的脑海。\n但那是许久之前的事了，如今此地再无追求智慧的族类。\n取而代之的，智慧的结晶被用于武力的彰显…足以推动族裔前往下个世代的成果，竟然只被作为武器使用。

- Don't just take my word for it, though. Even the tribe elders said they'd never seen an Archon with such strength before. ｜ 别说我了，部族里的老人都说从没见过力量如此强大的火神。

- How strange. My storage room is running out of space — soon, I won't be able to fit any more mechanical parts in there. I thought I was pretty good at storing things... - Well, I'd love to stay, but I'm afraid I still have to inform the other candidates about the retrials. With our younger generation's future on the line, there's no time to lose. ｜ 可惜我现在还得去通知其他人试炼重启的事…事关下一代的未来，片刻也不能怠慢。
- Where's the real Ajaw and what'd you do with him? ｜ 感觉有哪里不对劲。
- Xilonen says a name is like a blessing, so I wanna give you my blessing, too. ｜ 希诺宁姐姐说，「名字」是一种「祝福」，我也想像她那样，为你送上我的祝福。
- There are hilichurls about as well. Let's help! ｜ 旁边还有丘丘人看守，我们快去帮帮它吧！
- I'm a real lousy liar... ｜ 本大爷是真不擅长说谎啊。
- Even the bottle design itself shall require some thought. It is a new type of Fonta, after all, so we must give it unique packaging to make an impression. ｜ 甚至还有瓶身的设计方案。既然是新型枫达，那自然也要采用全新的包装，才能让人印象深刻。

- It's your birthday, so we planned a surprise party for you. ｜ 难得的生日，来点惊喜才好呀。
- C'mon, she was definitely talking about you! ｜ 对哦，还能有谁呀！
- Huh? You're finally back! Don't disappear like that, don't you know how worrying it is? Just imagine what would happen if you never returned... ｜ 咦？你终于回来了！呜呜，我好担心，要是你一直回不来要怎么办…
- Actually, courage can never be stolen... ｜ 其实勇气是偷不走的…

- We can walk and talk. Perhaps the mingling of ideas will give rise to new inspiration. ｜ 我们不妨边走边讨论，说不定可以碰撞出新的灵感。

- The character connected to the <color=#FFD780FF>Jinni</color> will obtain the following buffs based on their current HP and Energy:\n·When their HP is lower than 50%, they gain 50% Incoming Healing Bonus.\n·When their Energy is less than 50%, they gain 30% Energy Recharge. ｜ 与<color=#FFD780FF>灯中幽精</color>相连的角色，依据当前的生命值与元素能量，获得以下提升：\n·生命值低于50%时，提升50%受治疗加成；\n·元素能量低于50%时，提升30%元素充能效率。
- Oh! Here's a thought. Maybe he just went straight home? ｜ 啊！我想到了，他有没有可能是回家了？
- "How did you get this good in such a short time... Hehe. Well then, I suppose I should show you what I'm really made of, too!"\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Diona" starts with the Talent Card "Shaken, Not Purred" equipped.</color> ｜ 「唔，明明才一段时间没见，你的牌技变得那么厉害了吗…哼哼，那我也要拿点真本事出来啦！」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「迪奥娜」初始装备有天赋牌「猫爪冰摇」。</color>

- I'll stay and keep you company. ｜ 我留下来陪你一起吧。
- Counting on passionate and reliable people while rewarding those willing to help with supplies is one of the Yashiro Commission's ways of helping the Inazuma locals.\nAccepting Requests from Madarame Hyakubei and completing them will increase your Reputation.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Request: Limits and Resetting</color>\nYou can only accept a certain number of Requests every week.\nYou can check the number of Requests you've taken this week in the Reputation Menu.\nThis limit is shared among all cities.\nNew Requests will become available every Monday.\n\nOnce your Reputation reaches the maximum level, you can no longer accept new Requests. ｜ 仰赖热心可靠的人，并通过物资褒赏这些愿意伸出援手的人，是社奉行帮助稻妻居民的方式之一。\n及时在斑目百兵卫处领取「居民请求」并完成这些任务，可以提高声望。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【居民请求：接取限制与刷新】</color>\n每周能接取的居民请求的数量是有限的。\n本周已接取的数量可以在声望界面查看。\n所有城市共享数量限制。\n每周一都会出现新的居民请求。\n\n声望等级达到上限后，无法继续接取新的居民请求。

- Thank you, Molli! ｜ 谢谢你，小茉莉。

- Well, I don't pay them any mind. Liyue has prospered for a thousand years, and even if the sky were to fall, Rex Lapis would hold it up. What's the worst that could happen? ｜ 可我从来都没在意过。这璃月昌盛了千年，天塌了有岩王爷顶着，你说还能怎么样呢？
- That's the spirit. It might take some time to explain, so let's move out first and I'll explain when we get there. ｜ 正是这种精神。解释起来可能会有点长，我们现在就动身吧。到了地方我再解释。
- But to his credit, a lot of the things he ropes Boss into doing in the name of beetle brawling actually result in Boss doing some real work for a change. It's made things a lot easier for me. ｜ 玉将常常能用斗虫的理由，让老大去干一些以前不在意的正事，倒也让我省了不少心。
- Hmm... Paimon doesn't have a clue what's on it, but it looks pretty important... ｜ 唔…完全看不懂上面刻了什么东西，但看上去好像挺重要的…

- Uh, yeah, no thanks! ｜ 哇啊，我才不要！
- If he hadn't written those poems in praise of my wares, they'd only be worth a fraction of what I can sell them for today... ｜ 若不是当年岩王爷题诗，这些珍品霓裳花的身价，哪能这么金贵…
- I wouldn't. You'll get hit by a forest boar if you interrupt a couple's romantic conversation. ｜ 打扰别人谈恋爱会被林猪撞的哦。

- Yes. This cave was one of the shelters we built for the inhabitants of Chenyu Vale, such that the innocents caught in the crossfire when the floods overturned the heavens and the earth split open could have a place of safety. ｜ 嗯。这处洞穴应当是当初我们为沉玉谷的人们创造的庇护所之一。在洪水滔天、大地崩裂的时候，被卷入争斗的无辜者也有得以保全自己的地方。
- You can trust Habachi... ｜ 可以相信哈巴奇的…
- ...But for the people of Sumeru, dreams are very rare. ｜ …不过，做梦这种事情对须弥人来说很罕见就对了。
- Ugh... What should we do? Paimon's still trying to wrap her head around that. ｜ 唔…怎、怎么办？我脑子绕不过来。
- ...Which means, with the power of imagination, they can change anything in this dream. ｜ …那么那个人也可以通过「想象」，来随意改变这个梦境中的一切。
- So, we sat there together. I shared my Onigiri with it — stone cold by this point, but still edible — and we ended up huddling together, waiting for the rain to stop. ｜ 我就这样跟它坐在一起，分吃了一个已经凉了的饭团，然后挤在一起等雨停。
- "...<color=#37FFFF>Four winds bring the sound of joy</color>." ｜ 「………………………………………<color=#37FFFF>四野欢声荡山间</color>」
- Yue-style cooking puts emphasis on lighter, brighter flavors. It's heavily seafood-based, so if that's your thing you have to try it! ｜ 「月菜」的口味更讲究清淡鲜香，喜欢吃海鲜的话一定要尝尝「月菜」！
- They planned this well in advance. ｜ 果然老谋深算。

- Achieve victory within 6 Rounds ｜ 6回合内胜利
- Traditional Inazuman armor displayed upon a rack in a sitting posture. These suits of armor still follow the classic forms used by hatamoto a century ago and are widely used by the Tenryou Commission, both for combat and ceremony.\nIn a time before armor-making materials experienced a renaissance, the protective power of armor was balanced on a scale against its weight. Heavier armor provided more protection, yes, but it was a huge drain on the wearer's stamina and could not be put on quickly.\nThe Shogun's army, equipped with such sturdy armor, was able to achieve battlefield superiority against the resistance for a time. Unfortunately, the samurai could not wear their armor indefinitely, and the resistance leadership caught on to the weaknesses in reaction and preparation time that these suits of armor imposed, engaging them with multiple forces on different fronts and using harassing tactics that forced the Shogunate forces many times into battles where there was no time to put their armor on. Subsequently, the Shogun's army also gradually switched to using lighter gear that allowed them to react quickly and engage the enemy flexibly. ｜ 以端坐之姿肃然陈列于支架上的稻妻传统盔甲，沿袭了百余年前旗本武士的经典形制，亦被天领奉行广泛使用，兼顾实战与礼仪两大用途。\n在锻造盔甲的材料获得飞跃性的发展之前，护甲的防护能力与重量始终位于天平的两端，过重的盔甲虽能提供周全的防护，但对穿戴者的体能消耗过大，且难以迅速穿戴。\n幕府军曾大量列装这般厚重的铠甲，并在与反抗军的战斗中取得了相当的优势。可惜武士们无法终日穿戴盔甲，反抗军的领袖抓准了沉重盔甲整备与反应速度较慢的缺点，采用多支部队梯次接战，频繁扰敌的战术，使得幕府军多次遭遇无暇穿戴盔甲的窘迫战况。此后，幕府军也逐渐改用了相对轻便的盔甲，以求快速反应，灵活接敌。
- Welcome home. ｜ 欢迎回家。
- Ooh, this is great! ｜ 真好吃！
- Projection of Geochanter Bracer ｜ 岩使游击兵的影像
- Her extreme focus is what makes Julie a great adventurer. But when she gets lost, it takes a long time to find her... ｜ 这种超强的专注力，这就是朱莉作为冒险家厉害的地方了嘛。不过，她迷路之后，把她找回来确实需要花费很长时间…
- I see... And your family lives near Qingce Village, you say? I visit patients there frequently, but I don't recall ever seeing you or your parents. ｜ 原来如此…你们一家是住在轻策庄附近？我常去那边出诊，但似乎未曾遇见过你们。
- Awesome! In that case, I'm sure you'll understand my philosophy of music! ｜ 那太好了！您一定能理解我的音乐理念！
- Good eye! ｜ 你很有眼光嘛！
- Lisa is in charge of clearing the Temple of the Lion alongside you. ｜ 丽莎负责与你们共同扫查南风之狮的庙宇。
- Let's go back to the stone shrine and tell the spirit there about this. ｜ 我们回到石头神龛那边，告诉等待在石龛边上的那个残魂吧。
- Factor Confluence ｜ 遇合的因缘
- "Well, of course discounts weren't going to be that easy to come by..." ｜ 「打折之类的事，果然没那么容易遇到啊…」
- A little surprise from the People of the Springs. ｜ 来自流泉之众部族的小小惊喜。
- Riff Revolution ｜ 叛逆刮弦
- ...Eh, I say forget it. The record states that Domeki went missing — well, that's what it says anyway, but if he was hit by that storm, he probably... ｜ …算了吧。资料记载那位百目鬼失踪了。说是失踪，但被那种雷暴击中，也许已经…
- Reza ｜ 雷萨
- ...Why does it always end like this. ｜ …又是这个情节。
- But it's alright, I will follow you and show the way ahead. ｜ 不过没关系，我会随前辈一起去，给你们指路的。
- My name is Wiqas, a member of the Akademiya Extravaganza Planning Committee. Have you two heard of this festival? ｜ 我是维卡斯，学院庆典策划委员会的成员。两位可曾听说过学院庆典？
- It is some manner of desert-folk spellcraft. More cunning and clever by far than those barbarian slaves. ｜ 就是沙漠人的巫术玩意儿，比大部分蛮族奴仆聪明多了。

- Do you know why she's angry? ｜ 你知道她为什么生气吗？
- "After retiring from the Corps of Thirty, this is where I get my cup of coffee every day." ｜ 「从『三十人团』退休后，我每天都会来这里喝上一杯咖啡。」

- The Kanjou Commission? ｜ 「勘定奉行」？
- A vessel that seems to have been made by twisting and forming stone in a seemingly whimsical fashion. But it is an open question as to who possesses such strength... ｜ 似乎是将石块随意扭曲敲打做成的容器，不知何人拥有这样的臂力。
- A stone plate with ancient text on it that seems to have once been part of a certain building. The desert sands play host to many an unknown wish. Who made them, and who carries them now? The source of this symbol is probably the Spinocrocodile's frighteningly huge maw. ｜ 刻有古老文字的石板，似乎原本是某种构筑物的一部分。在沙海中沉睡了不知几许，又不知承载了谁人的祈愿。其上铭刻的文字的来源应当是棘冠鳄的骇人巨口。

- Gray Snow Cat ｜ 灰雪猫
- A bird feather that was picked up by the knight who walked with the North Wind in the snow. It still awaits the day when it will thaw. ｜ 与北风同行的骑士于雪中拾获的鸟羽，如今依旧静候解冻之刻。
- Bloom: Evolution ｜ 绽放·进阶
- Strictly speaking, asking for samples when we have not yet agreed to purchase the goods is unfair. Trade in Liyue must be based upon fairness. ｜ 平心而论，我们没有给出一定会买的承诺，便这样索要样品…本身就是有失公平的。璃月的「契约」之道，还需处处基于公平才是。
- Please, Traveler, just a tiny favor here. I'll have your payment ready. ｜ 拜托你啦旅行者，就帮帮我吧，我会支付给你报酬的。
- Good! No wonder Signora was so wary of you. ｜ 很好，你有这样的实力，怪不得「女士」也对你有所忌惮。
- Nzaya ｜ 妮扎娅
- Leave the Berry ｜ 放置树莓
- And the ordeal seems to have made quite the impression. ｜ 看这位先生的表现，想必印象十分深刻啊。
- I'd like a small glass of juice with some milk foam on top, thanks. ｜ 想喝顶部有奶泡的果汁，来一小杯。
- Beidou tells you about the origin of this check. Time to send it where it belongs... ｜ 北斗向你说明了钱票来历，现在，把它送去它该去的地方….
- Timaeus, the alchemist from Mondstadt, is currently troubled by a certain research topic... ｜ 蒙德的炼金术研究者蒂玛乌斯似乎正在为某项研究而烦恼…
- Now's not a good time for me... ｜ 现在不太方便…
- Well, since we've got the same goal, let's get along. How about a toast? ｜ 既然我们的目的相同，那么以后好好相处吧。干杯？
- Mona ｜ 莫娜
- To tell the truth, I've been having some thoughts about changing the Material Collector's name... ｜ 其实我也有把这个「素材收集器」重新命名的想法…
- Unable to accept their deaths, Seishimaru toiled to find the samurai family that carried out the sentence. ｜ 父母亡故后，势至丸非常不甘心，费了很大力气，找出了为他父母行刑的武士人家。

- I—I don't know. ｜ …不知道。
- It takes the right person to get the most out of a new technology. In your hands, it's sure to capture some amazing sights. ｜ 新奇的道具在厉害的人手里才能发挥最大的作用，在你们的运用下，它想必能记录不少精彩的景色。
- So, what would your wish be, Paimon? ｜ 派蒙有什么愿望？
- What now? ｜ 还有何事？

- 108 steps. ｜ 一百零八步。
- Sorry. I'd actually detected you a while back. You were hiding in those bushes in the corner, weren't you? You were pretty discreet overall, but you... overlooked a few details. ｜ 抱歉，其实我早就发现您了，您是在旁边那片草丛里吧，虽然您已经藏得很不错了，但还是…略微疏漏了些细节。
- I work as a miner, or at least that's what I used to do. Now that the Chasm's been sealed off, I just wander around without a job to do. ｜ 我是个矿工…准确地说，是前矿工，由于层岩巨渊被封锁了，因此目前是无业游民。
- I'll manage. ｜ 总能找到的。
- ... ｜ ……
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- We've been to Liyue. ｜ 我们去过璃月。
- Kachina ｜ 卡齐娜
- Hehe... Would the two of you be interested in said training? ｜ 呵呵…不知道二位对我们的训练有没有兴趣？
- Oh? Is that so? Well, since you are testifying for him, I suppose I won't ask any more questions... ｜ 哦？这样吗？既然有你们帮他作证，我也就不再追问了…
- ...Oh, just be careful, will you? ｜ 唉，你自己心里有点数就好。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- We provide full and complete one-stop custom service. Inquiries welcome, please bring the deposit, documentation and requirements, as well as any relevant proof to your consultation. ｜ 本店提供全套且完整的定制服务，欢迎各位顾客携带订金、需求文件以及相关证明前来洽谈。
- He also helped us deal with the police on the serial burglary case previously. ｜ 在之前处理连环盗窃案时，他也在奉行所那边帮了我们一些忙。
- But I'd like to go over everything that happened again. Do you recall anything she said at the time? ｜ 我想重新梳理一下整个过程，你们还记得当时她说过什么吗？
- Suddenly, Freminet pulls out a diving helmet and puts it on his head... ｜ 突然，菲米尼拿出了一个潜水头盔带上了。
- ...Fine. Although you haven't completely proven your innocence, I won't regard you as an enemy for now. ｜ …好吧。我暂时不会把你当作敌人，但你的嫌疑并未洗清。
- Now then, let's test your skills, shall we? ｜ 那么，就用一旁的这个挑战，小试身手吧。

- Restores 20% of Max HP and an additional 900 HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的20%，并额外恢复900点生命值。
- Now, with that out of the way, let the game development begin! The forty-eight hour countdown... begins now. ｜ 好了，我宣布，从现在起，「四十八小时限时游艺创作」…正式开始！
- You better believe it. I wouldn't be here if I didn't think I could walk away as a champion. ｜ 对啊，既然要参赛，目标只有可能是冠军。

- ... ｜ ……
- To find the so-called "source of this world's misfortune" — the dragon responsible for this whole mess. ｜ 去会会把这里搅得一团糟的家伙，人们口中的「罪魁祸首」，这个世界的巨龙。
- Scholar's Ink Cup ｜ 学士的墨杯
- Amber ｜ 安柏
- What!? ｜ 什么？！
- Uh, so, about Neko's meal... ｜ 那个…寝子的饭…
- So, the Phlogiston Engraving here is... ｜ 那这里的「燃素刻录」…

- Or "Triple-Appetite-Paimon"... ｜ 三倍贪吃白精灵…
- You guys came all the way to Liyue to take orders for clients? You guys are so sweet! ｜ 为了帮客人们下单…专门跑到璃月来了？你们真是热心肠！
- Its mechanisms are magical and mysterious, completely unlike the principles that shape our understanding of the physical world. ｜ 它的规则神秘而奇妙，和我们所知的创造物体的原理完全不同。
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- Yep yep! Here we come, treasure! ｜ 嗯！宝藏！
- Huh? But... Chisato and Kamaji have already talked everything through, haven't they? ｜ 唔？但是…千里她不是已经和镰治谈清楚了吗？
- Mary-Ann... Why are you saying that? We can find a way to help you, can't we? ｜ #玛丽安…为什么要说这样的话？不管你有什么样的苦衷，我和{NICKNAME}一定能找到解决的办法的…

- Anyway... um... Someone needs to record down what we've seen, right? If no one records the stuff, no one will remember it, after all! ｜ 毕竟，嗯…还是有人要记录下看到的东西嘛。没有留下记录的话…不就什么记忆都留不下了吗？

- Wh—What's that look for!? ...You're not leaving already are you? C'mon, don't go — I promise they don't taste that bad! And I promise, it's not a prank! ｜ 欸——干嘛，干嘛这个表情？不会是要走吧，别这样，保证不难吃！
- It's okay, you don't have to blame yourself! Let's just go help! ｜ 好啦，你也不必自责啦！我们去帮忙就好！
- Haha, if that's the case, just treat me to a drink sometime. ｜ 哈哈，既然这样，请我喝酒吧。
