- Blazing Threshold|{param1:F1P} ｜ 焰烈之槛伤害|{param1:F1P}
- I've heard that the constant fighting has made life difficult for everyone lately. That's why many have become "Absconders." According to a friend who often hangs out with me, these "Absconders" are brave and incredible people who refuse to go with the flow, though he did ask me not to tell others about him being one. But Uesugi, who always takes care of me, said that while he was {0}, he saw a robber who looked like that friend of mine. Uesugi also said that things like robbery and "Absconding" are bad. I didn't know what else to do other than telling Uncle Madarame. He said that he would find someone righteous and strong who'll take care of those people who made my friend rob and do other bad things, and that this would make my friend good again. I sure hope so — I'd love for him to come back to play with me soon! ｜ 听大家说，因为最近老是打仗，弄得很多人都很难受。所以，也有好多人变成了「逐电」，听经常陪我玩的哥哥说，是很有勇气的、不随波逐流的、厉害的人！虽然他写信说，自己变成了「逐电」的事情不要声张，但经常照顾我的上杉大哥说，有一次他{0}的时候，见到过有点像那个哥哥的人，在那边「打劫」。上杉大哥说，「打劫」、「逐电」都是坏事。我也不知道怎么办，只好跟斑目叔叔说了。斑目叔叔说，他会找好厉害好正直的人去「收拾」带他一起「打劫」、干坏事的坏人，这样他就会变好了。希望大哥哥早点回家陪我玩！
- Burst DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 爆发伤害|{param1:P}
- Then we will smash you into pieces. ｜ 那就把你打碎。
- You've shown me all kinds of new and fascinating things, and really helped me to grow... I have no idea how I could ever repay you, but I want to find the answer by myself. So from now on, please allow me to be the hero... the hero that protects you! ｜ 你带我一起见识了种种新奇的事物，让我成长了很多，我不知道该怎么回报你才好…但这次我想自己找到答案。接下来就让我来当英雄吧，保护你的英雄！
- Stabilize. ｜ 安如磐石。
- New Tricks for this season ｜ 本期新增诀窍
- To be honest, I was really terrified when I learned about Rex Lapis' passing in a letter from Liyue... ｜ 说实话，当时收到来自璃月的家书，得知岩王爷的离去，我真是吓得不轻…
- So... Did you get to meet the Duke in person? Yeah? Any nuggets of information that I should know about? Never mind the Credit Coupons, the Coupon Cafeteria, "If a man will not work, he shall not eat"... That's all just generic filler. I'm talking about personal anecdotes about the man of Meropide himself... What do you mean, "confidentiality"? Aw, not you, too! We had a deal! That does it — remember that gigantic feast I treated you to? I want my money back! Get your butts back to prison and do your time, you swindlers, you! ｜ 最近有见到那位「公爵」吗？有没有帮我留意和他有关的信息呀？特许券、特许食堂…「不劳动者不得食」…这种大路消息就算了，有没有关于「公爵」个人的故事？什么，保密…怎么连你的口风也那么紧！把我的那顿大餐还来！哼，骗子！你干脆回去接着服刑啦！
- ??? ｜ ?????
- I think you're right. ｜ 我猜也是。
- If you'll allow me a bit of your time, let me introduce you to the team. ｜ 请容我浪费一点时间，介绍一下勘探队的成员吧：
- Rush DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 突进伤害|{param1:F1P}
- I never knew making decisions would be this difficult because I've never given them any thought. I think I've lived the life I wanted for as long as I can remember. ｜ 真没想到，做决定居然是这么困难的事，我之前都没怎么考虑过呢。好像打从记事起，就一直过着随心所欲的生活。
- Wait, wait, what's happening? This wasn't what we agreed on! ｜ 什么情况，这是怎么回事！你们从没说过有人会中途闯进来的！
- My name is Chongyun. My family has practiced the art of exorcism in Liyue for many generations. Fate has been generous in allowing my path to cross with that of your distinguished self. ...Oh, no — my services are free of charge! ｜ 我名重云，家族久居璃月，世代以驱邪除魔为业。今日萍水相逢，看来我与阁下有些缘分。唔…不收钱的，不收钱！
- Guardian's Sigil ｜ 守护徽印
- Yes. One was my friend, and the other was my child. ｜ 嗯，那是我的朋友，还有我的孩子。

- A picture of a scene where the "Divine Knowledge Capsule" is being traded.\nIn the picture, there is Mizri, the leader of Ayn Al-Ahmar, and the Divine Knowledge Capsule giving off a red glow in his hand. ｜ 多莉拍摄的「神明罐装知识」交易现场画片。\n从画片中能清晰地看到「阿赫玛尔之眼」的团长密兹里，和他手中那枚散发着耀眼红光的罐装知识。
- I suspect you'll have to ask him about that yourself. Ah, yes, speaking of which, I did see him strolling around the entrance to the Fortress of Meropide a while back. ｜ 这个嘛，可能得直接询问他本人了。啊，说来我之前还见到他在梅洛彼得堡的入口附近散步呢。

- Hmm... Maybe we should ask the nearby guards if they've seen anything? ｜ 唔…是不是应该问问附近的卫兵…
- Mysterious pillars scattered about the Core of Chu'ulel. They appear to be devices used to suppress the spread of Abyssal corrosion.\nAfter radiant fragments are placed within, they will illuminate the area in a certain radius. The Abyssal Blight within the area illuminated by this circle of light will be suppressed and melted away, and monsters that possess <color=#FFE14BFF>Void Wards</color> will be continually damaged. ｜ 分散在统律之心中的神秘柱石，似乎是用于抑制深渊污染扩散的装置。\n置入辉光碎屑后会散发出一定距离的光环。在光环的影响下，深渊秽露会因受到抑制而消融，拥有<color=#FFE14BFF>虚界力护罩</color>的魔物也会持续受到伤害。
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」
- C'mon, we can still negotiate... ｜ …不能再商量商量吗？
- I was just thinking... No. It's nothing. ｜ 我只是在想…不，没什么。
- And once we've met the Archon, we should have a better idea of what to expect during our journey. ｜ 见过神明之后，应该自然而然地就知道我们这段旅途的意义了吧。
- Perform according to the drum score ｜ 依照鼓谱正确演奏
- How could I ever begin to accept this? The truth is so far from what I've always known. Am I really supposed to believe that after all these years... All this time seeking revenge... Suddenly now my enemy is my savior!? ｜ 我又怎么敢相信世上有如此不可理喻的偏差？！你要我如何相信，我向我的恩人举起屠刀，就这样过了那么多年！
- Wait, but wouldn't that mean that she really was bitten in half? ... Huh? What's that noise? ｜ 那不就是说，她真的是被海兽咬成两半的…欸？什么声音？

- Thank you, everyone. ｜ 好，多谢各位。

- Uh... Flora, surely there must have been plenty of customers buying Windwheel Asters from your shop recently? ｜ 芙萝拉，最近来你店里买风车菊的人应该不少吧？
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- Because of the childhood I had, I don't like relying on other people or needing their protection. But when Mavuika is around, even I feel comfortable letting her take the lead. To be clear, that's not because she's the leader and I'm intimidated by her. Quite the opposite. It's because I trust her as a close friend. Following her just feels right... almost instinctive, like moving towards the light when you're surrounded by darkness. ｜ 或许是因为小时候的经历，我一贯不喜欢依赖别人，或者成为被保护的对象。但玛薇卡在场的话，即便是我也会安心地站在她的身后。我并非是被她作为领导者的威严所慑服，恰恰相反，我一直把她当作一位贴心朋友。而跟随她的感觉，更像是一种身处黑暗中追随火光的本能。
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 4 attacks using Wind Spirits, dealing <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina and deals <color=#80FFD7FF>AoE Anemo DMG</color> after a short casting time.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nCalling upon the power of her Wind Spirits, Sucrose plunges towards the ground from mid-air, damaging all opponents in her path. Deals <color=#80FFD7FF>AoE Anemo DMG</color> upon impact with the ground. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多四段的风灵攻击，造成<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，短暂咏唱后，造成<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n凝聚风灵的力量，从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素范围伤害</color>。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Just shut up already, Chevka. ｜ 叶夫卡，你不说话没人把你当哑巴。
- "Please tell me that all of our labors have not been in vain..." ｜ 「请告诉我，这一切的艰辛并非徒劳…」
- One must also have a mature outlook towards problems... ｜ 看待问题要成熟…
- Sorry, there is no such way. ｜ 不好意思，没有门路。
- Top Flying Scores ｜ 最佳飞行成绩记录
- Food ｜ 食物
- Sometimes, rules are more effective. ｜ 「规则」有时会更有效。
- Do I look like someone who uses off-brand baby powder? The Mr. Charming Yevgraf, using "Gerardo"!? Am I a joke to you? ｜ 我像是用杂牌爽身粉的人吗？嗯？连队魅力男士叶夫格拉夫？用「赫拉尔多」？我像是个笑话吗？嗯？
- Ooh, Paimon's kinda dizzy now... ｜ 呜啊，感觉晕乎乎的…
- Hahahahaha! Thoma, my bro, your eyes do not deceive you! ｜ 哈哈哈哈哈——！托马兄弟果然有眼力！
- If she had a bit more patience for paperwork and rules, then perhaps she could have come with us to visit Liyue and learn. ｜ 要是她对书面文件和规律的工作耐心一点，说不定这次也能一起来璃月长长见识。
- Sasano ｜ 笹野
- Coalesced Defenses ｜ 凝血护佑
- In my present form, I can no longer perceive time. I don't know how long we have been separated before this reunion, and I don't know what Inazuma has experienced in the meantime. ｜ 现在的我已经无法感知到时间了。我不知道我们阔别多久才重逢，也不知道在此期间稻妻经历了什么。
- Indeed. You haven't got the faintest hope of winning right now. ｜ 是的，你们现在毫无胜算。
- Hark, the evil dragon speaks! It was simply feigning sleep to lure us into peril! ｜ 恶龙怎会突然开口？原来它不是真睡，只是假眠，好骗我们上钩！
- Okay, well I'll conduct reconnaissance nearby to ensure this area is safe, and see if I can't scavenge any firewood or food while I'm at it. ｜ 那我就近侦察一圈，确保诸位的安全，顺便看看能不能捡到柴火和食材。

- Will... this really work? It might just be Paimon's imagination, but it feels like more components dropped than we collected in the first place... ｜ 这…这个，真的没问题吗？不知道是不是错觉，掉出来的零件好像比我们收集回来的还多…

- You analyzed the clues given in the poem... "Drunkenly I gazed at the ruins long forsaken" may mean to gaze upon a ruin from afar, while the key sections of "and lay beneath red leaves whose branches cast a crooked shade" are "a tree with red leaves" and "shadows." "The dusk sun shone upon the sea as I awakened" on the other hand could refer to time... ｜ 你们分析了诗文中的线索…「醉望墟散人离处」可能有身在远处、遥望此墟的意思… 「侧卧红树复影斜」似乎与「红树」、「影子」有关…「梦至天眠日沉海」则或许代表着时间…

- Ah, it's gone... ｜ 啊，膨膨兽走掉了…
- But, isn't Cochitta one of the warriors who fought the Abyss? Didn't you find her unconscious out on the field? ｜ 咦？可是柯奇妲最终还是去了战场吧，你不是说她当时昏迷在野外…
- Diligent Samurai ｜ 勤奋的武士
- What happened? ｜ 怎么了？
- Hopefully, there won't be any more interruptions. This time, we should be able to meet Greater Lord Rukkhadevata. ｜ 希望不再会有变数了，这次应该能见到大慈树王了吧。
- If we can't see it? ｜ 如果看不到…
- "Lil' Rascal" ｜ 「调皮鬼」
- It's fine, thanks. ｜ 不用了，谢谢。
- But we didn't see anything when we arrived here yesterday... ｜ 可是，昨天在海上航行的时候，我们好像没有看到这个装置…
- Listen to the Bard's performance ｜ 聆听吟游诗人的弹奏
- I'm just not sure if the archon likes this kind of small, cold dishes... ｜ 就是不知道，神明大人喜不喜欢吃这种小凉菜…
- How do we break the seals? ｜ 要怎么解除封印？
- Is something the matter? ｜ 怎么了？
- Ride the hot air balloon to reinforce the hotspot ｜ 乘坐热气球，前往支援地点
- When It Snows ｜ 下雪的时候…

- See you. ｜ 再见。

- 500 Mora per visitor. ｜ 每位来客500摩拉。

- Was... Was it that obvious? ｜ 欸！有…有这么明显吗…
- It's an honor you earned together with your father, and now it's back in your hands... What do you say, Yakov? C'mon, man, wake up already... ｜ 这是你和你父亲一起获得的荣誉，现在已经重新回到你的手中了…怎么样，雅科夫，你醒过来了吗…
- It feels like she's been really busy, but I have no idea what's going on... ｜ 总感觉她最近忙忙碌碌的，但我又不知道她在忙什么…
- Dynamic Skins ｜ 影幻牌面
- ...No, it's fine as-is. I like what we have for the catharsis. ｜ …不，不用改了。我喜欢这个结局。
- #So, {NICKNAME}, how may I help you today? ｜ #那么，{NICKNAME}，今天找我有什么事吗？
- Hey! Paimon's defeat is your defeat! They're the same thing! Arakunti's words can't be counted on... So how are we supposed to find those three locations? ｜ #派蒙大失败和{NICKNAME}大失败是一回事啦！兰贡迪的话根本没法参考嘛…我们该怎么找到那三个地方呢…
- She asked for a smile as her payment. ｜ 嗯，酬劳是一个笑脸。
- I understand my situation better than anyone, you don't need to try to comfort me. ｜ 我自己清楚自己的情况，不用特意安慰我…
- Some moved north, others went south, and no one's come back yet... It's so quiet now. ｜ 大家有的往北走了，有的往南走了，现在还没有回来…岛上少了好多人，冷清了好多。
- As I was looking for Onikabuto in the forest, I saw a child playing all on his own... and he was headed straight for a camp of monsters. ｜ 在找「鬼兜虫」的时候，我发现一个孩子在林子里乱跑，眼看着就要撞进魔物群里了。

- #Hey, not you too, {NICKNAME}! All this Paimon-ditching is super not appreciated! ｜ 喂…别在这种地方学那么快啊！

- Stardust Exchange ｜ 星尘兑换
- About Xilonen ｜ 关于希诺宁…
- My teacher told me that nature possesses a certain power that grants people an equal amount of kindness and fairness, regardless of the different talents they may possess. ｜ 后来我的启蒙老师告诉我，自然有一种包容的力量，能够给予不同天赋的人同等的温柔与公平。
- A resilient flower that survived the harsh environment of an ancient city. It is now proudly worn like a medal. ｜ 从深邃的古都寻得的绝境求生的小花，被当做骄傲的勋章佩在胸前。
- Energy Cost|{param7:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param7:I}

- Now we can finally dedicate some time to preparing our theses. ｜ 这下我们终于可以腾出手来，为我们的论文做一些准备工作了。
- But still, what do you think? Sounds like some pretty amazing research, doesn't it? ｜ 不过，怎么样，听上去是很了不起的研究吧。
- Devourer of All Sins ｜ 圣裁影羽
- (Quiet, you!) ｜ （你小点声！）
- In order to develop a treatment as fast as possible, Guthred used himself as a test subject. He passed away shortly after the draught was complete. ｜ 为了在短时间内研发出治愈精神创伤的药物，古瑟雷德不惜用自己来做实验，在清幻剂研制成功不久后就去世了。
- Diluc... ｜ 迪卢克…
- Oh, come now, dear comrade. We're not doing anything illegal. ｜ 老天…我亲爱的朋友，我们又不是在做什么违法的事。
- What else could it have been? They were all such good friends before, and they used to care about me, too... ｜ 不然呢？他们以前明明是很好的朋友，也很喜欢我…

- But is growing taller really related to how long you sleep? ｜ 但长个子和睡眠时间长短有直接关系吗？
- Eide ｜ 埃德
- Bane of the Soft ｜ 克柔
- When intangible spirits attach themselves to objects, they merge and transform into various forms through a process known as spiritual fusion. Once this has taken place, these spirits are capable of conveying dreamlike visions to humans in a state of trance.\nIt fell upon those who frequently engaged in such dialogues with the spirits to interpret these vision-like dreams, translating omens from beneath the earth into language that could be understood by the tribe, or transforming their warnings into stories. It is said that this is the origin of the tribal storytellers, and also why most outstanding storytellers hail from the Night-Wind. ｜ 没有固型的灵性依附于物件之上，结合转化为种种不同的面目，这一过程被称为神合，此后，神合后的灵性会在人的恍惚中，向其传达如梦般的图景。\n经常与灵进行这般对话的人需要理解那些图景之中的意义，如解梦般将大地之下的征兆化作部族民众所能理解的语言，或将警示转化为故事。据说这就是部族内被称为「叙事人」的职位的由来，也是大多数杰出的「叙事人」都来自谜烟之内的原因。
- That's about all I know. If you would like to know more, you could talk to the manager. ｜ 更多的情况我也了解的不多，你可以找我们经理聊聊。
- ...Taisuke... ｜ 我说你啊…

- It didn't "turn into" a monster... ｜ 并不是「变成」…
- Certified player Wagner. His skills at cards are as rock-steady as his skills at the forge. One mistake against him will almost certainly result in failure. ｜ 协会认证牌手瓦格纳。他的牌技就和他锻造时的锤法一样扎实，跟他对局时，只是一时轻忽或许就会招致失败。
- You can use your real name too, if you want. I do that whenever I get too lazy to think of a new name. ｜ 如果想用自己的原名也行，我懒得想新名字的时候就会这样。
- Storm Cage ｜ 雷云之笼
- It's not good to be overly obsessed with dreams. All it'll do is fill up your mind and eat away at your thoughts. ｜ 过于沉溺在梦境里并不是什么好事，只是会不断地消耗你的心神而已。
- No. Perhaps we should go to Lady Ningguang first and bring up our overtime pay again. ｜ 不，又或者，是不是应该先去跟凝光大人再提一提加班补贴的事…

- You're sure I can't persuade you? ｜ 走了吗…再考虑考虑吧？

- Interact with a mysterious wooden board in a specific place to visit the Realms of Guile and War and take part in the combat challenge. ｜ 与指定位置的神秘木板交互后，就能造访「谲域战境」，进行战斗挑战。
- Breaking through the storms in the seas surrounding Inazuma, the Alcor finally reaches port. A series of lovely islands lie before you as you descend the gangplank, and immediately, you are met by a young man who seems to have been awaiting you for a long time. ｜ 冲破稻妻外海的雷暴，「死兆星」号最终抵达了口岸。数片美丽的岛屿呈现在你们面前。当你们走下甲板，一位似乎已等待多时的青年立刻迎了上来。
- Ah, I've missed that way with words. So affectionate... ｜ 就是这个语气，很亲切。
- Score {param2} in Protracted Battle ｜ 在「持久争锋」挑战中达到{param2}积分
- It could spin, leap high into the air, and even shoot fireballs. Although no match for a god, it was stronger than even many who wield Visions. ｜ 它会旋转，跳得很高，还会发射火球。力量虽不比魔神，但比很多持有「神之眼」的人都强。
- No, she didn't want to talk about that, and I didn't ask. I get the feeling that it'll bring up some unhappy memories. ｜ 没有，她不愿意说，我也没问。问了只会让她再回忆一次不开心的事吧。
- I'd devote myself fully to passing on everything I know. All the tricks of the trade of the Fanmu Carpenter shall be yours to take if you want them. ｜ 届时老夫一定倾尽全力把「范木堂」的手艺传授给你。
- It depends on the ore. Some ores have astounding memories. Others, like Iron Ore and White Iron Ore aren't up to much. Their memories are hazy. ｜ 还得看具体的石块。不同矿石记忆能力有所不同，铁矿、白铁块之类的常见矿石基本派不上用场，记忆很模糊。
- And you don't have to be so reckless, I know where the key is! ｜ 你们别胡闹了，我知道钥匙在哪里！
- Normal Attack DMG is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color> and Elemental Skill DMG is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color>. After a nearby active character deals Geo DMG, the aforementioned effects increase by 100% for 15s. Additionally, the wielder's DEF is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>. ｜ 普通攻击造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>，元素战技造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color>；队伍中附近的角色在场上造成岩元素伤害后，上述效果进一步提升100%，持续15秒。此外，装备者的防御力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>。
- Well, I'm counting on you then, Traveler. Go to the roof and clean it up, and if you get any fortune slips, please bring them to me. ｜ 那这件事就拜托你了，旅行者，请去屋顶收拾一下吧，如果拿到签的话，请拿来给我。
- (Ei's presence definitely caused a stir, but it didn't take long for the festive atmosphere to return...) ｜ （影的出现虽然引起了小小的风浪，但大家很快就重新融入了祭典的氛围…）
- That jerk who was picking on Seymour? What would he want with this stuff...? ｜ 是那个欺负西摩尔的坏人？他要这些东西干什么…

- Hey, young man, please wait... *sigh*... ｜ 年轻人，有话好说——哎！
- ... ｜ ……
- And the Golden Slumber... ｜ 还有黄金的梦乡…
- After all, we'd have gone bust a long time ago if we couldn't handle ourselves in a little tussle or two. ｜ 连一点小麻烦都摆不平的话，我们的报纸早就办不下去了，呵呵。
- Defeat an Experimental Field Generator in Co-Op Mode. ｜ 与其他玩家一同战胜实验性场力发生装置。
- Pff, that wasn't hard at all. Even Paimon guessed that! Everything about you is different. We just didn't wanna expose you is all. ｜ 一点也不难，连我都猜得到，毕竟你有那么多特殊之处嘛，只是我和旅行者没有戳穿你而已。
- It's fine. You're more than welcome to chat with me. ｜ 没关系，欢迎找我闲聊。
- "...The anomalous shifts in The Chasm's underground have been gradually increasing in speed. We have to bring the Mokosh Device to the bottom for assembly as soon as possible..." ｜ 「…层岩巨渊地下的异变在缓慢加速，为了阻止情况进一步恶化，我们需要尽快将『摩科什装置』运抵底部组装…」
- Yes. How many would you like? ｜ 是的，要几个？
- Open the chest in the middle of the heart-shaped rock formation. ｜ 开启爱心形石阵中央的宝箱。
- I heard that you solved the Avidya Forest's Ley Line effluence problem with him not long ago. Since this round involves resolving a machine-simulated Ley Line disruption, it should be a simple matter for him... ｜ 我听说前不久你们一起解决了道成林的地脉泄漏问题，这次也是机器模拟的地脉紊乱，对他来说完全是轻车熟路…
- Rosaria ｜ 罗莎莉亚
- Yes, but remember, this has nothing to do with me! This is all Master Kamuna's idea! Train hard and don't disappoint him! ｜ 「得了得了，我可没做什么！这都是「惟神大人」的巧思，你们可不能辜负惟神大人的期待！」
- Woah, that's a lot of pages! It's gonna take forever to get through it all! ｜ 居然有这么多！要完整看完要花多长时间呀！
- We haven't explained the invitation to them yet... ｜ 还没跟他们解释邀请的事…
- No, there's nothing funny about that... and you know what? It's not a bad thing to care when other people are looking. ｜ 没什么可笑的，而且你知道吗？在意别人的眼光也不是什么坏事。
- Proof by Exhaustion ｜ 穷举法则
- The Verdant Takeover ｜ 草覆地法
- What a proud answer! Just like one of my characters! ｜ 喔！你这个回答很有傲气啊，很不错，正好能和我小说里的一个人对上！
- Oh no, been caught... Must... Dig faster! ｜ 被抓住了…要…钻得更快！
- To be honest, it's a bit hard for me to tell. ｜ 唔…就我来说的话，实在是无法分辨。
- After finally persuading Qianwei and Mingbo to leave... ｜ 花了不少时间才劝走了乾玮和明博…
- Either they get "concealed" by their tribes, or they make their way to the volcano. The few that survive are only mentioned in legends... ｜ 这些龙或者被部族自己「藏」了起来，或者走入了火山，只有传说中的寥寥几只存活了下来…

- A wizened, mumbling hilichurl, one that calls upon the bite of Cryo.\nHilichurls especially gifted in commanding the elements who often reach the zenith of their skill in their twilight years. These shamans remember the frosty chants and are even more skilled in the art of using them to entrap their foes. ｜ 嘟嘟囔囔的老年丘丘人，冰元素的呼求者。\n在元素掌控方面颇富天资的丘丘人，其能力往往会在年老时达到顶峰。这些萨满熟忆寒霜的低语，更精通将之用于制敌的技艺。
- ... ｜ ……
- "First, pick the right pool, and watch the water temperature, or you might get scalded. Travelers from abroad should get acclimated to an artificial pool first before trying any natural ones!" ｜ 「首先，就是要选对池子，注意水温，不然有可能被烫伤哦！外地来的游客请先在人工温泉适应一下，再去天然温泉享受！」
- Banish... the great enemy cloaked in shadow. Ignite... the frigid embers... ｜ 除却…阴影之大敌，点燃…将熄的冷灰…

- "But the General's a good guy, he protects us!" ｜ 「将军才不是坏人，他保护了我们！」
- It really is getting dangerous out here. Looks like sticking with a group of warriors is the only way to stay safe... ｜ 看来现在也不能到处乱跑，要和战士小队一起行动才更安全…
- And you're one to talk! Coming here on the sly and ransacking someone's house when they're not in — you've got some cheek to call others out! ｜ 你这家伙，趁玛梅赫不在跑到这里来，把别人家翻得一团糟，还好意思说我们偷听吗？！

- They just don't give up, do they... ｜ 这是什么百折不挠的精神…
- Have you found me some sunsettias yet? ｜ 你找到日落果了吗？

- The night-wind... ｜ 迷烟…

- Oh, right. Here's the payment I promised you. Make sure to tally it up. ｜ 喏，这是说好的报酬，好好数一数吧。

- Played by Buraud ｜ 比罗饰

- A special plant that resides in the shallow depths beneath the soil's surface. Should anyone or any creature pass by, it will explode upward. To a Pari, its size is like that of a mountain boulder...\nAfter this Curio is struck by a Nirodha Fruit, it will explode, sending nearby opponents flying and fleeing thereafter. At the same time, it can also cause Elemental Reactions with certain other Curios... ｜ 浅浅埋藏在地表的特殊植物，人和动物经过时，就会腾空爆炸。对于花灵而言，尺寸就像是山间的巨石…\n被「苦离果」命中后将爆炸，击飞周围的敌人，将其惊吓后驱逐。同时也能与部分「巧物」发生元素反应…

- Miss Lisa, how's everyone doing? Well, I hope? What about Amber? And Jean? Oh, and Kaeya... ｜ 丽莎小姐，大家怎么样？都还好吗？安柏好吗？琴小姐好吗？凯亚先生…
- Where should the first hammerstroke fall?\nAs Xilonen gripped the haft, preparing to get started on the first Ancient Name she had ever forged, she hesitated, unsure of how to strike.\nShe had done plenty of research and prepared everything that was required. Just a few days before, she had followed a mining team from the tribe into the mountains to find ore of the very finest quality. She had also asked her dad to modify the furnace so it could hold even more phlogiston, igniting a fiercer and hotter flame that would be intense enough to melt any ore. She had specially re-engraved all of the phlogiston engraving diagrams in the workshop, ensuring that every spark that flew during the forging process was under her complete control.\nAlright, Xilonen, everything's ready. Strike while the phlogiston's hot, huh? So... Where should the first strike fall? What pattern should I forge? How many strikes will it take?\nSilence filled the workshop, and even the flames dared not crackle, lest they disturb the craftswoman at work.\nPlacing her hammer aside, Xilonen picked up a comb fashioned from the tooth of a wild beast in its stead. This comb had been polished sleek and smooth, investing the intense fire that reflected off its surface with a mild, gentler warmth.\nIts previous owner was a kindly old woman. Whenever Xilonen used to slack off, she would offer to comb her hair as a way of coaxing her back to study.\nThe old woman would also braid her hair into beautiful, intricate plaits — so complex, in fact, that even Xilonen's mother could not work out how to recreate them, and eventually had to ask for her help. After all, above all others, those were the plaits that Xilonen loved.\nThe story of Teyiz the Name Engraver resurfaced in Xilonen's mind. That was a story she had hunted down and gathered herself; and now, she would be the one to forge it into a Name.\nA hammer blow shattered the silence. Each strike was precise and powerful, and no detail of the story was left untold. Even the most fleeting nuances now rose up before her, ready to be wrought by her hammer.\nAs the final drops of phlogiston were consumed and the furnace began to fade, before her she beheld a brand-new Ancient Name.\nTeyiz's story had been imprinted into this Name, never to be distorted again.\nAs for whom the Wayob would bestow it upon... Well, that was the Wayob's concern, not hers.\nXilonen stood up, dusted off her clothes, and began to tidy up her workshop. She bent down to toss away a few unused pieces of ore into a basket — they were all of excellent quality, and could certainly be re-used for something else.\n"Hmm, wonder what I should eat later? Didn't Mom say we'd be having fish for dinner...?"\nOne, two, three... the lumps of ore clinked as they landed in her basket.\nAbsorbed entirely by her dinner plans, Xilonen didn't notice that there was something quite special about the fourth, amber-colored "ore" in her hand.\nWith another soft clink, the Vision landed in her basket too, which Xilonen then carried out of the workshop and casually left outside.\nHumming a song, Xilonen went off to eat her dinner. It was only during her next forging session that she would finally notice this special "ore" of hers.\nIt was a gift; but also, a responsibility. ｜ 究竟该怎么落下第一锤呢？\n当希诺宁第一次打造「古名」时，她握住锻锤的手迟迟不知道如何落下。\n希诺宁读了很多资料，为打造「古名」做好了所有准备。她前几天刚跟随部族的探矿队进山，找到了品质最好的矿石，又拜托自己老爸改造了锻炉，让它可以容纳更多的燃素，燃起更猛烈，更炽热的烈火，这股火足够融化任何矿石。又重新刻录了工坊里的所有燃素刻录图，在整个锻造过程里，这座工坊里溅出的每一个火星，都会在她的掌控下。\n好了，希诺宁，一切准备齐全，现在该落锤了。第一锤要砸在哪里？要锻造出什么纹样？要捶打多少次？\n寂静占据了工坊，炉火也不敢噼啪作响，生怕打扰了这位工匠。\n希诺宁放下锻锤，反而握住了一枚用野兽牙齿打造的梳子，这枚梳子被摩挲地光滑温润，炽烈的炉火映射在上面，看起来都变得温和了许多。\n它的上一任主人是一位慈祥的老婆婆，每次希诺宁想偷懒的时候，她都会以帮希诺宁梳头为代价，哄她回去继续读书。\n她还会帮希诺宁编很漂亮的辫子，那辫子很复杂，连老妈都研究了好久，最后还是去请教婆婆编法——毕竟希诺宁就喜欢这种辫子。\n铸名师泰伊吉婆婆的故事在希诺宁心里浮现，这是她亲手搜集的故事，现在她要亲手把它铸造成名。\n锻锤落下的震鸣驱散了寂静，希诺宁落锤时既精准，又有力，不放过故事的任何一丝细缕，即使他们是虚无缥缈的风，此时也会被拘束在希诺宁面前，任她锻打成材。\n在最后一丝燃素消耗殆尽后，炉火熄灭，一枚全新的「古名」已经成型。\n泰伊吉婆婆的故事已经被铸打入名，再不会有歪曲讹变。\n至于它究竟会被大灵授予谁…就让大灵去烦恼吧。\n希诺宁站起来拍了拍衣服，开始收拾起了工坊，又弯下腰，把一些没用上的矿石丢进了篮子里，这都是品质上乘的好货，打造其他的东西肯定也用得上。\n「唔，等会吃什么呢？老妈是不是说，今天晚上要给我做鱼吃来着…？」\n一枚，两枚，三枚…矿石挨个入篮。\n注意力完全挪到了晚饭菜色上的希诺宁并没有发现，她手里的第四枚澄黄色「矿石」，似乎有些别致。\n叮当一声，「神之眼」也乖乖地躺进了矿石篮里，被希诺宁提出了工坊，随意放在了屋外。\n希诺宁哼着歌去吃饭了，在下一次进行锻造工作时，她会发现这枚特殊的「矿石」。\n这是礼物，亦是责任。

- "The ocean where tears converge shall never dry, but shall rise to the sky and fall as rain once more." ｜ 「泪水汇聚的海洋不会干涸，升上天空又化雨落下。」
- Twisted fungal beasts, exceptionally abominable thanks to the relentless environment of the Withering Zone. It is only through defeating them that the threat of The Withering can be completely eliminated! ｜ 因死域冷酷环境而变得格外强大的蕈兽出现在了你们面前，只有击败它才能彻底消除死域的威胁
- The golden cup a champion gladiator drank from in ancient times. It brimmed with his glory for years until the fateful day of his fall. ｜ 古代的角斗士痛饮胜利之酒的金杯。直到他倒下的那一刻，酒杯被他自己的岁月灌满。
- Emperor of Fire and Iron ｜ 铁甲熔火帝皇
- We've had a pretty hard time, you know. ｜ 我也很辛苦。
- Where is this? ｜ 这里是？
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4级后解锁
- I'm Muzhen, Chief Technical Officer of the Alcor. I spend most of my time below deck, so it's no surprise that you're not familiar with me. ｜ 我是「死兆星号」的首席技术官慕珍。以往一直呆在船舱里不怎么出来，你不认识我也正常。
- Xamaran ｜ 赞玛兰
- Hmm, guess this means that the shrooms can help us keep watch while we're asleep. They're pretty reliable, huh? ｜ 这样说来，就算我们睡着了，蕈兽伙伴们也可以帮我们放风，真可靠！
- Go to Lepaute Horlogerie ｜ 前往勒波特钟表店
- Botanist ｜ 植物学家
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Those that come from nature will, for some reason, go against nature — against the laws nature originally followed. ｜ 那些从自然中来的，会为了各种各样的原因，违背自然，违背自然最初遵循的道理。
- Wow, I'm surprised you have the nerve to bring that up again. ｜ 没想到，你还好意思再提起这个话题。
- Um, it's... Some merchants showed up, not from our tribe. They said they're here to discuss some potential collaboration with us. ｜ 唔…是部族外的一支商队，说要来跟我们谈一项合作。
- "Words of the tongue"...? ｜ 口舌之语…？
- Alright, let the duel begin! ｜ 嗯，现在就，开始「决斗」吧！
- Adjust Height ｜ 调节高度
- Tirzad's words are not without merit... ｜ 提尔扎德的话也不是没有道理…
- But, y'know, I'd have to make you pay a contribution... Let's call it <color=#00E1FFFF>100 Mora</color>? ｜ 不过费用嘛。嘿嘿，您多少得付点…就<color=#00E1FFFF>100摩拉</color>，您看怎么样。
- Talk to Jiangxue ｜ 与江雪对话
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- #{NICKNAME}, we have a discussion to finish. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我们回去继续谈。
- Tired Villager ｜ 疲惫的村民
- Thank you so much. Since you're willing to help, I have something I'd like to show you. ｜ 谢谢你们的好意。既然这样的话，我想给你们看一个东西。
- Decreases <color=#B09057FF>Rippling Reflection's</color> Attack Level by <color=#B09057FF>{0}</color>. The <color=#B09057FF>ATK</color> value after this decreased will not be lower than this Mechanicus type's initial <color=#B09057FF>ATK</color>. ｜ <color=#B09057FF>「奇术机关·镜水自波」</color>的攻击等级降低<color=#B09057FF>{0}</color>级。降低后的<color=#B09057FF>攻击力</color>不会低于初始<color=#B09057FF>攻击力</color>。
- The real highlight? ｜ 重头戏？
- Oh no, you caught me. ｜ 哎呀，被你抓住了。
- Hahahaha, kucha gusha unu gusha. Unu kucha si! ｜ Hahahaha, kucha gusha unu gusha. Unu kucha si!
- I'm just finishing packing up. As soon as I'm done, I've got an interview with the Steambird to get to. ｜ 我收拾一下就要离开，等下还有「蒸汽鸟报」的采访。
- It'll be a journey into the unknown... Ah, I can't wait! ｜ 好期待呀…未知的旅行，真想早点出发！
- Ogura Textiles & Kimonos Bulletin Board ｜ 小仓屋告示板
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- He'll burn himself out in the flames of anger... ｜ 他会在愤怒中把自己燃尽…
- And how did you end up in this sorry state? ｜ 你是怎么沦落至此的？
- Good Hunter has a delivery service in order to fulfill customers' requests, but due to its popularity, the service is heavily understaffed. Sara is looking for someone to lend a hand. ｜ 为了满足顾客的需要，猎鹿人餐馆持续提供着送餐服务。但是因为顾客众多，餐馆里的人手严重不足，莎拉小姐想要找一个人来帮忙送餐。
- Looking back, I should have quit way earlier and let that old fool Bossuet write his own boring papers... It's the only thing he's good for anyway. ｜ 现在回头来看，我应该再早一些中断研究工作，让博絮埃这个傻瓜老头自己去写那些干巴巴的论文…反正他也只会做这件事了。
- "Look closer! This is from the Adventurers' Guilt, not Adventurers' Guild." ｜ 「大家看清楚，这个不是冒险家协会。」
- I've investigated the area nearby, and I've discovered some unusual signs. ｜ 我调查了附近的雪地，发现有不同寻常的痕迹。
- Aimed Shot|{param5:F1P} ｜ 瞄准射击|{param5:F1P}
- How do you do... ｜ 你好…
- Mercenary's Aged Notes (IV) ｜ 古旧的佣兵笔记·其四
- Arrested Development ｜ 逮捕归案
- (You notice that the bottom of the title page has an emblem belonging to the Akademiya Library... Perhaps this book is among those that have been smuggled.) ｜ （你注意到扉页的页脚有教令院图书馆的徽记…想必这也是被走私的实体书籍之一。）
- And there she goes... ｜ 呃，自顾自地走掉了。
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- Cunning enemies may change their offensive strategy at any time in a devious attempt to disrupt our defensive rhythm. In such situations, we may be able to draw upon the power of Anemo and Geo to quickly stabilize our position... ｜ 狡猾的敌人会随时改变自己的进攻策略，以求扰乱我们的节奏，在这种情况下，使用风元素和岩元素的力量，或许能帮我们迅速稳定住阵脚…
- Huh. Just like in the book Canotila found. ｜ 和夏诺蒂拉找到的那本书一样…
- The fog is lifting, and you are getting closer to the truth... ｜ 勘破迷雾，你们终于抵近真相…
- Bifrons ｜ 比夫茏
- Oh, don't you worry about it. It's only a small matter. Just come and see me after you find those planks. ｜ 哈哈哈，没什么没什么，一点小问题而已，你就别担心了。找到木板之后，就拿回来给我吧。
- Whoa, look! Promo posters everywhere, from the moment you arrive in the harbor! ｜ 哇，居然从码头开始就有这么多宣传画！
- Current Record: Act {0} ｜ 本次记录：第{0}幕
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Furnishings ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设购买获取
- Why was his mentor angry? ｜ 导师为什么对他发怒？
- Ally at Low HP: II ｜ 同伴生命值低·其二
- Not only that, but recently the items we get in are hardly worth anything. Nobody wants to buy them. ｜ 而且还尽是一些不怎么值钱的东西，根本没有客人愿意买。
- Clear the spores that cover the stones ｜ 清除覆盖石头的孢子
- Paimon thinks that being a shrine maiden would be best for you. ｜ 我觉得，柳达希卡小姐还是做巫女比较好。
- Unlocks the associated character ｜ 角色解锁
- Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Forbidden Creation - Isomer 75 / Type II</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>禁·风灵作成·柒伍同构贰型</color>的技能等级提高3级。\n至多提升至15级。
- It's puzzling, isn't it? It seems like he's made... uh... various modifications to this place. ｜ 很令人费解对吧？看得出来他对这里进行了，呃，各种方面的改造。
- We're back... If we can completely seal the core, even the Abyss Order will have a hard time wrecking it again. ｜ 又回来了…这次如果能彻底封印炉心的话，就算是深渊教团，也没那么容易再搞破坏了吧。
- You're back, esteemed ones! How was the racing challenge? ｜ 两位前辈，你们回来了！竞速挑战的体验怎么样呀？
- Affluence Talisman ｜ 逢福玉符
- Huh? That looks like Dragonspine. A Statue of The Seven surrounded by snow... such a striking image. ｜ 咦？这是雪山吧，这尊雪中的七天神像还挺有…意境的。
- Read the second letter. ｜ 阅读第二封来信。
- All party members gain a Cryo DMG Bonus. ｜ ·队伍中所有角色获得冰元素伤害加成。
- "Often contradicting"... "Born in an instant, your company in eternal rest, never separated"... "The tainted fruits of sin"... ｜ 「常与相违」…「生于一瞬，伴你长眠，从不分离」…「有染罪果」…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2级后解锁

- Donna said it sounded terrible compared to Master Diluc's playing, though. ｜ 不过唐娜小姐说他弹得很差劲，呼呼，比不上迪卢克老爷。
- Mallko ｜ 穆尔科
- Go ｜ 前往区域

- Food ｜ 食物
- Yanfei's specialty. The dish is essentially Crab Roe Tofu done to an incredible degree of regularity. Its dimensions and flavor are all faithfully rendered according to the "Crab Roe Tofu Laws" in the recipe, with not a single letter omitted. ｜ 烟绯的特色料理。被处理得异常规整的蟹黄豆腐。无论是规格还是味道，都严格遵循着食谱所定下的「蟹黄豆腐律法」，不逾出方圆半分。
- Sorry, sorry... *sigh* Look, this was the best I could do. It was hard enough to find a relatively safe spot as it is, and I don't have what it takes to give Alem a convincing demonstration... ｜ 抱歉，抱歉…唉，这也是没办法的事啊。我好不容易才找到了这么一个相对安全的场地，但以我的实力，又没法做出漂亮的示范说服阿蕾梅…
- The treasure of Mondstadt and the power of the Anemo Archon will not simply be handed over quietly.\nDefeat the guards inside and take back the Holy Lyre der Himmel. ｜ 蒙德的至宝、风神的力量可不能就这么拱手相让。\n打倒其中的守兵，夺回天空之琴吧。
- Rescue the person surrounded by monsters ｜ 解救被魔物围困的人
- As an enlightened dragon, one cannot tolerate such deranged words. ｜ 小人这样大放厥词，善龙可没法置之不理。
- Whoa, so you mean... ｜ 也就是说…
- It's a warm place that makes people at ease... ｜ 是那个很温暖、很让人安心的地方…
- Quilla herself proved useless in a fight, and thus fled after Furball lost the will to fight.\n"You damned rule breaker! You... You won't win that easily next time! Just you wait and see!"\nAfter reciting the trite lines that petty villains such as herself are wont to say, she ran away with the injured Furball. ｜ 葵莉娅本人似乎并没有任何战斗能力，在毛球丧失战意后，她也不得不退场。\n「可恶的规则破坏者，下次…下次我不会让你赢得这么轻松！给我洗干净脖子等着吧！」\n说完廉价反派退场时一定要说的台词后，带着负伤的毛球逃跑了。
- Person Chatting in the Street ｜ 街头闲聊的人
- Melt Reactions Triggered: #1#/%1% ｜ 触发#1#/%1%次融化反应
- Thank you. You know, since the man I love left to join the war, I've not heard one shred of news... ｜ 谢谢你。自从我的恋人去了遥远的战场…之后就音信全无。
- Yes, Ma'am. ｜ 遵命。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Talk to Lizzie ｜ 与莉兹对话
- Piercing Waterdrop ｜ 浮泡破袭
- C'mon, there was really nothing to worry about. The book you wrote has taught me to run away if I'm no match for the bad guys. So I did. ｜ 才这点程度，没什么好怕的啦。你写的书里教过：打不过立刻就跑。我早就躲到一边去了。
- Very well. Here is the fee for your samples, with a service fee added in. I will inform you when a supplier has been selected. ｜ 好的，我收下了，这是付您的样品加服务费，投标结果回去等通知吧。
- The Millennial Mountains ｜ 千年千岩
- I'll admit, I didn't take you for the actively hospitable sort. ｜ 看不出你还是挺热情好客的嘛。
- Tests? ｜ 测试？
- Well, now that we've won, let's go and see Beidou. She'll probably have something to say to us. ｜ 好了，既然赢了，去找北斗吧，她好像有话要说。
- Any adverse side effects? ｜ 该不会有什么副作用吧？
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- B—But very fun. White everywhere. ｜ 不过，好好玩。白色的到处都是。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Large Birch Wardrobe.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「高大的桦木衣柜」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Stoneworks Crane: Mountain Mover.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「岩厂吊车-『移山』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- A modest four-legged wooden platform, entirely constructed from high-quality "Ashen Aratiku Wood," found in the Flower-Feather Clan. It is no exaggeration to say that nearly the entire tribe is built on a complex network of platforms and walkways. If balloons are seen as the wings that lift the Flower-Feather Clan into the skies, then these wooden platforms might be considered the "giant claws" that anchor the tribe to the mountains. ｜ 其貌不扬的四足木质平台，通体均由优质的「灰灰楼林木」材料搭建而成，可以在「花羽会」内见到。毫不夸张地说，「花羽会」整个部族的建筑几乎都是建造在各式各样的栈道与平台之上。因此，如果将气球视为「花羽会」飞向天空的绒翼，或许这些木质的平台，就是「花羽会」立于高山上的巨爪。
- I feel kinda woozy. ｜ 头晕乎乎的。
- "Children" ｜ 「孩子们」
- Golden Fried Chicken ｜ 大黄金吮指鸡
- *sigh* We've also been anchored here for quite a while due to her orders, which has led to quite a few delays. ｜ 唉…而且，因为北斗姐下了命令，我们这艘船也一直停在这，有好多事都耽搁了。
- Timber from the Amur Maple. Excellent quality wood with a fine color and texture.\nCan be used to create furnishings. ｜ 产自「羽扇枫」的木材，硬度适中，品质优异，色泽与纹理上佳。\n可用于制作摆设。
- I do not know how much good we're doing, but I say that in such times, we should all do what we can. ｜ 虽然不知道这样效果如何，但总之，在这种风波里，能尽一份力就尽一份力吧。

- Pirate's Diary ｜ 海贼的日志

- You mean you're gonna ask for our help again at a later stage? ｜ 之后还要帮忙喔！
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Who are you? ｜ 你是？
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- Ah, Paimon kinda gets it now! Sorush's worried that if we praise Mihir, we won't do the same for her afterward, so she wants to do something even greater... ｜ 我好像有点懂了！斯露莎一定是担心我们去夸米希尔之后就不会夸她了，所以她要做出比米希尔更伟大的事…
- Failed to save. Please remove the furnishing from the Custom set first. ｜ 保存失败，请先将摆设从自定义套装中移除
- So this is the Bulky Iron Chunk. ｜ 原来这个就是「大方方铁块」啊…
- We haven't received any letters from our son in a long time after he went off to join the army. So my husband decided to leave the village to ask around concerning his well-being... ｜ 只不过儿子去当兵了。然后因为许久没有收到他的信，我的老伴就也离开村子，去打听他的消息…
- Broken Rime's Echo ｜ 破冰踏雪的回音
- What this inside it? Looks like some kind of photo, and it's got Snezhnayans in it, too... ｜ 怀表里面的是什么呀，好像是什么合照，合照里的人看上去像是至冬国的呢…
- Tenshukaku Guard ｜ 天守阁守卫
- Head towards the Kingdom of Water Imps ｜ 向水妖王国的方向进发
- Yeah! She always seems so confident. Plus, she told us you can only become the Archon by proving your strength. ｜ 确实，她之前挺自信的，说当火神的前提就是要用力量决出胜负。
- 11:00 – 14:00 ｜ 11至14点
- Following Paimon's sage advice: "Chests of hidden Mora — gotta find 'em all!," you and Paimon decide to visit Idyia again, just to make sure you didn't miss any points of interest within Veluriyam Mirage. This turns out to be perfect timing, as Idyia has prepared something unique... ｜ 遵循着派蒙的建议——「藏着摩拉的宝箱，一个都不能错过！」，你与派蒙打算再次造访伊迪娅，确认你们是否错过了「琉形蜃境」中某些有趣的地点。正巧，伊迪娅也筹备了一个独特的游乐项目…
- That's great news! Let's go and see her. ｜ 真的吗！那可真是好消息，让我们去看看她吧。
- Keep following the Hydro Eidolon ｜ 继续跟随水形幻灵
- Good luck! Oh, I meant for myself... ｜ 加油！啊，我是说我自己…
- Eh? Did I do something like that? I don't remember. ｜ 欸？躲在石头里？我不记得自己做过那种事情呀？
- Lucky Dog's Hourglass ｜ 幸运儿沙漏
- Today's story ends here. Please do come again! ｜ 今天的故事就到这里，欢迎各位下次再来！
- I see. I see... Let us battle once more. This time, I'll see through all of your methods. ｜ 原来如此，原来如此啊…再打一场吧，我一定能看透你斗虫的门道。
- Chromatic Ode of Candies and Roses: Third Gift ｜ 彩糖与蔷薇的幻色颂 第三份礼物
- There's also "Ornamental Paimon"! ｜ 还有一种「观赏派蒙」！

- 5-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Hmm, no... Hold on to it for now. It might still be useful for us. ｜ …不，还是先让它留在你身上，应该会派上用场。
- I see... In that case, you should try a Valberry. I bought some from the market this morning. ｜ 这样啊，那等会儿吃个落落莓吧，早上刚从集市买的。
- They knew we wanted to use this as an opportunity to advertise our game. But, now, it's a competition... ｜ 明知道我们是想借这活动打响名气，却提出了「最佳游艺」的名号…
- Disguise ｜ 伪装
- While Pyro Crystal's Boon is active, periodically unleash <color=#e09800>Stoneshard Strikes</color> that deal AoE Geo DMG ｜ 火晶庇佑效果持续期间，将间歇性释放<color=#e09800>岩晶破袭</color>，造成岩元素范围伤害
- Initial Kuugoryoku Points|{param4:I} ｜ 初始空居力|{param4:I}点
- I mean, uh... Everything here is really nice. And I'm used to it now, so there's no need to worry about me. ｜ 我是说…我很习惯，一切都好，不用为我担心。
- ...Not too long ago, I heard a rumor that someone was hosting an Onikabuto-fighting contest in Liyue. Naturally, I came here as soon as I could... but alas, it was too late. ｜ …我听说前阵子有人在璃月举办「斗虫试合」，所以特意赶来看看。只可惜，似乎错过了时间。

- A plant commonly found in the wilds of Natlan, characterized by its vividly colored, fleshy leaves.\nIt is said that the leaves of this plant are repositories of water and nutrients, making them a potential source of emergency food. However, besides the fact that they taste extremely bitter, they also contain allergens, meaning that even cooking the plant will not guarantee its safety for consumption. Consequently, courier survival guides only recommend eating it in the most dire of situations — in other words, as a last resort. ｜ 纳塔野外寻常可见的植株，有着颜色鲜明的肉质叶片。\n据说，这种植物的叶片内储存有大量的水分和营养，在紧急情况下可以充当食物。但由于这种植物叶片的口感过于苦涩，且含有引起人体过敏反应的成分。即便经过烹饪处理，也难以保证食用的安全，因此在讯使们的手册中，这种植物仅被列为遇难时的最后选择。
- If it was the growth serum, Cappet would've been turned into a giant. ｜ 如果是变大药水，卡佩现在应该变得好大好大才对啊。
- In real life, we call those people, "unlucky." ｜ 现实中我们叫这种体质「倒霉」。
- It almost feels as if this place is aware of our arrival. ｜ 就像…这片地方感知到我们的来到一样。
- I had an opportunity to feast with him once, back when I was just a kagemusha attending a gathering of the gods. So he's made his choice. Be that as it may, I don't believe his story is anywhere near finished yet. ｜ 曾经与他共饮之时，我还只是一介影武者，敬陪众神末席。他做出了这样的选择是吗？不过，我想他在下一个时代，仍然会继续和更多的人相遇吧。
- Ahem... Seems like these ordinary little fish are a walk in the park for you. I should consider giving you something more challenging... ｜ 咳咳…看来这种普通的小鱼对你完全没有压力啊，应该给你来点更有挑战的...
- Even if you're lucky enough to make it across the ocean alive, that border is simply impenetrable. ｜ 就算侥幸穿过了汹涌的大海，在岸边也还有严防死守。
- I am the chief of Aaru Village. Everyone usually calls me Uncle Anpu. ｜ 我是阿如村的村长，一般他们都叫我安普叔。

Thinking back, I must have looked so guilty... *sigh* ｜ 有次我浮出海面时，正巧见到最高审判官大人独自站在海边。他或许在想心事，或许在看风景…我当然没问。我只和他匆匆对了一眼就潜回海里了。事后想想像是做了亏心事一样…唉。

- Kliment's wrongdoing stemmed from greed, yes. But besides greed, there are many other things that may tempt us to break contracts. ｜ 克列门特的错误，在于贪欲。但在贪欲之外，也还有许多令人想要违背契约的诱惑。

- A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, forcing them to embark on a journey to find The Seven. ｜ 从世界之外漂流而来的旅行者，被神带走血亲，自此踏上寻找七神之路。
- Ms. Lisa of the Knights of Favonius studied there. My teacher mentioned her once — allegedly, Lisa was the best student they'd seen in two hundred years... ｜ 西风骑士团的丽莎小姐也在教令院进修过，我曾听老师说过她的名字，据说是两百年一遇的天才…

- Wait, what? You're still taking a big risk there... ｜ 喂喂，那也是很危险的行为吧…
- Time flies! We've been a team for a while now, haven't we? Anyway, I have a dream I wanna tell you about. Once the Mondstadt Adventurers' Guild becomes the biggest branch in Teyvat, I wanna go adventuring all over the whole world! Benny's Adventure Team will be the greatest adventure team there ever was, because you and me are the greatest adventurers! ..."Since when?" Uh... I don't remember exactly when you signed onto Benny's Adventure Team. But whatever, it's just details, right? ｜ 不知不觉，我们已经搭档很长时间了。其实我有一个梦想，等到蒙德城的冒险家协会发展成七国里最壮大的协会，我就要去周游提瓦特大陆！「班尼冒险团」会变成最伟大的冒险团，而我们，就是最伟大的两位冒险家！…你问你什么时候加入的？哎呀，这种细节不用在意嘛。
- Meaning... you're here for some other reason, right? How might I be of assistance? ｜ 别有所图的口吻，是不是有事相求于我呀？
- Hmm, the sound of the ball hitting the target is nice and crisp. If we can work it into a steady rhythm, it'd make the perfect accompanying beat! ｜ 嗯，撞球打击目标的音色富有张力，要是能配上稳定的节奏，就是完美的加花！

- The Adventurers' Guild is one of the key parties assisting the Tenryou Commission with their work. But so far, the combined efforts to combat the rifthounds has failed to substantially ameliorate the situation. ｜ 冒险家协会也是本次工作的重要助力之一。不过就现状来看，各方对兽境猎犬的控制情况仍不算乐观。
- Guess that settles it then. When I'm not around, promise me you'll carry on being a champ and living life to the max. ｜ 那也行。我不在的时候，你也要给我好好努力，好好活着。

- This person's martial skills... ｜ 这个人的武功真是…
- I'll wager that she's thinking "oh, I wonder what that evil Fatui schemer has in mind this time" or something right about now. ｜ 我看，她准是觉得我这个「愚人众」图谋不轨，又想打什么坏主意吧。

- Butterflies... Can you not find them? Hm... Perhaps, if you look over there... ｜ 蝴蝶…找不到吗？嗯…说不定，去那边看一看就好…
- We have a way to clear the thorns without hurting people inside. ｜ 我们有将荆棘打开，但不会伤到里面的人的办法…
- Hey! I'm not a kid anymore, you know. You don't have to worry about my appetite. ｜ 咳…！婶婶，我不是小孩子了，胃口也好着呢。
- ...Ah, please don't get me wrong. Safie isn't my real sister, it's because we're a very close-knit group, so we call each other brother and sister. ｜ …啊，请不要误会，莎菲并非我的亲妹妹，只是团里的大家彼此间都很熟悉，所以经常互称兄弟姐妹。
- A drink made from Grainfruit. One sip and all your taste buds begin to tingle. It's almost like an "endless aftertaste," for the flavor is so intense that it lingers on the tip of your tongue, and even drinking water cannot wash it away. ｜ 颗粒果制成的饮品。浅浅喝下一口，所有的味蕾都开始颤抖…某种意义上也算是「回味无穷」——因为过于浓郁的味道始终萦绕在舌尖，喝水也无法冲淡。
- The Treasure Hoarders show up near the location marked on the map. No way are you letting them steal a march on you! ｜ 盗宝团出现在藏宝图标识的地点附近，不要让他们捷足先登了…

- There's a saying I heard in Liyue: "There is no bad food, only bad cooks." After getting my license as a chef, I became even more convinced that this is absolutely true. ｜ 厨师证到手后，我就更加坚定那个从璃月听来的说法：没有难吃的食物，只有不合格的厨师。

- Heh, Mavuika... *ahem* I mean, the Archon came to talk to me the other day. It wasn't until I was eating snacks in the middle of the night that I realized she was basically bragging the whole time! There's an ancient saying from another land that goes, "Saints are humble until you ask them about their duty — that's when their pride stands tall." I think that fits her perfectly. ｜ 玛薇卡这家伙…咳咳，不好意思，火神大人她前些日子突然过来找我说了一大堆话。后来我半夜吃宵夜时才明白她过来炫耀了什么。有一句异邦的古话，想想还挺适合她的。「圣者谦卑，只有谈到自己责任时，会骄傲地加一句『我说句大话…』」。
- Wow... Thank you, Klee! Can I go play with Klee, Hat Guy? ｜ 哇…谢谢可莉！阿帽，我能和可莉一起去玩吗？
- "Stories follow rules, unfolding in cyclical patterns, but each should follow its own course." ｜ 「故事循规蹈矩，往复来回，但每一篇都应当有自己的路途。」
- About Amber ｜ 关于安柏…
- Just dropping by... ｜ 串串门好了…
- Before the Archon War, Dihua Marsh was all dry land and fertile soil. But the war caused landslides and the land was flooded, turning it into the marsh you see now. Nearly all the Glaze Lilies were wiped out. ｜ 魔神战争前，荻花洲还是片陆地。是战争引来山崩，才让这里被大水淹没，变为湿地，令琉璃百合几乎绝种。
- Have you found the Lotus Heads yet? ｜ 你找到莲蓬了吗？

- About the Spina di Rosula... ｜ 「关于刺玫会…」
- to give to Grandpa Almond ｜ 交给杏仁长老
- "May the new dreams never experience Marana's corruption, and may the old stories be forgotten alongside it."\n"May the green fields and mountains never wither. May the streams stay clear and the flowers remain in bloom."\n"Friends will stroll through the forest again. That which is good will return, and the painful memories will vanish. Just like a stream purifying itself or a withered tree sprouting once more." ｜ 「但愿新的梦想永远不被无留陀侵蚀。但愿旧的故事与无留陀一同被忘却。」\n「但愿绿色的原野、山丘永远不变得枯黄。但愿溪水永远清澈，但愿鲜花永远盛开。」\n「挚友将再次同行于茂密的森林中。一切美好的事物终将归来，一切痛苦的记忆也会远去，就像溪水净化自己，枯树绽出新芽。」

- It's just a regular mirror. ｜ 好像…就是很普通的镜子。
- While exploring the ruin near Poisson, it began to collapse and Navia fell into water containing Primordial Seawater. Only the protection of the dead members of the Spina di Rosula prevented her from dissolving. ｜ 在探索白淞镇附近的遗迹时，内部发生坍塌，娜维娅坠入了混有原始胎海水的大海之中，在死去的刺玫会成员的保护下才没有溶解。
- I don't think it's a big deal. Aren't we just dreaming? It's not like dreams will have an effect on others. ｜ 没什么关系吧，反正只是做梦而已，又不会对其他人产生影响。

- At the moment, "When the Wind of Death Blew Towards the Blond Samurai" is just the first volume in the series. As for the second and third volumes, I already have some ideas for their names... ｜ 目前这本《吹向金发武士的死亡之风》仅仅只是系列的第一部，紧承其后的第二、三两部的名字我已经想好了…
- Here it is. ｜ 拍到了。
- Come to think of it, how's Ioroi doing nowadays? ｜ 这么说来，不知五百藏他们最近如何了？
- Katheryne from the Adventurers' Guild in Mondstadt informs you that a very peculiar stranger has come to the city. Following Katheryne's suggestion, you decide to contact that person and see if they will accept your request. You meet the stranger at the Angel's Share tavern. The man introduces himself as Dainsleif and agrees to help you... for a price. Oddly enough, he only asks for 500 Mora and three questions. ｜ 从蒙德城冒险家协会的凯瑟琳小姐那里得知，蒙德城来了一位奇怪的陌生人。 在凯瑟琳小姐的建议下，你决定先去找那位陌生人，看他愿不愿意接受你的邀约。 在「天使的馈赠」酒馆里，你见到了那位陌生人。他自称戴因斯雷布，对你的邀约也一口答应… 但他要求的报酬，却只有500摩拉，和三个问题。
- Oh, well actually, the reviews were pretty good! Just... not everyone had the same opinion. A friend of mine, who went off to do her own thing... still hasn't changed her mind. ｜ 哦！其实评价很不错呢，不过是在一部分人之中。我那分道扬镳的朋友…她还是没有回心转意。
- A letter the head housemaid, Adelinde, just received. It needs to be sent to Dawn Winery for archiving.\nThe paper is slightly wrinkled. Maybe the person who wrote the letter was in a hurry and couldn't find a desk. ｜ 爱德琳女仆长不久前代收的信件，需要送到酒庄内归档。\n纸张稍显褶皱，也许写信的人有些匆忙，没能找到平坦的书桌。
- But what about my document!? I finished writing it, it's all stamped up and ready and... I... *cough* *cough* *cough* ｜ 那我写的文件怎么办！我什么都写好了，连章都盖好了，我…咳咳咳…咳咳！
- This is the residence of Zuria Destree, and I am Jalacan, her family doctor. What did you mean by your question just now? Who else could be my patient? ｜ 这里是祖莉亚·德斯特雷家，我是她的家庭医生贾拉康。你们刚刚的话什么意思？还有谁是病人？
- To his death. ｜ 就是送山王去死。
- Don't you get picky, now. I calculated this remuneration very carefully, and it is commensurate with the work. ｜ 可别嫌少，这酬劳可是我仔细算过的，和你们的工作刚好相称。
- #Just leave the track adjustments to me, {M#kane}{F#wahine}. You just come back around tomorrow, alright? ｜ #轨道的调整交给我就好！{M#小哥}{F#小姐}，等明天再回来看看吧！

- I sympathize with your situation, but I'm afraid I can't agree with your take. ｜ …我同情你的遭遇，但我无法赞同你的看法。
- A handy tool used to locate nearby chests and relevant clues. The land of the thundering archipelago has suffered a great many past hurts. The many treasure chests that dot the islands are a symbol of its revival from these wounds. Before the Sakoku Decree, countless travelers, merchants, adventurers and Treasure Hoarders walked this land. Now, the nation is under lockdown. Yet even the Sakoku's storms shall find it hard to stop those who desire treasure... ｜ 能寻找附近的宝箱和宝箱相关线索的便利道具。雷之列岛的土地曾经受过诸多伤害。伴随着创伤与恢复而来的是遍布各岛的诸多宝藏。在实施锁国之前，无数的旅人、行商、冒险者与盗宝团的足迹遍布稻妻；而如今虽然限制了出入，但即使是锁国的雷暴，也难以阻止渴慕珍宝的人…
- Then I shall leave this matter to you. We have caught the trail of a group of Treasure Hoarders around the city. I will mark it down on your map. ｜ 那么这件事就交给你了，我们刚在蒙德城周围发现了一伙盗宝团的踪迹，我给你标注在地图上。
- Caramel adds a certain unique flavor to milk tea. Even someone with a heart of stone would smile if they were to taste this drink's sweetness. ｜ 焦糖酱为奶茶增添了别样风味。面对这种甜蜜，即使是心如铁石的人也会展露笑容。
- That's wonderful! Whew, so it wasn't bad news after all. ｜ 太好了，真是货真价实的好消息！
- Morning, Thoma. ｜ 早啊，托马。
- A reptile with a limited ability to hover.\nFlying serpents do not truly possess the ability to fly; their ability to hover seems to derive from their bird-like hollow bones and the sparkle of Anemo that imbues them with a subtle influence over the wind. The desert is a far way from the nation of Anemo, but its lands are still ever-graced by gales intent on eroding everything. Everything, from cities to history, will eventually be razed to sand grains by the winnowing currents that drift over the Great Red Sand. Only creatures such as the flying serpents, which have learned to live with the wind, can continue to survive in the desert long after all has been reduced to dust. ｜ 一定程度上能够悬浮的爬行动物。\n飞蛇并不具备「飞行」的能力，悬浮的能力似乎是借助了与鸟类相同的中空骨骼，与其中风元素的残渣。沙漠不是风元素的国度，但其中常年呼啸着侵蚀一切的风。无论是城池或是历史，都会被沙海的风慢慢磨成细沙。只有能与这种风共生的动物，才能在一切都回归尘土后依然生存在沙海中。

- Heightened Verve lasts 30s:\nEvery 6s, rain will fall in random areas near the character, applying the Wet effect in an area. Each spell of rain lasts for 5.5s. When a character uses their Elemental Skill or Elemental Burst, a Wildgrass Shockwave will be unleashed at the character's location, dealing AoE Dendro DMG. This effect can be triggered once every 3s.\nWhile Heightened Verve is active, different opponent types will spawn, and defeating them will net you more points. ｜ 「锐意」持续30秒：\n每6秒，在角色的附近随机生成局部降雨，造成范围性的潮湿效果，每次降雨持续5.5秒；角色施放元素战技或元素爆发时，将在角色的位置释放荒草震波，造成草元素范围伤害，此效果每3秒至多触发一次。\n「锐意」持续期间，出现的敌人类型将发生变化，击败这些敌人可以获得更高的评分。

- Jean ｜ 琴
- Anyway... so that kid o' mine had just reached that age where they run around the house, screaming their heads off... y'know, driving everyone crazy. So I go to this Guhua lad and I say, "Oi! Legs of steel! Take this kid out for a ride in the sedan chair, and don't come back till he says he's had enough!" ｜ 正巧，我那小儿子正天天在府上闹腾得我脑仁儿疼，我说那得了，你听小少爷指挥，抬着轿子带他上街转悠去吧。
- No need to rush. Take your time. ｜ 呵，不必着急，慢慢来吧。
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- I'll protect them, just like how Lord Barbatos protects us. ｜ 就像巴巴托斯大人保护我们一样，我也会保护它们的，呼呼。
- Energy Cost|{param8:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param8:I}
- Well, we'd still be candidates if it was just based on strength! We only lost because two other contestants snuck up on us like cowards! If you could just go contact the referee, we'll wait right here for you to— ｜ 论实力我们才应该参加个人赛！要不是被人偷袭，我们怎么会输？我们就在这间休息室等，你们马上去联系裁判——
- Feeling nervous, Collei? It's your first time as a guide, after all. ｜ 柯莱还是有些紧张吗？明明是我们的向导。
- Talk to Buies ｜ 与比勒对话
- Anyway, let's talk to the locals first. Maybe we can find something out... ｜ 无论如何，我们先跟当地人聊聊吧。说不定就能发现…
- *sigh*... ｜ ……
- Fontaine Travel Recommendations ｜ 枫丹旅行推荐
- Laughter breaks the solitude of the long-silent village, and the lonesome scene grows pleasant once again. ｜ 久违的笑语打破了渔村的寂寥，沉寂的天地也似乎变得动听起来。
- Vaporize: Divergence ｜ 蒸发·分支
- How are we going to face Draff now... ｜ 这下子，和杜拉夫先生可怎么交代啊…
- An all-new combat mode that's more flexible than ever before, allowing you to not only achieve pinpoint-precise demolition but also outsmart crafty enemies while you're at it — how could that not be an absolute blast! ｜ 灵活机动的作战方式，点对点的精准爆破，和狡猾游走的敌人斗智斗勇，怎么看都特别好玩吧！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Obtain 6 Hangout Memories ｜ 获得六份旅程记录
- The outside world is painful sometimes, but Paimon doesn't think that's a reason to run away! ｜ 也许留在外面很痛苦，但是，但是我觉得不可以逃避呀！
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Clear a stage at difficulty 2 or higher in Theater Mechanicus while defeating all monsters ｜ 在「机关棋谭」中，完成1次难度2及以上的棋局并击败全部魔物
- Hroo! Rroooh— ｜ 呜！呜——
- Talk to Sevigne ｜ 与瑟维妮对话
- You'll have a chance to see what I'm truly capable of, not just professionally... ｜ 也让你看看我本职工作以外厉害的一面…
- Rich Ore Reserve ｜ 矿物富集点
- Who are you? ｜ 你是？
- Explore the Unknown Area ｜ 探索未知区域
- Eh? ｜ 欸…？
- I don't want to inherit my father's grudges, too. Moreover, when it comes to the aquabus, I don't think what my father did was entirely correct, either. ｜ 我不想继承我老爹留下的矛盾，而且巡轨船的事，我也不认为他的做法就完全正确。
- Huh? Is it me... Or does this tofu smell funny? ｜ 嗯…怎么感觉…闻起来就怪怪的…
- A special motif that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 特别的纹样，可用于装饰祝柬。
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Flower of Accolades ｜ 勋绩之花
- A High-Value Target Has Begun Moving Forward! ｜ 「高价值目标」开始继续向前移动！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Traveler, please do make the matter of the Irminsul Fruit fragments and the Energy Amplifier your top priority. ｜ 旅行者，「地脉之果」碎片和「导能原盘」的事拜托你一定要上心。
- To me, all these events are indistinguishable from real experiences. Take my latest dream for instance. I remember being in a garden of forking paths, and Madame Mage said to me... ｜ 对我来说，都和真实的经历没有区别啊。就像最近的一个梦，我梦到在小径分岔的花园，魔女小姐对我说…
- But your return says that you finally came around to my point of view. ｜ 但至少你回来就说明，你最终还是认同了我的想法。
- Namecard style.\nYou've heard many stories about Snezhnaya. What does it look like in your mind's eye? ｜ 名片纹饰。\n听了很多关于至冬的故事呢。在你想象里它是什么样的地方呢？
- Perfectly-Drawn Focus ｜ 恰到好处的视线聚焦
- Negative. According to the Fortress of Meropide's Coupon Cafeteria Regulations, only one Welfare Meal per day can be claimed per person. ｜ 否定。根据「梅洛彼得堡特许食堂管理条例」，每人每天限领一份。
- New Entry ｜ 新怪物
- It's like finding the perfect brand ambassador, huh? ｜ 哦！就像找到了一位合适的品牌代言人一样对吧？
- The front-line mines. ｜ 前线矿道。
- Rekhar's Opinion ｜ 里卡尔的看法
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- Sakura Saiguu ｜ 樱之斋宫
- Projection Attack Interval|{param3:F1}s ｜ 光幕攻击间隔|{param3:F1}秒
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Alright. Let's meet back here later. ｜ 嗯，等下在这里会合吧。
- There are extras anyway. How about we take another two pieces? ｜ 反正还有多的，我们要不要再拿两块回去？
- Summer Night's Bloom ｜ 夏祭之花
- How come there're so many Treasure Hoarders here!? An—Anyway, let's do this! ｜ 这，这里怎么有这么多盗宝团？不管了…我们上吧。
- Anyway, he's one of the good ones. Whenever there's trouble, he'll take care of it. So? Wanna go see him now? ｜ 总之，他真是个好家伙，遇到什么麻烦事，只要拜托他就万事无忧啦。怎么样，要现在跟我去见见他吗？
- In the depths of the Lair of Evil, horrifying undersea monsters are invading the home of the Water Imps. Warriors, set up your adventuring team and join forces with Prince Thelxie to expel these dastardly intruders! ｜ 在邪恶巢穴的深处，可怕的海底魔物仍在伺机侵略属于水妖的家园。勇士们，组建你的冒险队伍，并与「特尔克西」王子一同驱逐这些可恶的敌人吧！
- See you. Ugh, I really want to go home. ｜ 再见，真想早点回家啊。
- Jebrael! We found this, though we're not sure if it's a useful clue... ｜ 哲伯莱勒！我们找到了这个，虽然不知道是不是有用的线索…
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Leave them to us! We will make short work of them! ｜ 追杀那三个小鬼的事就交给属下吧！
- The three cats that snuck out are Roger, Nelson, and Paisley. Diona, you usually take care of them, so you should be quite familiar with these three, right? ｜ 这次偷偷溜出去的三只小猫是…罗杰、内尔森和派斯利，小迪奥娜经常照顾它们，应该和它们很熟悉吧？
- I didn't tell him about your salvage work, but I suspect that someone else found out and told him... ｜ 我没有把您帮忙打捞的事说出来，但我总觉着，是有其他人知道了这件事，向那吝啬鬼告了密…
- Defeat all opponents in the enemies' camp ｜ 击败敌方营地中的所有敌人
- The goddess probably won't mind, will she... ｜ 女神大人不会怪罪吧…
- ...Should you deny that the Championship rates Darshans based on their scores, please recall that we all entered our respective Darshans via our test scores. ｜ …在你否认以争霸赛比分评定学院名次的时候，还请你记得，我们可都是靠考试评分入学的。
- Me? I was helping Erge out... But I screwed up and got chucked into this cage. ｜ 我？帮二哥做事，搞砸了，被关笼子里了。就这么简单。
- When merchants from different regions encounter each other, the sparks of creativity will invariably fly. For example, someone once said: "If one could tame a Fungus that had legs, could it help deliver goods and protect our caravans?" This idea was firmly burned into Azalai's mind, its presence unfading... ｜ 不同地区的商人在聚会时，往往会碰撞出奇妙的创意火花，比如，有人想象过：「若是能驯化长有双腿的蕈兽，是否能兼顾运货和保护商队」…这个念头深深刻入了阿扎莱的脑海当中，挥之不去…
- Mr. Krosl, you must pay Ms. Zhiqiao ten times the original transaction price in Mora. ｜ 克罗索先生，你应当赔偿芷巧小姐十倍于原价的摩拉。
- Covertly find a way to distract the crowd ｜ 暗中寻找引开众人的办法
- Incomplete Story Quest ｜ 尚未完成的传说任务
- Martial Artist's Wine Cup ｜ 武人的酒杯
- I can't stand a rich broth. The flavor is too overpowering, it's so filling you can't train or fight afterward, and also, it doesn't really work as field rations... Simply put, broth and I are sworn enemies! ｜ 浓郁的汤品，我实在不能接受。口感太厚重，饱腹感很强，影响运动和战斗，还不方便携带，简直是我的天敌。
- So, you and Kamuna Harunosuke brought samurai here to eradicate monsters? ｜ 莫非，你和惟神晴之介，是带着那些武士前来铲除魔物的？
- Storybook on the Bookshelf ｜ 书架上的故事书
- But what's even scarier is that they have a "special" proclivity... ｜ 更可怕的是，他们还有一种特殊的癖好…
- I have to spend some time with them... ｜ 一定要好好陪陪他们…
- Oh, right! Wait, you can do that? ｜ ——原来还能找代购啊！
- Kama, do you know anything about that mountain? ｜ 阿釜对那座山，有什么了解吗？
- Achieve 15% Exploration Progress in Beryl Region, Belleau Region, or the Court of Fontaine Region ｜ 苍晶区、白露区或枫丹廷区的探索度达到15%
- Adventurer ｜ 冒险家
- Noooo... What should we do now... ｜ 呜呜，这可怎么办…
- Although children always try to hide their thoughts from adults, you can read their minds like a book. ｜ 虽然总想瞒着大人，但小孩子的心思真是太好懂啦。
- ...Help! ｜ 救命！
- The Cavalry Captain of the Knights of Favonius is leading a squad that aims to <color=#F39000>clear out</color> bandits skulking outside the city. ｜ 西风骑士团的骑兵队长正在带队<color=#F39000>清剿</color>躲藏在城外的盗贼。
- Haha — steady now, let's not overestimate my abilities. Still, one bottle of the good stuff in exchange for your guidance... Not an opportunity to pass up. ｜ 哎呀呀，真是看得起我。不过，一瓶美酒就能换到您的指导，我当然不会错过这个好机会啦。
- Hey! How could you put that in there!? It's an insult to my culinary talents! ｜ 喂！怎么能把这个放进去，这是对我的料理技艺的侮辱！
- Don't worry about that. I'm Lesser Lord Kusanali, after all. ｜ 呵呵，不用担心，我可是小吉祥草王呢。
- Hmph. Ah, dear, dear Semaine... A Lumidouce Bell, as a gift? Is this a threat? To break things off with me if I do not calm myself? ｜ 哼，亲爱的瑟米安，送我柔灯铃…你是不是在威胁，要是我再不冷静下来，你就要和我分手了啊？
- Defeat %1% opponent(s) ｜ 击败%1%只怪物
- Arataki Itto: Friendly ｜ 荒泷一斗·友好
- Talk to Calcagni ｜ 与卡嘉妮对话
- I'm grateful for your assistance. Now, I will leave you here in peace to proceed with your work. I still have a few items from today's schedule that need addressing. ｜ 很感谢你的协助。那么这个地方就留给你工作了，我还要去处理今天没有处理完的事。
- Uh, hey there! Excuse us, but is Cyno at the Akademiya? ｜ 你好！我们想打听一下，赛诺在教令院吗？
- Something like... Oh! Tipping Paimon for guide services! Heehee, seems fair, right? ｜ 省下来…当我的小费！嘿嘿，合情合理。
- Of course, if you have any genuine grievances about the auction, the lots, or the process, please enlighten me as to where exactly I went wrong. ｜ 整个拍卖会，其中的拍品，还有所有的流程，若你有不满，就请指出我何错之有。
- Waitress, Good Hunter ｜ 「猎鹿人」侍应生
- #{M#Why, because I like him.}{F#Why, because I like her.} ｜ #{M#因为我喜欢他。}{F#因为我喜欢她。}
- The new plan was that we would come up with a single batch of graffiti designs, create stencils based on the designs, specify the colors required, and then roughly mark out where they needed to be sprayed. ｜ 我们只需要设计一批涂鸦图案，用它们制作模具，定好喷漆的色号，大致标定它们需要喷涂的位置。
- Message ｜ 留言
- *sigh* I'll stop here. Honestly, I hadn't intended to say so much. But you're a good listener, Traveler. ｜ 呼…那就言尽于此吧。其实我本来没必要说这么多，但你是很好的听众呢，旅行者。
- You're right... Rex Lapis wouldn't have done something so careless. ｜ 倒也是…岩王帝君可不会做这般不周全的事。
- You can see it on people's faces, the way they once again shine with a happiness that can only come from within. ｜ 在稻妻的人的脸上，又重新显露出了那种发自内心的快乐。
- Now, in addition to that thank-you message, there was one other thing... ｜ 对了，除了道谢以外，还有…
- A bow that has been well-polished by time and meticulously cared for by its owner. It feels almost like an extension of the archer's arm. ｜ 饱经磨炼又精心护养的弓，经历了漫长的岁月。仿佛会主动配合射手的动作一般好使。
- I'll prepare some funds for you. Buy her highest quality wares and earn her approval. ｜ 我会准备一些资金给你。到时候尽量买下她那里成色最好的货，获得她的赏识。
- Bonnie has been with Pierre ever since the first meeting between Pierre and the Marechaussee Phantom, and that's why Elodie came looking for her... But that shouldn't be all... ｜ 逐影庭的人第一次见到皮埃尔时，邦妮就在他身边，所以艾洛迪会来找她…但应该不仅如此…
- I'll make this quick. Just one question: What did he buy while he was here? ｜ 长话短说，我只问你一个问题：刚刚那人到店后，买了什么东西？
- Oh, I'm a real pro! ｜ 我超会钓鱼的！
- #Yeah, don't you worry — {M#Sir}{F#Lady} Fixalot over here has a good track record with this kind of thing! ｜ #别的不说，修东西{NICKNAME}可在行了。
- Opera Epiclese Notice Board ｜ 欧庇克莱歌剧院公告
- Not so sleepy now, are you? ｜ 这下不困了吧？
- Leave Aramuhukunda's home ｜ 离开兰穆护昆达的家
- If I can dispel the fanaticism surrounding "Auguste" — even just by proving the rumor to be false — Fontaine's perfume market can finally start to get back to normal. ｜ 如果能借这个机会给「奥古斯都」祛魅…哪怕只是证明传言不实，枫丹的香水市场都能正常一点吧。
- Complete the third "floral theme" ｜ 完成第三道「花题」
- Uh... Are you talking about pets or people? ｜ 呃…听上去像是在说小动物。
- Let's check your temperature... ｜ 摸摸额头喔…
- Please adjust camera angle to take a suitable photo to bring back to Zicheng ｜ 需要将镜头转至正确角度，拍摄合适的画片带给子澄
- There've been times in the past when I've had to make do with a rock for a pillow, or just find a patch of grass to lie down on. In the army, you learn how to sleep well wherever you are. ｜ 以前在军营里，哪怕枕着石头，或者躺在路边草地里都能休息。
- You certainly live up to your reputation, there's no doubt about that... But remember, the little girl is still in my hands. ｜ 你这家伙，名不虚传，但是别忘了，我手上还有琴美。
- Talk to Parvaneh ｜ 与芭尔瓦涅对话
- Well, if you insist. I'll leave the matter to you then. ｜ 唔，既然你这么说，那只能这样了…
- ...Uh-uh, you stay right there! ｜ …哈，站稳别动！
- Of course! Being an adventurer is really interesting! ｜ 那是当然了，做冒险家可是很有趣的。
- I suggest you see what valuables they left behind. Oh, don't mind me, I've already made notes of everything.... I'll return everything that needs to be returned. ｜ 我建议你看看他们留下了什么宝贝，唔…别担心我，我把它们都登记备案了…该归还的东西由我归还就好。
- Anything you'd like to do? ｜ 有什么想做的吗？
- That's one I've never heard. ｜ 没听说过。
- Actually, I think this is kind of a good thing for me. It's because I feel that this is a historic moment for Inazuma! ｜ 其实，我觉得这对我来说也算是好事。因为我感觉，此刻的稻妻正处于一个历史性的时刻！
- New floating platforms emerged ｜ 新的浮空平台已出现
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- There's one more. And it's a big one, too! ｜ 又来了！好大的一只！
- If you're still curious, why don't you go ask him yourself? ｜ 如果你们好奇的话，直接去问问黑泽先生如何？
- About the "Active Odor Imitating Bait"... ｜ 关于「气息模拟主动诱饵」…
- I do not understand your curiosity. You are people too. If you are interested in human forms, just look at yourselves. ｜ 我不理解你好奇的原因。你也是人。对人的形态感兴趣，看看自己就好。
- "Generally speaking"? ｜ 「一般来说」…？
- Paimon tells Ganyu all about Mr. Dvorak, from how you met, to his family history, to your shared music festival aspirations. ｜ 派蒙自告奋勇，将与德沃沙克相遇的经过、他祖先的故事和海灯音乐节的创想全数告诉了甘雨…
- Help Pele Nui ｜ 帮助佩蕾·努伊
- You're back. The Adventurers' Guild welcomes you. ｜ 你回来了，冒险家协会欢迎你。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Yeah, true. ｜ 是啊。
- After defeating an enemy, ATK is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>21%</color> for 30s. This effect has a maximum of 3 stacks, and the duration of each stack is independent of the others. ｜ 击败敌人后，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>21%</color>，持续30秒。该效果至多叠加3层，每层持续时间独立。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- A collection of Mondstadt ballads, recorded, compiled and arranged by scholars centuries ago. ｜ 数百年前的学者们整理记录了蒙德诸多无名游吟诗人的诗篇，将其编纂结集，命名为《林间风》。
- Yeah, Paimon would like to know, too! ｜ 嗯嗯，我也想知道。
- Yeah, she'd be livid! We'd get the scolding of a lifetime! ｜ 那她肯定会大发雷霆，把我们劈头盖脸狠骂一顿！
- King of Constellation Metropole ｜ 星轨王城国王
- Ah! Paimon's got it! ｜ 啊，我明白了！
- Compared to Jueyun Karst this place seems basic. Are we really gonna find an adeptus here? ｜ 比起「绝云间」，这里看起来就很缺乏仙气…真的会有仙人出没吗？
- "Your credible source of the unbelievable truth!" That's my journalistic motto. Hmm? ...Haha, yep, exactly — "credible" and "incredible" at the same time! What's that? ...Oh, if I had to choose, then obviously being credible is much more important! But most readers would sooner pay money for sensational stories than mundane facts... So we have to focus on the most incredible true stories to keep our readers engaged. ｜ 真实至上，故事超群。这就是我的工作原则，欸？哪一个是重点？那当然是「真实性」啦，「故事性」只是一种帮助读者们理解新闻的辅助手段。唉，但据我观察…比起「真相」，读者更愿意为「故事」付钱啦。
- Oh yes, very mad indeed! So mad, in fact, that he's dispatched a very formidable woman named Ruthless Calla Lily. ｜ 老大很生气，所以派出一个很可怕的女人，她叫残酷嘟嘟莲。
- Didn't Mr. Jazari say before that "the gates to scholarship will open to whoever has a seeking heart"? ｜ 加扎里先生之前不是说过，「不管是谁，只要抱持着求索之心，学术的大门就会向他打开」吗？
- Good, then please follow me into the arena. ｜ 那么，请跟我进入会场。
- Use Beidou's Elemental Skill to hit the balls for points.\nDuring the challenge, all party members will receive a cooldown reduction, cannot use Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks, and cannot unleash Elemental Bursts. ｜ 利用北斗的元素战技击球获得积分。\n挑战中，队伍中所有角色无法使用普通攻击、重击、下落攻击和元素爆发。队伍中所有角色获得冷却缩减。
- Thank you, Sorush. If not for you and your companions, I would have needed much time to gather my strength... ｜ 谢谢你，斯露莎。如果不是你，还有你的同伴，我会需要很多很多时间积蓄力量…
- Skill DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}

- You probably already know about the three major Commissions in charge of Inazuman affairs. ｜ 你应该知道稻妻议事的三大奉行所吧。
- And we hope that you will not interrupt our walk. ｜ 希望您不要打扰我们散步。

- "Yes, it was I who called you here. Come, let us go unto the Heart of the Sacred Mountain... before it is too late." ｜ 「对，是我，我是『呼唤』你到来者，来吧，到圣山之心…在一切还为时未晚之前。」

- (I remember once, over at the Children of Echoes, someone approached us with a Sacred Flame Crystal, flaunting it before quickly putting it away.) ｜ （在回声之子，曾有人拿着圣火结晶走到我们面前，炫耀般地展示，又很快收回。）
- I know the difficulties Vision-bearers face. I've taken some in before, after all. ｜ 我毕竟也收留过神之眼的持有者，知道他们的苦衷。
- #Many varieties of plants grow in fecundity in this marvelous space, seemingly by the grace of Sub-Space Creation in harmonizing the various specialties that these plants possess such that even ones that come from the desert and the forest can coexist side by side, thus orchestrating a beautiful chorus of flower, tree, and wild grass.\nFor researchers who love plants, such areas are veritable treasure troves for research, though these vibrant woods will also prove sites of unique interest to ordinary passers-by.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Tighnari, {REALNAME[ID(1)|HOSTONLY(true)]} ｜ #多种植物繁茂生长的奇妙地域，似是借助壶中洞天的外景之能，调和了不同物种的特性，使得来自沙漠和雨林的植株共存无隙，谱写一曲花卉、灌木和荒草的协奏曲。\n对于喜爱植物的学者而言，这样的区域堪称研究的宝地。而在普通过客的眼中，交织着斑斓色彩的林野，倒也别具一番趣味…\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：提纳里、{REALNAME[ID(1)|HOSTONLY(true)]}
- -.-  ..-.   ..-  -...  .---  -.  ..-. -.  -...  -.  -...  --- ｜ -.-  ..-.   ..-  -...  .---  -.  ..-. -.  -...  -.  -...  ---
- And Sharif's mercy. ｜ 还有舍利夫的心软。
- My skills were passed down to me by my father. We lived a life of obscurity in the remote wilderness. Still, he devoted everything he had to being a Marechaussee Hunter. ｜ 我的剑技…是从父亲那里学来的…父亲作为一名逐影猎人，一直和我在山林间过着隐姓埋名的生活…
- I may not be able to say what exactly it's for, but I know for sure that what you say is untrue. ｜ 虽然我不能准确说出此间的用途，但我知道，一定不会是像你所说的那样。
- Feelings About Ascension: Intro ｜ 突破的感受·起
- When carrying an Electrogranum, you can gain its blessing for so long as it lasts:\n·Characters can pass through the protective screen of Elementary Thunder Barriers.\n·When your active character is not <color=#FFACFFFF>affected by Electro</color>, they can interact with Thunder Spheres and other objects.\n·Electrograna can help characters block 6 instances of DMG from some of Inazuma's environmental hazards, such as Thunderstones and Balethunder areas.\n·Electrograna will last for 20s. ｜ 携带雷种子时，将在其存在时间内获得它的眷顾：\n·角色可以通过「若雷结界·初阶」的屏障。\n·当前场上角色在不处于<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素附着</color>状态下时，也能与「雷极」等物件进行交互。\n·雷种子将代替角色，抵挡6次稻妻的部分环境伤害，如「若雷石」与「雷祸」区域。\n·雷种子存在时间为20秒。
- This stone slate, which was left behind by someone, points the way forward. Though the words on the slate do not reveal much of their author's preferences, one can tell that he did predict the ignominious fate of these ruins.\nAs such, he endeavored to help those who came after wipe away the marks of time's passing and return to ancient times, thus telling such people of his era's glories and hopes. ｜ 不知谁人留下的石板引导前行的道路。虽然石板上浮现的字样并未流露出过分的好恶，但是可以看出，他预感到了遗迹被黄沙埋没的终局。\n所以他想帮后世之人拂去时间留下的痕迹，重回旧日，好得知他那个时代的风，载着怎样的自豪与期许。

- Thank you so much! ｜ 那就多谢您了！
- These floofy, furry four-legged camelids are elegant and gentle, and get along very well with humans, just like good partners who understand one another...\nIt is said that they are the "Masters of the Night-Wind"'s favorite type of Alpacas, and can produce soft, high-quality white wool. It is worth mentioning that despite their appearance, the Iced Milk are more lively and active than they seem. Their exceptional endurance, combined with their larger size, makes playing with them quite a physically demanding task. One wonders how Tubby manages to engage with them daily... ｜ 毛茸茸的四足兽类，性情优雅温和，与人类相处得极为融洽，就如默契的伙伴…\n据说是「烟谜主」最喜爱的绵驮兽，能产出蓬松且优质的白色绒毛。值得一提的是，与外表不同，冰牛奶实则比看起来更为活泼好动。而它们出色的耐力配合着偏大的体型，使得与之玩耍成为了一项颇为消耗体力的工作。也不知道阿圆是如何做到每天都能陪伴它们玩耍的…
- Once you have finished constructing that road, we will conduct a final verification, just like how we would test completed buildings. ｜ 在搭建完毕后，我们还会进行一次最终检验…就像是验收搭建好的建筑一样。

- Challenge the Hateful Oceanid, which now shows its true face to its foes.\nHaving lost its territory and with no access to tranquil waters, the Oceanid writhes in endless grief, longing for all living things to hear the song of the waves and to at last taste the bitterness of tears. ｜ 挑战以真面目面对敌人的「嗟恨的纯水精灵」。\n失去了领地、无法获得净水的纯水精灵在无止境的哀怨中翻腾，渴求着让一切地上生灵听见浪花的歌拍，并最终品尝泪水的苦涩。
- Flowing Joyspar ｜ 流悦晶石
- We're leaving, we're leaving！ ｜ 哎呀，走了走了。
- Children, children, I do hope you're not trying to make a mockery of me. ｜ 年轻人，你莫非是来拿我这个老婆子寻开心的…
- Ooh, a smooth talker. Not what I was expecting. ｜ 呀，你好像很擅长讨人欢心呢，有点出乎我的意料了。

- Does the Chi's corpse still exist? ｜ 「螭」的遗骸还存在吗？

- Character Story 4 ｜ 角色故事4
- A metal-glass composite building unique to Fontaine, currently operating as a newsstand balances the display of all its merchandise with operating costs. While its size is comparable to traditional buildings, rent is extremely low and it requires just a single person to run. Customers can see everything sold from the sales counter. Unlike food, books and magazines are much easier to store, and the newspapers in stock are updated frequently and of much greater timely relevance, making newsstands actually more flexible than bookstores. ｜ 枫丹独有的金属玻璃复合建筑店面，目前正作为书报摊运转，兼顾了商品陈列的全面性和运营成本。在店面尺寸与传统建筑不相上下的同时，这型建筑只需要极少的租金，一人便能管理。客人站在柜台边，就能将所售书籍尽览眼底。而且书籍报刊不像各种食品，对储存条件的要求极低，其中的报纸又具备独特的时效性，每隔一段时间就需要进货换货，因此，这种书报摊反而比书店更灵活，有着独特的优势。
- (tset) Charlatan ｜ (tset)骗子
- The mere existence of the Vision Hunt Decree is baffling. The Tenryou Commission's attitude just doesn't seem to add up, and neither does the Shogun's. ｜ 眼狩令的颁布本就很奇怪。不管是天领奉行，还是将军大人，他们的态度都很微妙。
- Dynamic Skins ｜ 影幻牌面
- Heyyyyy! Don't goooo! Come back real quick, please! ｜ 喂——先别着急走啊——你们回来一下——
- The Wondrous Path of Truth ｜ 妙道合真
- Either way, if this part of the story is true, then the rescuer has to have been an adeptus. ｜ 如非误传，想必是真正的仙人出手相助了。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Whoa... What's that place... A building floating in the air? ｜ 呜哇…那是什么地方…浮在空中的楼？
- Go and check for crystal ore in Stormterror's Lair ｜ 前往风龙废墟探查水晶矿
- Ah, the Jade Chamber... To think that it could truly be rebuilt... ｜ 那么大一个群玉阁…居然还真重建好了…
- Seems like Kinich was right... We should go meet up with him right away. ｜ 我们快去找基尼奇吧…看来他说对了…
- A simple yet lively signboard crafted from durable Flammabomb Wood, adorned with special patterns that are said to have been inspired by Xocolatl Beverages, renowned throughout Natlan.\nThe shop prides itself on offering the most whimsical and enchanting taste experiences around, hence why its owner has gone for such a vibrant and imaginative design, aiming to pique customers' curiosity and entice them to explore the shop's offerings. ｜ 简单但又不失灵动感的招牌，由耐用的「燃爆木」板材切削而成，其上绘制特殊纹样据说来自于闻名纳塔的卡考苦饮店。\n据说，卡考苦饮店向来以最奇幻的味蕾体验而自居，因此店主也特意选择了色彩明快且天马行空的图案作为标志，用以激发客户的好奇心理，吸引他们前来一探究竟。
- Waiting for other players... ｜ 等待其他队友准备
- Haha, it looks like you still have much to learn about traditional martial arts, child. ｜ 哈哈，小朋友，看来你对传统武学还是不够了解啊。
- An old jug containing wine. A rich scent emanates from it. ｜ 装有酒的旧壶，散发着芳醇的气息。
- Sit down from the right of a chair. ｜ 你给我从椅子右边坐下$UNRELEASED
- Kayabuki Ikkei takes you to a small island outside Inazuma City... ｜ 茅葺一庆将你带到了稻妻城外的小岛上…
- Sanctuary Pilgrim: Land of Harmonious Springs (I) ｜ 圣龛巡礼·百泉谐律之地·其一
- Incomplete Hangout Event ｜ 尚未完成的邀约事件
- Bang Yeon-ji ｜ 房莲知
- Really? Against who? ｜ 真的？谁打你了？
- I need to stay here to keep an eye on the situation. Collei, can you head to Sumeru City and find out why she isn't here yet? ｜ 我需要留在这里观察它的状况。柯莱，你能去一趟须弥城，看看前辈为什么还没来吗？
- I've been training so long for this, and Mualani's helped so much. I'm going to show her that it didn't go to waste. ｜ 嗯！我花了很多时间训练，玛拉妮也帮过我许多。我想告诉她，那些努力并没有白费。
- A tribe that lives together with the Yumkasaurs. With a passion for extreme sports, they work as couriers throughout the land. ｜ 喜好极限运动，与匿叶龙共同生活，以在各地传递讯息为业的部族。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- What was the researcher's name, again... I can't remember. Whatever the case, that device was a solo project with no real practical value... ｜ 好像是叫什么…呃，我记不清了，总之是一个研究员做的东西，没什么实用价值。

- ...Yes, I can imagine that. ｜ …可以想象。

- I sure will! Let's get going, then! ｜ 那就拜托你啦，我们赶紧出发吧！
- So all I can say is: ｜ 我也只好——
- So this set... is going to be a part of the script? ｜ 会选这个地方，是因为剧本如此吗？
- Sleep helps you... Hmm... focus your senses on what the roots and branches say. ｜ 睡觉可以更专注，唔…感知到根系和枝杈的话语。
- Yeah. I got Aurelie killed — there, I said it. Happy now? ｜ 怎么样，我害死了奥蕾丽，你满意了吗？
- I still need to give it some more thought. ｜ 我还要再想想。
- What are you busy with? ｜ 在忙些什么…

- We promised to take him to a matra, but we don't know that many, do we...? ｜ 虽然答应带他去找风纪官，但我们认识的风纪官好像也不多…
- Let's nip that in the bud! ｜ 蔓引株连！
- Hahaha! No, no... In this instance, when I say price, I'm not talking about Mora. ｜ 哈哈哈，我说的买卖，可并不是要你们付摩拉的意思。
- That's what the legends say, anyway. ｜ ——传说是这么说的啦。
- This is the starting point of the Clementine Line, which heads from Romaritime Harbor to the Court of Fontaine. ｜ 这里是克莱门汀线从海露港通往枫丹廷的起点。
- Let's distribute these among our forces. ｜ 和同伴们一起分享收获吧！
- A fabric band dyed indigo by the darkness of night. Can also double as a bandage in the event of an emergency. ｜ 被夜色染得靛青的织物。能在紧急时充当绷带。
- Speaking of which, Ashvattha's Concourses looked a lot like ancient ruins... Is there a story behind that? ｜ 这么说来，觉树之堂看起来像很古老的遗迹…这边有什么故事吗？
- Average Samurai ｜ 平庸的武士
- Hm... Paimon understands, you're worried the vault might be protected by some sort of mechanisms, right? Yeah, there're always traps at the end... ｜ 唔…我明白了，你说的是宝库可能有机关之类的吧？的确…
- 2-Mirror Attack Instances|{param5:I} ｜ 2枚攻击次数|{param5:I}次
- Purchase supplies... ｜ 物资采购。

- Find the treasure clue ｜ 寻找宝藏的线索$UNRELEASED
- Rawwr! ｜ 呀呀！
- You've got a good eye. If you want to do great things, there's no place like the Fatui. ｜ 眼力不错啊，想要成就一番事业，加入咱们「愚人众」当然是不二之选。
- Opponents who enter the AoE of <color=#FFD780FF>Signature Mix</color> have 10% decreased ATK for 15s. ｜ 敌人进入<color=#FFD780FF>最烈特调</color>的领域后的15秒内，攻击力降低10%。
- Meanwhile, the Fontaine Research Institute still complains about being short-handed, huh... The way these researchers go about things is truly unfathomable. ｜ 与此同时，枫丹科学院还在抱怨人手不足的问题，呵呵…这群研究员的作风真让人捉摸不透。
- We followed your voice and found you here. But it's kinda strange, we can't touch you... How did you become an illusion? ｜ 我们找了你一路，跟着声音找过来的，没想到你真的在这里！但是好奇怪呀，我们碰不到你…你怎么是个影子？
- Huh? What happened... ｜ 欸？怎么会…

- ...What? ｜ 哎？
- I fear that this will cause mechanics among mortals to develop in a woefully mistaken direction. It falls to me to point them down the right path. ｜ 长此以往，只怕凡间机关之术要走上歧途，本仙是准备亲自点拨他们一番罢了。
- This is a Windwheel Aster? Hmm, an interesting plant indeed... ｜ 这就是风车菊吗？唔，确实是一种有趣的植物…
- The tunnels ahead were sealed using large rocks when the miners were dispersed... Looks like that's where we're going to need to use this cannon again. ｜ 前方的矿道先前撤离矿工时被人用巨石封堵了…看起来这门炮又要派上用场咯。
- Chat: The Art of Exorcism ｜ 闲聊·驱邪之法
- I... I admit I acted on impulse... I'll tell you the truth... but before that, you must ensure my safety. ｜ 我…我承认我是有点冲动…我可以说实话，但你们要保证我的人身安全。
- This was it. It was now or never... Suddenly, the adeptus had a brainwave. "Aha! My antlers..." ｜ …千钧一发之际，仙人心念一动，「欸，我头上这角…」。
- Sure, and let's up the stakes a little this time. Shall we say 50 thousand? ｜ 来呗，这次多点吧，五万摩拉好了。

- <color=#FFCC33>Spiritgathering Buffs</color> will appear within the area at intervals. Pick them up to increase your Movement SPD or restore Stamina to characters. ｜ 区域内将间歇性出现<color=#FFCC33>聚灵助益</color>，拾取后可以提升移动速度，或恢复角色的体力。
- I hate it. I make it pretty obvious that I'm not listening, but there's always someone at the bar rattling on to me. ｜ 可恶，明明我不想听，却经常有人在我面前说个不停。

- Youngster, are you also interested in old tomes as well? Not bad. Kids like you are rare. ｜ 年轻人，你也对过去的书感兴趣？不错不错，真是难得。
- Careful now, little one. Don't forget I've placed my god in your capable hands. ｜ 小家伙，这么不小心？还怎么守护「我的神明」？
- "Prinzessin der Verurteilung"? I'm sorry, which nation are you a princess of? ｜ 断罪的皇女？是哪个国家的公主吗？

- Light novels? This is my first time hearing about such a thing, but I doubt I will procure suitable teaching materials from the House of Daena... Treasures Street it is! ｜ 轻小说吗？头一次听说呢…估计智慧宫里也找不到适合这门课的教材，那我这就上宝商街去看看吧！
- Are you feeling unwell? ｜ 哪里不舒服吗？
- I'm still quite puzzled by it, myself. I thought she was unwell. Where did she suddenly get all that energy from? ｜ 我还在奇怪呢，那孩子不是身体不好吗，怎么突然这么有活力了。
- I have some research work that needs settling, so we will have to work separately for now. Let's meet up again near the broken bridge. ｜ 我有些研究工作要收尾，得和你们分开行动了。之后在断桥附近会合吧。
- I've caught the scent of treasure in the air! Come on, let's go! ｜ 我已经感觉到宝藏的气息了，我们赶快前进吧！

- Legba ｜ 雷格巴
- What? You make it sound like I've never been serious! ｜ 什么啦，我之前都不认真的吗！

- Increases all party members' DEF by 165 for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色防御力提高165点，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- If taking so much time is really on the up and up, then why did he feel the need to secretly hand out some tea to the port officials? Hmph... ｜ 如果这件事真的是那么正当，那他怎么偷偷摸摸地在给港口的工作人员塞茶叶呢？哼…

- ??? ｜ ？？？
