- For all the things the Akademiya did to me, and for all the folly it committed in the name of wisdom... As their archon, I will make them pay! ｜ 教令院对我所做的一切，以及他们以智慧之名所做的一切愚行，我都会以神明的名义…好好报复他们的！
- Amusing. Very amusing, Lyney. Just the sort of unexpected twist that I enjoy. With you here, today's performance can finally be called complete. ｜ 精彩，太精彩了林尼，我就喜欢这种出人意料的转折。有你在，今天的演出才称得上完整。
- Although, with Sylvain's mental state and my physical one... I don't think you need to worry about a jail break. ｜ 不过以席尔万现在的精神状态，跟我的身体情况…一个是不想跑，一个是跑不动啊。
- There aren't many young people in this place, and they need to manage all kinds of things, from protecting the village to the daily affairs of villagers. As a result, Habachi has been the only person on the warehouse-guarding duty. ｜ 村子里就那么些年轻人，既要守卫村子，又要帮村里人处理各种事…一直都只有哈巴奇一个人守着仓库。
- "Brave Northerly Wind" ｜ 《勇敢的北风》

- After learning some fancy skills from elsewhere, they carve and polish pure white stones to make mementos, which they then sell to outsiders... ｜ 他们从别处学了花哨的本领，选了洁白的石材，雕花抛光后做成纪念品，然后卖给外人…

- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- I still know plenty of cool places! When I find the time, I'll show them to you! ｜ 我还知道好多好玩的地方，等我有时间就带你们一起去！
- So. Where will you go now, Tulipe? ｜ 姐姐，接下来你会去哪里？
- Ah! Thank you! ｜ 啊，谢谢！
- Super fun, 10/10 would come again. ｜ 我觉得还挺刺激的。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nThe amazing, amusing, ball-launching Dodofortresses have been activated! Use your Dodoguard to reflect and return the Kaboomballs they fire and defeat them in Kaboomball Kombat! Complete Challenge Quests to obtain Enigma Gears, which can be exchanged for various rewards!\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 21 to take part in the "Kaboomball Kombat" event.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Shop</color>\nDuring the event, you can exchange Enigma Gears for precious materials in the Event Shop. When the Event Shop closes, any remaining Enigma Gears in your possession will automatically disappear, and the relevant Event Shop page(s) will also close. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n妙趣横生的发球机关「魔球嘟嘟堡」已然启动！利用高速旋转的「嘟嘟光盾」回击「砰砰魔球」，战胜「魔球嘟嘟堡」吧！完成挑战任务即可获取「神秘齿轮」，用于兑换各种奖励！\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到21级后，才能参与「砰砰魔球总动员」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动商店】</color>\n在活动持续期间，可以在活动商店中，用「神秘齿轮」兑换珍贵的物资。活动商店结束后，持有的「神秘齿轮」会自动消失，同时相关活动商店页签将关闭。
- Suddenly, my partner was caught in a whirlpool whipped up by an evil beast! Luckily, I managed to grab hold of him just in time... ｜ 太可怕了，我的同伴险些被魔兽掀起的漩涡卷走，多亏我紧紧拉着他！
- This is, of course, an analogy. As they say, "the marketplace, too, is a battlefield." ｜ …正所谓战场如商场，我只是打个比方。
- A strange shrub growing within the Forest of Blessings. Its broad leaves are like fans, and gazing at them makes the observer feel as though they were within a tropical rainforest, with the sky about to begin pouring at any moment. However, the residents of the Forest of Blessings are made of paper, and it would be rather unfortunate if they got soaked by rain... ｜ 生长在「赐福森林」中的奇特灌木，其宽大的叶面宛若扇叶，一眼望去便让人有置身热带雨林、随时可能迎来大雨的错觉。但在实际上，「赐福森林」之中的居民似乎均是纸质的，被雨水打湿似乎不太妙…
- Paimon, please tell me you didn't fall for that... ｜ 派蒙怎么也…？
- Allow me to speak first then, honored Knight and Paimon. Concerning the tower before us, Narcissus has been unable to overcome it. As such, the Princess is still safe. ｜ 那就让我先说明吧，尊敬的骑士，还有派蒙。关于我们面前的这座塔。魔龙纳西索斯无法攻下这座塔，所以公主目前还是安全的。
- But if you really are in desperate need of someone to talk to, we could discuss something else entirely. Something that will not harm anyone's interests. Math, for example... ｜ 如果你真的这样迫切地想找到一个聊天对象，我们可以谈一些别的，不会对任何人的利益造成损害的话题，比如数学…
- What I see... If I really must say, then I see a monster that looks like it could swallow the whole world in a single bite. ｜ 我看到的…非要说的话，就像是能一口吞下天地的怪兽？
- I heard my big sis— Uh, Master Jean say that Klee always wanted to play harpastum, right? ｜ 我听姐…咳！听琴团长说过，可莉一直想玩羽球对不对？
- Required Elements ｜ 需要元素
- The warrior was handily defeated! So he was a gifted orator, but never a true fighter. ｜ 勇士竟然如此轻易被击败，原来他并非真的勇士，而是演讲的天才。
- And he has made so many other ornaments from jade to boot... ｜ 而且我那朋友还有很多玉石打制的首饰…
- Thank you very much. They must surely be growing impatient by now. After all, they placed their orders a long time ago, but I've only just gotten around to putting those orders together... ｜ 那就拜托你了，这两位客人的订单已经在店里下了很久，但我现在才备齐书，他们一定等得都不耐烦了…
- P·A·I·M·O·N ｜ P·A·I·M·O·N
- Oh, seems the time really flies when I'm talking with you... I just remembered I have somewhere else I need to be, so I should get going. ｜ 不知不觉聊了这么久，我忽然想起来我还有约，要不就先聊到这里…

- We need to tell him not to go, and quick! ｜ 我们得告诉他，不能去雪山呀！
- It's not for you to decide whether it was a legitimate transaction or not. ｜ 正不正当，可不由你说了算。

- About the Collective of Plenty... ｜ 关于沃陆之邦…
- Oh great Dendro Archon, may our upcoming harvests be bountiful ones also? ｜ 小草神大人，接下来的丰收也要靠你保佑啦！
- Besides, you don't look like you're even old enough to drink yet! ｜ 而且！你看起来也还没到能够喝酒的年纪吧？
- Cryo Crystal: <color=#e09800>Extreme Rockblast</color> ｜ 冰晶·<color=#e09800>极限攻岩</color>
- After all, Isamu was a resourceful person. A simple and naive person like Ryuuji wouldn't ever be suitable as an adviser, but he could certainly be a loyal and trustworthy aid. ｜ 毕竟鹰司勇也不是什么简单角色，遇到龙二这种单纯又天真的家伙，拿他当个幕僚不行，当个心腹，当条忠犬，绰绰有余。
- You don't come across that kind of opportunity every day! Why don't we start a dig somewhere? If we're lucky, we might unearth something super valuable. Then we'd never have to worry about running out of Mora again! ｜ 机会难得，我们也在附近挖挖看吧。要是运气好的话，说不定就能挖到超级厉害的宝石，再也不用担心摩拉不够用啦！

- Well, after all this hype, Paimon kinda does want to see what it's like to use a Crococannon! ｜ 也对，聊了这么久，我也想试试看了，操纵「鳄鳄炮炮」的感觉究竟是什么样的呢？

- Ooh, where should I go next? This whole place is so lively... ｜ 唔，下一站去哪里呢…好像哪里都很热闹…

- It's hard to believe that's even possible! ｜ 这种事也能做到吗？！
- While the waters have receded for now, no one knows what's going to happen. Perhaps you also know of the "prophecy"... ｜ 虽然现在潮水已经退了，但说不好接下来会怎样，你可能也知道「预言」的事情…
- You're back, Traveler! How have things gone? Did you manage to get those pictures? ｜ 旅行者，你已经回来了啊，怎么样？你拍到画片了吗？
- Hehe, what Paimon's hearing is that things will be fine as long as we escort her. Don't worry, we're very experienced at this sorta thing! ｜ #嘿嘿，我猜斯露莎是想说，只要我们护送她回去就好啦。放心吧，在这方面我跟{NICKNAME}可是经验丰富呢！

- For us to meet now is premature. Nevertheless, you set foot on these islands at precisely the right moment. ｜ 我们的相遇，有些为时过早。但你踏上这片岛屿的时机，却刚刚合适。
- My reality shattered when I found out that the father who always told me hero stories was in fact a bad guy, but look at me now... am I any different? ｜ 最喜欢英雄故事的父亲竟然是个坏人，这件事让我幻灭，但我又何尝不是一样？

- I'm Tiantian. I usually hang out around the Feiyun Slope, looking to recruit new people into the Adventurers' Guild. ｜ 我叫甜甜，平常总在绯云坡附近转悠，为协会招揽新人。
- Not bad! I think you're on the right track. One of your answers was correct. ｜ 不错，我觉得…您已经快摸清思路了。您已经找到了一个问题的正确答案。
- I have tried that in the past... but it did not turn out so well. Colors produced that way turn out rather murky — they lack the striking brilliance the sun has... ｜ 掺水的话…之前也尝试过，但效果并不是太好。用这种方法做出来的颜料，总是灰蒙蒙的，没有太阳那种明亮的感觉…
- His biological indicators show a very low probability of lying, though I remain doubtful. ｜ 虽然他的生理体征表现出来的说谎概率很小。但是我仍然进行怀疑。
- They cannot be made to continue paying the price... for those so-called sins. ｜ 不要让「他们」继续背负…那些莫须有的罪孽了。

- It was beyond convenient. We didn't have to spend an extended amount of time studying, so we were able to immediately run various tests and experiments. ｜ 可以说是方便至极，我们不用下苦工去钻研，就能快速进行各种实验。

- When Action Phase begins, you gain 1 Eremite Teatime card. ｜ 行动阶段开始时，我方获得1张「镀金旅团的茶歇」。
- Elphane ｜ 欧菲妮
- Seems that it wants us to follow it. ｜ 它好像很希望我们跟它一起走。
- ...I thought I had found the perfect host. But you found the one weakness in his emotional armor... ｜ …我原本以为这是个完美的宿主，竟然也能让你找到漏洞…
- Return to Vile ｜ 返回薇尔处
- Heh. Flew away just like that... Guess it still doesn't trust us, huh? ｜ 哎呀，居然就这样飞走了，果然还是不信任我们吗…
- Ahem... That would've been far beyond me. You see, with my limited experience, I can only come up with this many prescriptions... ｜ 咳…我哪会啊。现在我手头的药方，基本上都是我自己摸索出来的…
- What kind of liquor do you prefer? ｜ 你喜欢什么酒？
- Open Date's secret room and obtain the treasure ｜ 开启伊达的密室，取得宝藏
- Oh I see. Unfortunately, I'm on duty right now... ｜ 原来是这样，不过我现在正在站岗…
- ...What is an "envoyer"? ｜ 「宫前」？
- ...I will try. To be honest, I couldn't have asked for a better outcome. ｜ …也好。这是最好的结果了。
- If it helps our art reach a wider audience, we shouldn't force ourselves to stick rigidly to the principles of "pure" handicraft. ｜ 能让更多的人欣赏到涂鸦艺术的话，完全不用拘泥于「纯手工绘制」这么一种方式。
- A stately fireplace, most elegant and gorgeous, similar to the one used in the House of the Hearth.\nIt is said that some ancient legends hold a hearth to be the symbol of "home," not only providing protection for children at night, but also providing a path to a new life.\nThough... Even if the fire has gone out, the children have now grown strong enough to protect themselves. ｜ 华丽古雅的壁炉，与「壁炉之家」所用的壁炉形制相同。\n据说，在某些古老的传说中，炉火是「家」的象征，它不仅会在夜晚为孩童们提供庇护，更会为他们提供新生的甬道。\n不过…如今没有炉火，孩童们也有足以自保的力量了。
- As well as ensuring that I'd be safely cut off from certain things... The thought that I might be able to actually live a happy life there must have been the icing on the cake. ｜ 让我隔绝于「某些事物」之外，当然，如果能活得快乐就更好了。
- Dumdum! Dumdum! ｜ 哑巴！哑巴！
- Never mind the goods, I'm lucky just to have escaped with my life. ｜ 只丢了东西，留了一条命，对我来说就很好运了。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- That won't help us with The Captain, I'm afraid. In any case, the Masters of the Night-Wind are in urgent need of manpower. Citlali, I was hoping you could head back and help defend the tribe. ｜ 那恐怕也还是对付不了「队长」。另外，烟谜主急需人手布防，时间紧迫，茜特菈莉，我希望你先回部族帮忙。
- Yeah, he explained everything. ｜ 嗯，公爵都解释清楚了。
- "Do you remember Uyuu Restaurant? We shall meet there. You will find money for wine attached herein." ｜ 「还记得『乌有亭』吗？我们会在那里相聚，酒钱也随信寄来了。」
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- Yes, and this amount will do the job as well. Thank you for the trouble... ｜ 没错，这些就足够了。真是辛苦你们了…
- No one knows why the legendary gladiator wore this flower on his chest. It was the brutal warrior's only weakness. ｜ 无人知晓传奇的斗士为何始终将这朵小花戴在胸口，这是残酷的战士身上唯一的弱点。
- Are you really alright, Kazuha? ｜ 万叶，你真的不要紧吗？
- And since this happened to me, does that mean it could happen to everyone else, too? ｜ 既然我会遇到这种情况，那是不是意味着，我们大家都有这种可能？
- We haven't seen Hat Guy since the end of the competition... Oh well, it's almost meal time. We'd better go meet up with Kaveh and Cyno now. ｜ 好像从比赛结束后就没见到阿帽…快到聚餐的时间了，我们先回卡维和赛诺那边吧。
- Hit %2% Storage Drums within %1%s ｜ 在%1%秒内投掷命中%2%个储存罐
- That would be pretty great, actually. I hope my tribe gets through okay. ｜ 那样倒是最好了，希望「沃陆之邦」也不会有事。
- They've gradually taken this form in order to survive the apocalypse. ｜ 为了在「末日」之中生存下去，它们逐渐改变了形态，成了现在的样子。
- Energy Cost|{param7:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param7:I}

- Eh? You've beaten all the monsters already? ｜ 欸？你就这么把魔物全都打倒了？
- Time Remaining: #1#s ｜ 剩余时间：#1#秒

- #Ah, my fine {F#lass}{M#lad}, that's a splendiferous question! ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BOYC|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_GIRLC]}，这是个好问题！
- Oh, so you've been wondering about that too, huh? Now that we have some time on our hands, let's go and take another look. ｜ 唔…果然你也在惦记那个，那就趁有空的时候去看一眼吧。
- I've heard that you've been working hard on your studies, so I've prepared some study materials for you at Sucrose's request. Feel free to look through them whenever you can find the time. Mondstadt's doors will always remain open to you. ｜ 听说你也在刻苦求学，这些是砂糖托我帮你准备的学习思路，有空可以看看，也欢迎你以后常来蒙德。
- An extract from milk. With the appropriate application, it can bring rich aromas to even the most basic ingredients. ｜ 从牛奶中分离提制的乳脂肪。适当添加，能让哪怕平凡的原料，也散发出甜蜜浓厚的香气。
- 抵制不良游戏，拒绝盗版游戏，注意自我保护，谨防受骗上当，适度游戏益脑，沉迷游戏伤身，合理安排时间，享受健康生活。\n审批文号：国新出审[2019]2978号   ISBN 978-7-498-06905-4  出版单位：华东师范大学电子音像出版社有限公司\n著作权人：上海米哈游天命科技有限公司\n本公司积极履行《网络游戏行业防沉迷自律公约》 ｜ 抵制不良游戏，拒绝盗版游戏，注意自我保护，谨防受骗上当，适度游戏益脑，沉迷游戏伤身，合理安排时间，享受健康生活。\n审批文号：国新出审[2019]2978号   ISBN 978-7-498-06905-4  出版单位：华东师范大学电子音像出版社有限公司\n著作权人：上海米哈游天命科技有限公司\n本公司积极履行《网络游戏行业防沉迷自律公约》
- And yet, you're capable of bending the elements to your will... What an enviable gift. Unfortunately, I wasn't blessed with such a gift. ｜ 但是却能自如驱使元素力…令人艳羡的天赋。很遗憾我没有获得这样的天赋。

- Well, for example, I once had a case where someone backed out of a deal with me to sell to someone else. We were both offering the exact same terms, it was simply because they didn't like me very much. ｜ 比如在同等的交易条件下，商品的持有人因为对我的反感，将东西卖给了别人。
- A Natlan drink made from Cacahuatl. If you had to guess before you took a swig, you might assume it would taste either sweet or bitter, but never in a million years would you have expected the sourness that sets upon the tip of your tongue... Did someone add the wrong ingredients? ｜ 苦种制成的纳塔饮品。事先猜想会品尝到或甜或苦的味道，却万万没想到舌尖传来的是酸味…难道加错了什么食材吗？
- Haha... Hello there, you two. We were just, um... Ororon and I, we were, uh... play acting... ｜ 哈哈…你们好啊，那什么…刚才我和欧洛伦在玩，模仿游戏…

- Yep. ｜ 是的。

- Just get a good night's sleep, everyone! ｜ 大家就好好睡觉吧！
- Uther, however, just has it out for me as a designer. He's publicly disparaged my design choices, my use of materials — he's practically tried every trick in the book to ruin my good name. ｜ 他一直看不惯我的设计，还公开诋毁我的设计理念和衣装用料。

- Whenever a "Speedy Rhythm" furnishing combination scores a point, a lamp on the "Scoreboard" will light up. This furnishing combination can record 10 points at most. When all the lamps are lit, the score can be reset, which will restore the "Scoreboard" to its original state. ｜ 「疾行节奏」摆设组合每记录一次得分，「计分灯架」上将有一盏灯笼发光。此摆设组合最多记录10次得分。灯笼全部发光后，可以重置计分，使「计分灯架」回到初始状态。
- Hmm? I think I hear something. ｜ 欸？我好像听见什么声音。
- Place unprocessed widget in ｜ 放入未加工的工件
- I panicked and ran, but lost my way. It took me forever to find my cart again. Then, this morning, I found out my <color=#00E1FFFF>key</color> was gone... ｜ 我很害怕，但是又找不到方向，跑了半天才回到了车旁边。今天早上，我发现我的<color=#00E1FFFF>钥匙</color>不见了…
- J—Just last night! He said that the Marechaussee Phantom is now after him, so he's planning to go into hiding for some time. He didn't mention where he's thinking about going, though... But he did tell me to look out for the Gardes... ｜ 就、就在昨天夜里！说是逐影庭已经找上来了，他准备先躲一段时间，但没告诉我他躲在哪…还让我也注意着点…

- Oh, right, yes! I mean, I am getting on years, you know? Starting to forget and all, haha! ｜ 哦…对对，哎呀人年纪大了，记性就越来越差了哈哈。
- Anemo Slimes can fire a wind bolt when floating. However, one hit is enough to take them out in this state. ｜ 浮空时能发射风弹攻击。但这种状态下会被一击消灭。
- Under the blade of a master chef, the texture of the ingredients remains pristine. Upon consumption, it is as if something living is leaping inside your mouth...\nHold on, could these ingredients still be... ｜ 在厨师高超的刀工下，食材保留着最为巅峰的口感。入口时，仿佛依然带着生命力在唇齿间跳跃…\n等一等，难道这些食材真的还…
- Boss of "Jiulue Teahouse" ｜ 「九略茶馆」老板
- Wow, full-memory Shiki Taishou is a force to be reckoned with! ｜ 记忆完全恢复的「式大将」…给人一种坚定又可靠的印象呢！
- As a Gestionnaire of the Maison Gestion, orders from the Chief Justice are an imperative, carrying the full weight of the administration. Simply put, you have no choice but to write it. ｜ 你作为复律官，最高审判官的命令对你来说具有行政意义上的强制性。简单来说就是，你不得不写。
- Earn {param2} points ｜ 达到{param2}积分
- ...Is the answer not coming to you, or do you think it's too unbelievable to be true? ｜ …是没想到，还是不愿意这么联想呢？
- Okay, well... Assuming Bonnie hasn't strayed too far from where she went missing, there's a chance we might bump into her owner in either The Steambird offices or the restaurant... ｜ 嗯…如果邦妮就是在这附近走丢的话，进到报社或者饭店里，都容易跟她主人错过…
- Whoa, that's... a lot... ｜ 呜啊…怎么这么多…
- "Our restaurant has been a bit shorthanded lately, so we're hiring another host or hostess to help out! No special requirements, just passion for the job and a sunny disposition." ｜ 「我们餐厅的人手有些不够，因此想再招一位侍应来帮忙。这个工作没有什么特殊的要求，只要热情阳光就好。」
- (Fortunately, the coin turned up heads. Now it's Kaeya's turn. ) ｜ （结果是正面。幸好幸好，没出问题，接下来该看凯亚的了。）
- While searching for ingredients, I can travel the forest and get closer to it. That's the true meaning of my cooking training. ｜ 寻找食材的过程中，就可以到森林的各个地方去，亲近森林，这才是「烹饪修行」的真义嘛。

- Uh... I will have a... a large Dusk, please. Thanks! ｜ 大杯的暮色，谢啦。

- That I have. He comes here every night — just to drink, though. Doesn't order anything else. ｜ 见过，他每天晚上都会来光顾，只喝酒，不吃其他的东西。

- But I suppose you have yet to experience the substance of Liyue's three thousand and seven hundred years of divinity. ｜ 不过，「有神之地」三千七百年的历史厚度，或许你还没有完全体验到吧。
- Between the people who fled into the city to seek shelter and those who fell unconscious without warning, we've got our hands full here. ｜ 不少的人进城来避难，还有那些陷入莫名昏睡的人，城里的事务就快要忙不过来了。

- A fish with unique morphology and Fontaine's cousin to the butterfly fish. This fish has a broad skeleton and a unique curved body. Legend has it that the first fishermen to catch this fish had their rods tilted at the end of the tail fin and found that the two, when combined, resemble a polearm, hence giving rise to the name "Axe Marlin." This name has made much more of an impression than its scientific name, the "Anchor Hook Butterfly," and it is thus colloquially used amongst most people.\nIt is said that these sea-blue Axe Marlins were a special type that migrated from Sumeru to Fontaine. Compared to their more mild-tempered cousins in Sumeru, Streaming Axe Marlins are tougher and can survive in far more inhospitable environments. They are also known to travel extremely long distances, comparable even to those covered by some merchant vessels. As a result, some sailors see them as an emblem of courage and patience. ｜ 形貌独特的鱼类，是蝶鱼的枫丹远亲。这种鱼类的骨架宽大，身形曲线独具一格。相传最早钓上这种鱼的鱼师将钓竿斜放在尾鳍末端，发现两者结合后形如某种长柄武器，为其取名「斧枪鱼」。相比它的学名「锚钩蝶」，这个名字更为形象，因而在民间广为流传。\n传说，有着「海涛蓝」色泽的斧枪鱼是从须弥水域迁徙至枫丹的特例。相比性格温和的须弥亲属，海涛斧枪鱼的确有着更为坚忍的性格，能在恶劣的环境下长期生存，或是长途跋涉，航程媲美一些商船。因此，也有船员将其视为勇气和耐心的象征。

- Required Contribution Points ｜ 需要贡献值
- Indeed it is. But to us adventurers, danger is just our bread and butter! ｜ 话是这样说的，但是对于我们冒险家而言，「危险」也只是家常便饭而已啦！
- We didn't see you at all, either! ｜ 而且，我们来这里的路上，根本就没见到你…
- A cheap accessory that is actually made from ancient meteoric ore. ｜ 便宜的饰物，却是远古时代的陨星带来的奇特的金属制成。
- One might not expect this from her frosty attitude and sharp tongue, but Eula is a talented chef.\nThe Reconnaissance Company today prides itself on having the best field rations in the Knights of Favonius. One staple of their inventory is a moon-shaped pie. Though a field ration, this wonderfully delicious and highly portable food is loved by all who try it.\nThe Reconnaissance Company's designated chef once admitted that when developing this item, she was inspired by the captain's own baked goods. She extended the baking time to make the crust tougher and also substituted a few highly perishable ingredients with ones that last longer, reducing the cost while significantly prolonging the shelf life.\nEven after such a major change to the recipe, the pie still tasted delicious. So, whenever the scouts are snacking, they can't help but wonder: If this is the field ration version, how delicious must the captain's original recipe taste?\nThe answer to this question is buried deep within the pages of a dusty old book in the library. The Lawrence Clan may have been overthrown a long time ago, but they have never given up hope of one day rising again and reclaiming their place as the ruling class. So that they are always prepared for this monumental moment, their offspring are subjected to an educational regime so unbelievably harsh that it is considered borderline abusive.\n"Noble obligations" must be performed to absolute perfection in every possible sense, and these obligations cover etiquette, ritual, and study as well as cooking and other domestic chores.\nIn the eyes of the Lawrence Clan, "Post-liberation Mondstadt lacks etiquette and taste. When the day comes for our clan to seize power once more, there shall be none who are qualified to be our servants. We must be cautious. We must never stoop to the level of the commoners and set foot in the quagmire of vulgarity."\nThe Lawrence Clan's culinary arts teacher was particularly strict. If your dough was missing a half-spoonful of flour, or if your condiment was a few grains of salt short, or if you were two seconds late removing something from the oven, you were likely to be both scolded and disciplined. As far as Eula is concerned, the haute cuisine revered by the aristocrats is just another worthless consequence of people dogmatically following outdated rules.\nFor this reason, the only kind of person who Eula will permit to try her own home baking is someone who she... respects...? No, that would be taking it too far. Rather, it should be someone who she grudgingly accepts "will keep following me around and bothering me, seemingly undeterred by my warnings, despite having crossed me many times to date." ｜ 有别于平日那份疏远与锐利，优菈在厨艺方面颇有心得，能做一手好菜。\n如今的游击小队常以「骑士团最好的军粮」自傲。他们行囊中常备有一种月亮形状的派。这类便携口粮味道相当美妙，尝过的人都赞不绝口。\n小队专属的厨师姑娘曾提过，她研发这种口粮时参考了队长做的点心，通过延长烘烤时间来为派皮增加韧性，更替换了食谱中难保存的材料，在降低成本的同时大大延长了食品保存周期。\n即使经过了如此程度的改良，派本身仍很美味。游击小队的大家吃着点心，忍不住遐想起来：队长做的原版月亮派，到底有多美味？\n这一问题的答案，藏在图书馆某本古籍之中——即使早已没落，劳伦斯家仍期望着重回统治阶层。为了随时迎接这一伟大时刻，他们对子女的教育和培养严苛到了堪称病态的地步。\n所谓「高贵者的义务」，是要在方方面面做到无可挑剔。不止仪态、礼节和学术，还有厨艺与家务。\n劳伦斯家认定，「解放后的蒙德缺乏礼教和品味。他日家族重夺大权，却未必能找到合格的佣人。必须小心，绝不可落入俗人的泥潭。」\n劳伦斯家的厨艺老师相当苛刻。调制面团只差半勺小麦粉、调料的用量只差几颗盐、出炉时机只差两秒…都有可能招致训斥与惩罚。旁人羡煞的厨艺，对优菈而言，仅仅是遵循陈旧家规的无用结果之一。\n因此，唯有获得她的认可…不，唯有被她认定「已记仇多次，令人困扰又无法直言相待，总是徘徊在身旁」的对象，才能尝到她亲手制作的点心吧。

- In the land of Liyue by the sea, a city sits atop the solid bedrock. That city is Liyue Harbor, and it has flourished under the protection of its guardian Morax — also known as "Rex Lapis," the Geo Archon you have been looking for. You could not have arrived at a more fortuitous time, as the annual "Rite of Descension" has just begun. Every year on this day, Rex Lapis graces this land with his prophecy, giving guidance on the economic path Liyue should follow in the coming year. ｜ 在璃月之地的海边，有一座伫立于坚岩的城市，「璃月港」。庇护着这座城市与璃月全境的，是你所要寻找的岩之神摩拉克斯，又名「岩王帝君」。你抵达璃月港时，恰逢一年一度的「七星请仙典仪」。每年的这一日里，岩王帝君都会赐下神谕，指引这一年璃月经营的方向。

- Archery contests are a Windblume Festival tradition that commemorate the early days of Mondstadt, an age of pioneering and hunting...\nChallenging archery competitions have also been prepared for this year's Windblume Festival.\nThose who are well-versed in these arts will, naturally, be able to win the prizes and wow the residents of Mondstadt. ｜ 弓箭挑战是风花节的传统游戏，旨在纪念蒙德建立之初，那段开拓与狩猎的历史…\n今年的风花节同样设置了极具挑战性的弓箭竞赛项目。\n精通个中玄妙的高超射手，自然能赢得赛事的奖励与蒙德居民的敬重。

- When the character equipping this artifact set heals a character in the party, a Sea-Dyed Foam will appear for 3 seconds, accumulating the amount of HP recovered from healing (including overflow healing). At the end of the duration, the Sea-Dyed Foam will explode, dealing DMG to nearby opponents based on 90% of the accumulated healing. (This DMG is calculated similarly to Reactions such as Electro-Charged, and Superconduct, but is not affected by Elemental Mastery, Character Levels, or Reaction DMG Bonuses). Only one Sea-Dyed Foam can be produced every 3.5 seconds. Each Sea-Dyed Foam can accumulate up to 30,000 HP (including overflow healing). There can be no more than one Sea-Dyed Foam active at any given time. This effect can still be triggered even when the character who is using this artifact set is not on the field. ｜ 装备此圣遗物套装的角色对队伍中的角色进行治疗时，将产生持续3秒的海染泡沫，记录治疗的生命值回复量（包括溢出值）。持续时间结束时，海染泡沫将会爆炸，对周围的敌人造成90%累计回复量的伤害（该伤害结算方式同感电、超导等元素反应，但不受元素精通、等级或反应伤害加成效果影响）。每3.5秒至多产生一个海染泡沫；海染泡沫至多记录30000点回复量，含溢出部分的治疗量；自己的队伍中同时至多存在一个海染泡沫。装备此圣遗物套装的角色处于队伍后台时，依然能触发该效果。

- The equipping character can gain the Remedy effect. When they possess 1/2/3 Remedy stacks, Max HP will increase by <color=#99FFFFFF>24%/48%/80%</color>. 1 stack may be gained when the following conditions are met: 1 stack for 25s when using an Elemental Skill; 1 stack for 25s when the value of a Bond of Life value increases; 1 stack for 20s for performing healing. Stacks can still be triggered when the equipping character is not on the field. Each stack's duration is counted independently. In addition, when 3 stacks are active, Elemental Burst CRIT Rate will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>56%</color>. This effect will be canceled 4s after falling under 3 stacks. ｜ 装备者能获得「疗护」效果，持有1/2/3层疗护时，生命值上限提升<color=#99FFFFFF>24%/48%/80%</color>。在下列情况下，装备者将各获得1层疗护：施放元素战技时，持续25秒；生命之契的数值增加时，持续25秒；进行治疗时，持续20秒，装备者处于队伍后台时依然能触发。每层疗护的持续时间独立计算。此外，处于3层疗护状态下时，元素爆发的暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>56%</color>，该效果将在疗护不足3层4秒后移除。

- Has the <color=#F39000>Endurance</color> characteristic, which will appear in potions under certain conditions. ｜ 具备<color=#F39000>持久</color>特征，在特定条件下可以显现在药剂中。

- Two girls of similar ages hummed a melody that was slightly out of tune. They spent their innocent childhood hand-in-hand as constant companions.\nThey each picked flowers to decorate the other's hair in spring and walked across creeks barefoot in summer.\nThey slid down the golden sand dunes in autumn and shared a book in the warmth of the winter sunlight.\nIt seemed that such happy times would never come to an end.\nThat is, until the elder sister started coughing blood for no reason. At this time, their home came to be ringed by a great many strange adults.\nThe strangers explained the elder sister's situation in serious tones and with unfathomable jargon before sighing at the dingy little room.\nThe younger sister had no idea what was happening, but she visited her sister every day, and her sister would always say this to her with a bright smile:\n"It's alright. I just need some rest."\nSeeing that smile, the innocent younger sister's eyes filled with expectation. She even began looking forward to playing together like they used to.\nBut one day, she saw her sister gripping her chest while telling a story.\nThen, when her frail form collapsed onto the bed, the younger sister reached out to catch her, only to find that her body was so very light.\n...It was almost as if her sister were a feather, a feather that might drift away to some place far, far away.\nLater on, the younger sister found a crumpled note.\nIt was a doctor's prescription, with a list of herbs that were desperately scarce — the collectors who had such herbs were few and far between.\nTo purchase those herbs would cost more than tens of millions of Mora, an impossible price for a family that was already struggling to make the ends meet.\nThe elder sister always shook her head with a smile to dismiss her family's insistence on following the prescription. Perhaps she herself could only find the courage to glance at that note in the deep hours of the night — and dare to dream that she might "live."\nUpon finding out about the note, the younger sister put it into her pocket silently and resolved to save her sister.\n"I must make a lot of Mora."\n"With enough Mora, my family will never have to smile at me while swallowing their pain, and I will never have to lose anything due to lacking Mora..."\nPerhaps it was at that moment that the gods looked upon her with mercy.\nBut to an "ambitious" person like her, getting a Vision was just the start.\nIn the countless days and nights that have followed, she has constantly kept herself calm and clear-headed, telling herself:\n"Conviction alone is not enough. I will work hard for what I desire until the end of my days."\n"There's nothing that Lord Sangemah Bay cannot achieve." ｜ 两位年龄相仿的小女孩牵着手，哼着轻微变调的歌谣，并肩走过天真烂漫的时光。\n她们在春天折野花戴在彼此的耳旁，光着脚蹚过夏天的溪水。\n在秋天一同从金色的沙丘滑下，依偎在冬天的阳光里看同一本书。\n时间仿佛很长，怎么也过不完。\n直到年长一些的姐姐忽然开始不停咳血，家里围了许许多多陌生的大人。\n他们一本正经地解释着旁人难以理解的病情，随后对着家徒四壁的房屋摇头叹气。\n不知道发生了什么的妹妹每天都去探望，姐姐总是露出明亮的笑容：\n「没事。休息一下就会好的啦。」\n看着她的笑容，天真的妹妹也流露出期待的眼神，甚至开始幻想下次一起出游的日子。\n直到某一天，正在讲故事的姐姐忽然伸手攥紧了胸口的衣服。\n她瘦削的身体栽倒在床上，妹妹伸手去抱她，才发现她的身体很轻很轻。\n…就像一根羽毛，慢慢飘向所有人都触摸不到的远方。\n后来，妹妹在她的枕头下找到了一张揉皱的纸条。\n那是医生开的药方，上面罗列着已经几乎绝迹的药材，只有少数私人收藏家那里还有存货。\n想要购买的话至少需要几千万摩拉，一个令穷困家庭不敢想象的价格。\n总是笑着摇头拒绝这个提议的姐姐，或许只敢在深夜的时候看上几眼，幻想着那遥不可及的「活下去」的希望。\n妹妹将纸条收进衣服的口袋，默默地下了决心。\n「要赚多多的摩拉。」\n「这样就不会再看到亲近的人露出难过的笑脸，这样就不会再因为没有摩拉而失去什么…」\n也许就是在那时，神明的视线落在了她的身上。\n但对于「野心」疯涨的她来说，获得神之眼或许也只是一个开始。\n在今后的无数个日夜中，她不停地告诫自己保持清醒，同时在心里给自己打气：\n「只有执念是不够的。我会为了想要的东西不停努力，直至耗尽最后一分力气。」\n「桑歌玛哈巴依老爷，没有做不到的事。」

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Heated Battle Mode Rules</color>\nIn The Cat's Tail, entertaining events are held regularly, with various players being invited to participate.\nEach event will adopt a special set of Heated Battle Mode rules.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Invite Teammate</color>\nYou can invite a teammate within your world to engage in a Genius Invokation TCG duel in Heated Battle Mode, where special rules apply.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Match-Making</color>\nThis will unlock once you reach Player Level 4. You can use this mode to match against players at the same power level as you and duel them in Heated Battle Mode, where special rules apply. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【热斗模式规则】</color>\n在猫尾酒馆中，会定期举办让各位牌手参加的趣味对局活动。\n每期活动，都会启用一个特殊的「热斗模式」规则。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【邀请队友】</color>\n可以邀请你的世界内的队友，在特殊规则下进行「七圣召唤：热斗模式」的决斗对局。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【匹配】</color>\n牌手等级到达4级后开启。可以通过该模式匹配到实力相当的牌手，在特殊规则下进行「七圣召唤：热斗模式」的决斗对局。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Rules</color>\nYou will start first.\nYour opponent will follow a certain order of actions each Round, and you can use the Intent system to see their moves and the order of these moves. During your opponent's Action Phase, they will only use the Skill(s) of their active character.\nSome of these stages will have you facing opponents who will have characters other than the ones currently on the field. These opponents will bring new Character Cards up to replace Character Cards as they are defeated. Be wary!\nOnce you have defeated all of your opponent's Character Cards, you can claim victory. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【规则说明】</color>\n玩家会以先手开始对局。\n对手会在每个回合根据一定的顺序进行行动，可在局内通过意图系统查看对手的行动与行动顺序。在对手的行动中，对手仅会使用场上角色牌的技能。\n部分关卡内，对手的角色牌不止有场上这些，还会有候补的角色牌在场上的角色牌被击倒后进行补位，请留意。\n玩家击败对手全部的角色牌后，即可获取游戏的胜利。

- Whew... That sure was scary, with those monsters attacking out of nowhere like that. Good thing we're super strong, huh? ｜ 呼——吓死我了，突然就有怪物袭击过来了，还好我们足够厉害！
- Well, so far it's mostly just empty promises. Anyway, it's supposed to be a music festival. The organizer really did a number on me last time. They canceled on me. But I hear that they're still active. ｜ 哎呀雷声大雨点小，反正就是个音乐盛典，主办还坑过我。虽然上次放了我鸽子，但听说他们还在活动。
- Apart from selling fireworks, Naganohara Fireworks also sells various intricate knickknacks. This can be said to be Yoimiya's second career.\nAll manner of trinkets adorn the shelves, with some of them being exotic imports from Beidou that were modified and made into highly distinctive handicrafts, and others being practice works created during bursts of Yoimiya's explosive inspiration.\nFrom the Scatterbloom Marbles that will blossom when they knock against each other, Leaping Tops that chirp like birds as they spin, the Neon Dragonfly that changes hue as it ascends into the air, and the somewhat-failed Onikabuto Chariot... All these toys are inspired by the little games that the common people play.\nThey are not only popular among the children, but are much-loved by adults as well. Even Arataki Itto, the head of the Arataki Gang, comes over to buy her specially-made knickknacks, which he then brings to go challenge the one he has declared his nemesis.\nYoimiya's knickknacks are not just toys. With some thought, they can be very useful in one's daily life. The most classic example of this is the Katydid Coil, which is a ring that can contain a variety of flammables and spices. When ignited and hung up in the summer, it can be used to repel mosquitoes.\nMany people have come to ask Yoimiya for help on account of her excellent craftsmanship. And though she protests, saying, "Hey now, this is a fireworks shop, not an everything shop. Even I can't possibly do it all," she will still try her best to help, even if her earnings for the whole day are only enough to buy a few snacks. She'll enjoy the whole thing, too — everyone in Hanamizaka is her friend, after all. ｜ 平时的「长野原烟花店」除了贩卖烟花，还会出售各种精巧的纪念品。可以说，这些纪念品就是宵宫的第二事业。\n货架上的纪念品五花八门，一部分是北斗带给宵宫的舶来品，经过适当改造，成了很有特色的工艺品，另一部分则是宵宫灵感爆发做出的练手作品。\n碰撞后绽放出花瓣的「散华弹珠」，旋转时发出清亮鸟鸣的「雀跃陀螺」，升空后不断变色的「霓光蜻蜓」，还有实在算不上成功的「鬼兜虫战车」…玩具的灵感全都来源于民间盛行的小游戏。\n它们不仅受到孩子的喜爱，很多成年人也对它们爱不释手。甚至连「荒泷派」的头目荒泷一斗都专程前来购买宵宫制作的纪念品，带去和他口中的劲敌一较高下。\n宵宫做的纪念品不只是玩具。只要加入一些巧思，就能在生活中派上大用场。最典型的当属「螽退轮」，一种装有多种燃剂和香料的小圆环，夏夜里将它点燃挂起，就能驱赶蚊虫。\n有些邻居看中宵宫手艺精湛，请她上门帮忙。尽管宵宫口口声声说着「烟花店可不是万事屋，我也不是有求必应的」，但每次接到委托，依然会尽心尽力帮助对方，哪怕忙活一天的报酬只能买下几份小吃，宵宫也乐在其中。毕竟，花见坂的大家都是宵宫的好朋友嘛。
- Yay, that's awesome! ｜ 哇，太好了！
- Talk to the strange Pari ｜ 与古怪的花灵对话
- Administrative Announcement ｜ 行政命令告示
- I... I didn't... ｜ 我…我没有…
- Davy Smith Jr. ｜ 小戴维·史密斯
- Stay here a while and you might even start wondering whether time has stopped. ｜ 在这里呆着的时候，你有时候甚至会怀疑，时间是不是静止了。
- Anyway, now that the case has finally been solved, perhaps it will slowly begin to fade from the public consciousness. ｜ 总之，事情真的算告一段落了，「少女连环失踪案」也会逐渐淡出人们的视野了吧。
- My waistband has been feeling a little snug these last couple of days... Methinks I perchance have overindulged... ｜ 这两天总觉得身上腰封有点紧，难道…我胖了？
- Eh? You're leaving? Already? ｜ 咦，你这就要走了吗？
- Taketani ｜ 竹谷
- Regardless, they, like you, took this job from me, but they all wound up being unable to retrieve the Maushiro that they could've sworn they got. ｜ 总之，和你一样，他们回来向我交差时，却毫无例外地，无论如何也找不到本应拿到手的木簧笛。
- Whenever the instructor wore this brooch, it meant there would be no training sessions that day. ｜ 教官的胸口别着这种花的时候，意味着今日不练兵。
- A well in close proximity to a tree.\nThe tree's lush foliage serves as assurance that the water is clean and pure, safe for human consumption. ｜ 紧靠树木的水井。\n树木枝叶茂盛，证明此地水源洁净，来往之人可以放心取用。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启
- I'll bet you're just trying to mask your failure by sowing dissent. ｜ 我看你是蒙混过关不成，想要挑拨离间我等。
- I've been watching the waves crashing since my husband sailed out. Well, except during storms, of course. ｜ 自从丈夫做了水手，我就总是在这里看海。——当然，暴风雨的时候除外啦。

- I see Degui over there. Let's observe for a minute, shall we? ｜ 看到德贵了吧，我们在这里观察一下吧。
- Well now, I suppose I should give you a copy of this recipe. You can make it for yourself if you have the time. It's a little troublesome, but it tastes pretty good. ｜ 喏，这份食谱我也抄给你一份，你有空的话，也可以自己做来吃一吃，虽然麻烦了些，但味道还是不错的。
- I'm counting on you, then! ｜ #那就拜托{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}啦。
- Haha, alright, alright. Can we safely say that you've accepted this commission, then? ｜ 哈哈，好啦好啦…所以说，前辈会接受这个委托吗？
- No need. I'll have someone deliver it to the festival market. Just collect it from the Angel's Share stand. ｜ 不用，我会差人送去集市。你们到「天使的馈赠」摊位附近领取就行。
- Life is unpredictable. If you two meet again and greet each other warmly like nothing has changed, then this would certainly be a joyous occasion. But if you are disappointed, then just accept this as one's lot in life. It's nothing to lament or cry about. Relax... ｜ 世间浮沉人难料，若将来有幸重逢，故交好友互无猜疑，热诚相待，自然人生大幸。若失却所望，也只是境遇所致，无须嗟怨，请您宽心。

- The breeze is restless today. ｜ 今天的风声，不太安静呢。
- Roialte leaves in a hurry... ｜ 洛耶茨急匆匆地离开了…

- C—Completely relax? But we're at a cafe, is this not relaxing enough...? ｜ 彻底放松？现在还不够彻底吗…
- An artificed Stretchy Geo Fungus that looks much the same as those normally encountered... ｜ 被拟想而出的「伸缩岩蕈兽」，看起来似乎和寻常所见的「伸缩岩蕈兽」并无太大差别…

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making an Exquisite Hourglass Ornament.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「精巧的沙漏摆件」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- A lot of suspicious evidence has already been collected. It's time to confront Chief Densuke. ｜ 已经搜集了不少可疑的证据了。是时候与村长传助对峙了。

- That's right, after all, the costs of running this Furball Fortress are all coming right out of her pocket. ｜ 没错，毕竟这间「猫茸茸城堡」花费的都是瓦乐瑞娜的存款呢。
- But when I looked at the art, the brushwork did not even look the slightest bit rushed. His work is truly exquisite... ｜ 但在我看来，那张插图的笔触却丝毫不见仓促，实在是精妙绝伦…
- "Come on, let me take you on a journey through the wonderful world of cards — I'm quite the skilled player myself!"\nHint: Mualani's deck revolves around "Summons" and excels at frequently switching active characters to flexibly deal damage. ｜ 「来吧，带你游历卡牌的奇妙世界——我这个向导也是个厉害的牌手哦！」\n【提示】玛拉妮的牌组以「召唤物」为核心，并且擅长来回切换出战角色，从而灵活地进行输出。
- As embarrassing as this is... I have been so focused on gathering inspiration here that only now do I realize: I have completely forgotten to eat today. Suddenly, I feel rather ravenous. ｜ 说来有些不好意思，我一直在这取材，却忘了吃饭，现在有些饿了…
- Until we meet again, everyone. ｜ 那么…后会有期。
- Take one. Consider it your compensation for being Lisa's little helper today. ｜ 拿一本去吧，算是今天作为我助手的酬劳。

- But... Well... This password has expired, now that we just changed it. Now it's... Well, it's a little embarrassing, haha. It's that... little... thing. ｜ 但是，呃…这个口令已经过期了，我们刚刚换了口令，是…嘿嘿，我不太好意思说…就是那个，那个小东西…

- When you have reached the maximum obtainable amount of Windtrace Coins, further game participation will not net you any.\nYou will not be able to gain Windtrace Coins if you play in a custom four-person party. ｜ 迷踪币达到上限后，参与游戏将无法获得「迷踪币」。\n四名玩家自行组队状态下，参与游戏将无法获得「迷踪币」。
- Listening and responding to the people's pleas is the duty of the Knights of Favonius.\nWithout enough people to do the job, however, the Knights are currently placing heavy emphasis on the "listening" part.\nAccepting Requests from Hertha and completing them will increase your Reputation.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Request: Limits and Resetting</color>\nYou can only take a certain number of Requests every week.\nYou can check the number of Requests you've taken this week in the Reputation Menu.\nThis limit is shared between all cities.\nNew Requests will become available every week. \n\nOnce your Reputation has hit the maximum level, you can no longer accept new Requests. ｜ 聆听并完成蒙德居民的请求，是西风骑士团的天职。\n然而如今人手不足，所以只能做到「聆听」的部分。\n及时在赫塔处领取「居民请求」并完成这些任务，可以提高声望。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【居民请求：接取限制与刷新】</color>\n每周能接取的居民请求的数量是有限的。\n本周已接取的数量可以在声望界面查看。\n所有城市共享数量限制。\n每周一都会出现新的居民请求。\n\n声望等级达到上限后，无法继续接取新的居民请求。

- I went through much trouble to get the documents ready and came all the way over here with a fleet... ｜ 我费尽千辛万苦准备好了文件，然后又千里迢迢和船队来到这里…

- Honestly, Paimon's mainly shocked at how much energy you still have at this hour. Usually, by this time of night, it's a struggle for Paimon to even keep her eyes open! ｜ 比起这个，我更想问为什么娜维娅你这么有精神，这种时候我都…哈啊…想睡觉了。
- Well, time to go get some inspiration then. ｜ 我们还是去找灵感吧。
- I never would have imagined it either. ｜ 我也没想到。
- Yes. Please wait here for a moment while I fetch Arana. ｜ 嗯。你们等我片刻，我去将兰拉娜叫来。

- Energy medium retrieved. Re-establishing corrupted signal flow. ｜ 能源介质已回收，紊乱的信流正在重新确立。

- I apologize. I do not understand. ｜ 很抱歉，我无法理解。

- Coral branches that may be found in shallow waters, whose color shifts as you look at it from bottom to top, starting light purple and finishing with bright powder blue, both of which glow faintly in the dark.\nThese coral are very rarely found near Narukami Island, but when war breaks out, one can sometimes find merchants bringing some to sell as potted plants.\nThanks to these sales, most people have a pretty decent opinion of Watatsumi Island on the whole, believing it to be an island surrounded by beautiful coral — such opinions further puzzle them as to why the Shogunate and the resistance would be at war. ｜ 可见于浅海地带的珊瑚枝，自下至上色泽渐变，由浅紫逐渐转为明亮的「瓶覗色」，在昏暗的环境，可见淡淡的荧光。\n这种珊瑚在鸣神岛附近相对少见，战争爆发前，偶尔会有商人带来一些珊瑚，作为景观盆栽售卖。\n得益于这些珊瑚，不少普通民众对海祇岛的大体印象相当不错，认为那是一座被美丽珊瑚环抱的岛屿，并对反抗军与幕府军之间的战争感到费解。
- You sure it's not because you want to watch Nilou dance? ｜ 真的不是你想看妮露跳舞吗？
- At the adventurer camp, Iris informs you that there seems to be some bizarrely hard ice blocking the paths into the mountain... ｜ 从雪山营地中的冒险家玉霞口中得知，在这座雪山之中，似乎有一些奇异的坚冰堵塞着山中的道路…
- Ah, you must be busy with other things, I suppose? In that case, pop by again when you're free — but don't go through this Lantern Rite without making a few fireworks, you hear? ｜ 您还有其他事要忙吗？那等您有空了，一定要来做一做烟花啊。

- The General at the time quite liked him, and raised both him and his hometown friend to the rank of Hatamoto. ｜ 当时的大将欣赏他，提拔他和同乡两人一跃成了旗本。
- Heh... Y'know, this was the first time in my life slaying an Abyss monster, and I realized in that moment... they're not that tough. ｜ 嗯…我生平第一次战胜了深渊魔物，在我战胜它的瞬间，我觉得它也不过如此。
- A masquerade mask worn by the old aristocrats of Mondstadt. Its hollow eyes are fixated on the golden days of the past. ｜ 曾经属于旧日蒙德贵族的舞会面具，那空洞的眼眶依旧凝望着昔日的盛景。
- As you are trying to ascertain the owner of the voice, in an instant, you find yourself in the realm of the Lord of the Night... ｜ 你正在试图辨认声音的主人，转瞬之间自己已经身处夜神的国度…
- Oh, stop trying to impress them. We both know you were the one who was hopelessly smitten and desperately trying to win my affection... ｜ 在外人面前乱讲什么，明明是你发了疯地追我好不好。

- The feeling's mutual. ｜ 这是我要说的话才对。
- Because of hatred, I presume. ｜ 我想…是因为「恨」吧。

- If you're interested, do visit the town of Petrichor in the Court of Fontaine. That's where our members gather. ｜ 如果您有兴趣的话，之后可以去枫丹廷的佩特莉可镇看看，我们的俱乐部聚会点就在那。
- To put it simply, it's as if you've mistaken a Pyro Crystalfly for a Firefly in the night. You lost sight of its true nature because you focused too much on your perception that it glows. ｜ 简单来说的话，像是捉了火元素的晶蝶来当作萤火虫去照明，太过注重「感受」，而忽略了其「本质」。
- Apart from restricting entry of outlanders to Inazuma, the Sakoku Decree also limits the areas in which we can sail. ｜ 「锁国令」除了限制外人来稻妻，同时也限制了我们出海的范围。
- You want to go to Narukami Island? Then it's not something that can be taken care of with just Mora. ｜ 想去鸣神岛？那可不是光靠摩拉就能解决的了。

Is she always like that? Hmm... In any case, starting from today, I hope all her smiles are out of genuine happiness, rather than an effort to reassure other people. ｜ 胡堂主给人感觉总是嘻嘻哈哈的，哪怕在危急的困境中她都没有忘记说玩笑话来安抚我…我跟她认识的时间不长，她一直都这样乐观积极吗？嗯…不管怎样，至少从今天开始，祝愿她笑的时候是真的很开心，而不是为了不让身边的人担心。

- This round stool is the result of adjusting the dimensions and streamlining the production process of the typical Ash Wood bench. Often found near bars or around rectangular tables in establishments like hotels and cafés within the Court of Fontaine, this lightweight and portable stool is favored by guests engaged in social gatherings. While it may lack the comfort of chairs with backrests, the joy of companionship tends to outweigh such inconveniences. ｜ 基于常见白梣木长椅的工艺，简化生产，调整尺寸所得的圆凳，可见于枫丹廷城中饭店、咖啡馆等地，多放置在吧台或长桌周边。因重量轻便易于搬运，且占地面积小而备受成团聚餐的客人们的青睐。虽然不如有靠背的座椅舒适，但想必这些劳累都被相聚一堂的快乐所冲散了吧。

- Boosts your Flamewind blessing. Choose between 2 diverging paths:\nFlamewind: <color=#ef5534>Basic Galeblaze</color>: When the active character's attacks deal DMG to opponents, consume this character's HP to unleash a <color=#ef5534>Galeblaze</color>, dealing <color=#f39001>AoE Pyro DMG</color> based on Windblessing: Pyro stacks.\nFlamewind: <color=#f39001>Basic Firestorm</color>: When <color=#f39001>Pyro or Anemo</color> party members take the field, a <color=#f39001>Firestorm</color> will be unleashed based on that character's <color=#f39001>Elemental Type</color>, dealing AoE DMG of the corresponding element based on the number of Windblessing: Pyro stacks. ｜ 强化火风祝福，可选择以下两种分支：\n火风·<color=#ef5534>初阶焚风</color>：当前场上角色的攻击对敌人造成伤害时，将消耗该角色的生命值，释放<color=#ef5534>焚风</color>，基于风之祝祷·火的层数造成<color=#f39001>火元素范围伤害</color>；\n火风·<color=#f39001>初阶炽岚</color>：队伍中的<color=#f39001>火元素或风元素</color>角色登场时，将根据该角色的<color=#f39001>元素类型</color>，释放<color=#f39001>炽岚</color>，基于风之祝祷·火的层数，造成对应元素类型的范围伤害。

- *sigh* Alright... ｜ 唉，好吧…

- Which means that up to this point, most of our research and discoveries have remained quite distant from people's daily lives. We've put a lot of Mora into the research, but have very little to show for our efforts. ｜ 这样的结果就是，花了许多资金投入的研究课题，却没能产生更广泛的作用。
- Isn't fulfilling the dreams of children something adults should do? Relax, you can leave this matter to me. ｜ 成年人帮小孩子圆梦，这不是很正常的事吗？这件事就交给我了，你们放心吧。

- #The frosted dew, silvery and dense, shall exorcise all demons.\nGrants all nearby party members the Icy Quill effect and deals <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> in different ways based on whether it is {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tapped}{LAYOUT_PC#pressed}{LAYOUT_PS#pressed} or held.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press}</color>\nRushes forward together with a Talisman Spirit, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> to opponents along the path.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color>\nCommands the Talisman Spirit to deal <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Icy Quill</color>\nWhen Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attacks, Elemental Skills, and Elemental Bursts deal <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> to opponents, the DMG dealt is increased based on Shenhe's current ATK.\n\nThe Icy Quill's effects will be cleared once its duration ends or after being triggered a certain number of times. When held rather than {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tapped}{LAYOUT_PC#pressed}{LAYOUT_PS#pressed}, the Icy Quill's effect lasts longer and can be triggered more times.\nWhen one <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> instance strikes multiple opponents, the effect is triggered multiple times based on the number of opponents hit. The number of times the effect is triggered is calculated independently for each party member with the Icy Quill.\n\n<i>The power of the spirits is no falsehood. Burdened with her orders, the divine maiden hurries on!</i> ｜ 凝叠银之霜露，摒退一切邪魔。\n为队伍中附近的所有角色施加「冰翎」效果，并依据点按、长按，以不同的方式造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>点按</color>\n与「箓灵」一同向前突进，对路径上的敌人造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>长按</color>\n律令「箓灵」，造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>冰翎</color>\n普通攻击、重击、下落攻击、元素战技和元素爆发伤害对敌人造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>时，基于申鹤自己当前的攻击力，提高造成的伤害。\n\n「冰翎」效果会在持续时间结束或生效一定次数后消失。长按施加的「冰翎」相比点按，拥有更长的持续时间与更多的生效次数。\n一次<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>同时命中多名敌人时，会依据命中敌人的数量消耗生效次数；队伍中具有「冰翎」的角色，其生效次数单独计算。\n\n<i>「灵威非虚，役有百工。神女有令，急到符中。摄！」</i>

- Obtain the basic Flamewind blessing:\nWhen characters trigger the <color=#f39001>Pyro Swirl reaction</color> on an opponent, all party members receive 1 stack of <color=#f39001>Windblessing: Pyro</color>: The DMG dealt by characters triggering the Swirl reaction increases by <color=#f39001>{0}%</color> and their ATK increases by <color=#f39001>{1}%</color>. ｜ 获得基础的火风祝福效果：\n角色对敌人触发<color=#f39001>火元素扩散反应</color>时，队伍中所有角色获得1层<color=#f39001>风之祝祷·火</color>：角色触发扩散反应造成的伤害提升<color=#f39001>{0}%</color>，角色的攻击力提升<color=#f39001>{1}%</color>。

- *sigh* Alas, such things are for fate to decide. Who knows when the turning point will come, and how it will happen... ｜ 唉，可惜缘分天定，这个契机会在什么时候，以什么形式降临，谁也不知道。
- Seeing as you've extended the invitation, how could I refuse? ｜ 既是你邀请，那我怎么有不应之理？
- But even if the house looks the same, the business I do here is unique. ｜ 不过，就算屋子看上去一样，但我在这里做的生意，可是独一无二的。
- Don't worry, leave it to us! ｜ 好，这里就交给我们几个啦。

- #Hey! Don't try to take on {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}'s role just because he's not around! ｜ #喂，不要趁{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}不在就扮演它的角色啊！

- As a result, Master Tighnari has taken me off the patrol schedule. He will only allow me to stay here and coordinate other people's tasks. ｜ 所以提纳里师父取消了我的各类巡林任务，只允许我留在这里协助组织工作。

- (Add two pinches of salt.) ｜ （放两份盐。）
- Hmph. Too little, you say? You didn't even do the job right. This 1,000 Mora is more than sufficient. ｜ 哼，嫌少？事情都办砸了，有这1000摩拉就知足吧。
- Strange Sound During the Magic Show ｜ 魔术表演中的异响
- A gamepiece based on a Hydro Hilichurl Rogue.\nHilichurl wanderers unaffiliated with any specific tribe. They can often be found roving the wilds as if in voluntary exile. They seem to possess a higher level of intelligence than commonplace hilichurls.\nAmong the humanoid enemies commonly enocuntered by the armed forces and adventurers of various nations, Hydro Hilichurl Rogues are considered among the most dangerous. They wield their scythes dexterously and lethally, and only the most elite and skilled warriors can face them alone. For these reasons, warriors often consider this humanoid capable of breaking through formations, and will focus their forces on dealing with them first. ｜ 以「丘丘水行游侠」为原型的兵棋。\n不属于任何部族的丘丘人流浪者，如同自我流放一般在荒野中四处漫游，相比寻常的丘丘人似乎有更高的智能水平。\n在普通将士与冒险家能遇见的人形敌手中，丘丘水行游侠堪称最高威胁之一，它们挥舞镰刀的战法敏捷而致命，仅有武艺极为精湛的战士才能独自招架。因此，将士们常将其视为足以「破阵」的人形个体，集中力量重点应对。
- What!? ｜ 什么？！
- You show Broglie the paper tapes you got earlier... ｜ 向布罗意出示了先前拿到的纸带…
- Other than that... I can't think of any. ｜ 其他的…想不起来了。
- (...You're still youthful, Azariq. Hehe...) ｜ （…毕竟还是年轻人呀，阿萨里格。呵呵…）
- New topic... a new topic... *sigh* Agh, come on! ｜ 新的课题…新的课题…唉，我真不甘心啊！

- Despite serving as my guard during this journey, you need not shield me from danger. The Shogun's constitution is rather robust, and in the event she does break down, we can simply get a replacement. In an emergency, just send her into the fray. ｜ 虽然是微服出访的保镖，但是我遇到危险不用替我挡刀了。将军她构造还挺结实的，坏了还能替换呢。所以遇到危险把将军她推到前面就好了。
- Nothing we can do about that. ｜ 现状就是这样咯。
- I'll be relying on you, then. I believe there'll be tons of people near the Anemo Archon statue. You can probably find some testers there. ｜ 那就拜托你了，风神像附近应该有很多人，你就去那边找人试喝吧。
- Goodnight. I'll be heading to bed as soon as I've completed my nightly weapon maintenance. ｜ 晚安。我维护好武器后也会休息。
- Okay! Off you go! ｜ 好的！！你们赶紧走吧！！
- We'll go over there and see what we can find out. Don't worry, I don't think she's gone too far. ｜ 那我们就去那边打听打听。你不用担心，她应该不会去太远的地方。
- An iris that was cherished by the guardian. Unfortunately, the chance never came for it to be given to whom the guardian loved. ｜ 守护者珍视的鸢尾花。并没有机会送给倾心的人。
- "Challenge me to a duel? Haha, how gutsy!"\nHint: Beidou's deck contains large numbers of Artifact Cards and characters of 3 different Elemental Types, allowing her to defend herself with counterattacks even as she shifts resources around. ｜ 「想要和我打牌吗？哈哈，我看好你的胆量…」\n【提示】北斗的牌组包含大量的「圣遗物」牌和三种不同元素类型的角色，擅长在运转资源的同时防守反击。
- Basically, a photo makes a visual record of you at this very moment in time, so it makes a great souvenir. ｜ 简单来说，画片可以把此时此刻的你记录下来，很适合作为纪念。
- The Withering ｜ 死域
- Lord of Dendro, do you still remember the prophecy? ｜ 草之王，我突然想起，您还记得预言吗？
- Oh... how come? You have something else on? ｜ 欸？有什么事吗？

- You'll find it eventually. ｜ 一定会找到的。

- Here... the Realm of Khab! That's the Barsam Flower's dream, where the Flower can sleep on water, floating and wobbling, with no risk of being hurt by Marana. ｜ 这里…「呿波境」！「呿波境」是「钵参花」的梦，「钵参花」睡在梦的水面上，呼呼悠悠，不会受到「无留陀」的伤害。
- We don't want them thinking we're storming into their camp to attack them. ｜ 不然他们肯定会误会，以为我们是准备来攻击他们。
- Her name is Sayu. She is a little ninja from the Kamisato Clan of the Yashiro Commission. She always disappears to slack off if she gets a chance. ｜ 这孩子名为早柚，是社奉行神里家的一名小小的忍者，只要抓住机会就会失踪去偷懒。
- Ah, okay... sure thing... ｜ 好的，好的…
- Having seized the Irminsul Fruit Fragment, these monsters have temporarily obtained its power. You may be able to defeat them with greater ease if you destroy the source of that strength first... ｜ 强占了地脉之果碎片的魔物们短暂的获得了力量，如果先击破力量的源头，似乎能更轻松地击退它们…
- Explore the temple's depths ｜ 探索庙宇深处
- A relatively common flower found throughout Natlan, its vivid orange blossoms pretty as bursts of flame. They say that its seeds can serve as a substitute for grain, while its young leaves, stems, and buds can be eaten as wild vegetables. During the war against the Abyss, its high rate of reproduction and abundant seed yield provided sustenance for countless people. Even today, some people will still cultivate these flowers at home — not only for decoration, but also to harvest their seeds and tender leaves. ｜ 在纳塔境内较为常见的花卉，其上生有如焰火般美丽的橙色花朵。据说，这种植株的种子可被视为谷物的替代，而其叶片嫩茎和嫩花也可以被当作野菜食用。在过去抵抗深渊的战争中，这种花朵凭借着极强的繁殖能力和极大的种子产量，成为了无数人的食粮来源。也因此，时至今日都有人在家中种植这种花朵的盆栽，一来可以美化家中的环境，二来还可以自给自足地采摘种子和嫩叶食用。
- Ei ｜ 影
- A bird's feather that serves as a quill pen. The tip has long been stained black. ｜ 用做书写工具的某种鸟类尾羽，根部已经被浸成洗不去的黑。

- Is there anything of note nearby? ｜ 附近有什么值得留意的吗？

- #{F#Big sis}{M#Big bro}, do you want to play a game of Temari? I found a new place to hide it! ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}，要玩手鞠吗？我换了个新的地方藏手鞠！
- A solemn mask exquisitely carved from basalt. Its hollow eyes stare ahead expressionless and cold. ｜ 玄岩精雕而成的庄严面具，空洞的双眼永远冰冷地凝视着前方。
- As long as you believe, you'll make it a reality one day. ｜ 只要心中相信，那就总有实现的一天。
- All the items here should be useful for our research... ｜ 这里的物品都可以拿来研究吧？
- And thus I am deeply grateful to the author for gifting such a magnificent work to Fontaine and all of us. To all fellow lovers of art and justice, let us meet at the old site of the Liliacruces Ordo! ｜ 因此我十分感谢作者将这样的作品带给了枫丹，带给了我们所有人。同好们，我们铃兰十字结社旧址见！

- To Ward Weakness ｜ 割舍软弱之心
- Cannot disassemble. You have already reached the daily limit for disassembling. ｜ 今日拆解次数已达上限，无法继续拆解。
- Well, "expanding the target audience" means getting more people involved in the competition. ｜ 说到「扩大受众面」，自然是要让更多的人能参与到比赛中来。
- I don't mind coming along. ｜ 我不介意陪你。
- You share some information... ｜ 稍微分享了信息…
- But, this is a competition and there can only be one winner — and that winner is... ｜ 不过既然是比赛就要有胜负，在这里我宣布——
- As for the banquet... Hmm, since the Director insists, far be it from a mere consultant like myself to refuse. ｜ 至于饭局…嗯，堂主这么说，看来容不得我这小小客卿拒绝了。

- They even say that those pillars and that ruin were built by Liyue's forebears in order to quell conflict... ｜ 有些人还说，这些柱子和里面的那个遗迹，都是璃月先民们为了镇压战乱而建造…
- Ah, um... No, well, this... I was sent by Matriarch Babel with a message for you, Jeht. She has something urgent to discuss and would like you to, um... well, return to the campsite first... ｜ 啊，呃…不是…那个，我是芭别尔主母派来送信的，她找你有要紧事，要你…呃，先行一步…回到露营地。

- Enter the Jade Chamber ｜ 进入群玉阁
- About yourself... ｜ 关于你自己…
- Indeed, the sorting process is necessary. Humans are such practical creatures. They only want those things that are good. Once they have learned to distinguish between good and bad, they will never stop comparing things in their minds. ｜ 确实，很有必要。人是很现实的生物，只喜欢好的东西。他们一旦学会分辨好坏，就会时时刻刻在心里作比较。
- He's always said, "Old age comes for us all in the end"... Still, I just can't help but feel a little emotional watching it happen to him. ｜ 「每个人都有老去的一天」…虽然父亲常常这么说，但看到他脸上的皱纹越来越深，我心里还是有一种说不出的滋味。
- Arana mentioned the power of memory... ｜ 兰拉娜提到过记忆的力量…
- That's right. The sound effects for gunshots will also be added in post-production. ｜ 没错，还有枪响其实也是通过后期剪辑加入。
- About the Vision ｜ 关于「神之眼」…
- Hello. ｜ 你好。
- Pull Harder ｜ 更加用力拔
- #{NICKNAME}, this is not what we agreed on! You must cleanse the Mountain King of every last trace of Abyssal contamination! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我们不是这么说好的，你得把山王的深渊气息净化干净！
- The acting manager makes me the same coffee every day, and says I should be as used to peace as the nearby residents are. ｜ 代理店长每天都给我泡同一种咖啡，说我也该和附近的居民一样，熟悉平静的气味了。
- I appreciate it... even though that doesn't mean much to me anymore... ｜ 多谢。虽然「信任」这个词已经不会让我感到喜悦…
- Material for Thelxie's Crown ｜ 特尔克西的王冠材料
- Please return to the city. Combat training is boring to watch, and we don't want to risk you getting injured. ｜ 请赶快回到蒙德城内去吧，战斗训练没什么好看的，万一被误伤到就不妙了。
- ...Are you here to investigate the recent theft as well? ｜ …你们也是来调查前段时间那场失窃案的吗？
- Here you go. It's ready for Little Lulu now. ｜ 来，拿好了，带回去给璐璐吧。
- Perfect spot... ｜ 对决场地…
- I'll do my best, but I can't guarantee you victory. ｜ 我尽力，但不保证赢。
- Deceitful Domain: Sea of Wandering Souls ｜ 诡境·幽浮之海
- #Don't be scared, Collei. This is the mechanical life form {NICKNAME} and I saved a while back. Its name is Karkata. ｜ #不用紧张，柯莱。这是我前阵子，和{NICKNAME}一起救助过的「机械生命」，名字叫卡卡塔。
- But the crime hasn't even happened yet... ｜ 还没「案发」呢…
- "You're always quick to remind me that you're my upperclassman, and yet you do not problem-solve in the manner becoming of an upperclassman. This begs the question of why we attach prestige to seniority at all." What does he mean, "manner becoming of an upperclassman"? What, am I supposed to earn the title of upperclassman now!? ｜ 「你总强调自己是学长，处理问题却没有学长真正该有的样子。那所谓的学长尊严有什么用？」什么叫学长该有的样子！学长就是学长吧！
- ...Huh. I guess maybe you're not so clued up after all. ｜ …这样啊，看起来你们是真的不知道啊。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- I knew I could count on the great Captain Beidou to answer the call of duty. ｜ 我就知道船长大义，不能推辞。
- The body shape of primitive marine creatures tends to be teardrop-shaped, so their pelvises are also narrower. ｜ 原始海洋生物的体形偏向水滴形，因此骨盆也更加狭窄。
- Ugh, don't even mention my paper... ｜ 呜…别提论文了…
- Insignias of Adventure Collected ｜ 已收集「冒险纹章」
- Hmm... The hotel could suffice? You could station a few officers to keep an eye on Sylvain and myself. ｜ 那…继续用这间旅馆呢？夏姆先生，您可以派些人手，来看着我跟席尔万。
- But can you really rate those who never fight? Would they even reach grade nine? Hmm... ｜ 没动过武的人，应该连九品都不算吧…
- Hee-hee, but no worries. I've got some food here... You must be famished... Hee-hee... ｜ 嘿嘿嘿，不过没关系，我这里有吃的…饿了很久了吧…嘿嘿嘿…
- Nkunga ｜ 恩孔加
- Of course, where do you want to start? ｜ 可以哦，你想从哪方面开始修行呢？
- Anyway, I'm sorry, but I've gotta get some food in me... like yesterday! You should grab something, too! ｜ 实在抱歉，我必须首先，立刻，马上吃饭！你们也快去吃饭吧——
- Hello ｜ 初次见面…
- Let me take a look... Oh, it should be right up ahead. ｜ 我看看…噢，就在前面了。
- <color=#37FFFF>Kinich:</color> Do I get a share?\n<color=#37FFFF>Ajaw:</color> You actually want this trash? ｜ <color=#37FFFF>基尼奇：</color>见者有份？\n<color=#37FFFF>阿乔：</color>这种破烂你居然想要。

- I'm sure it's more things for children to play with... if it's not kites, it's dolls. ｜ 准又是些小孩子玩的东西…不是风筝就是娃娃。

- This large office desk may be found in the Duke's office in the Fortress of Meropide. Crafted from sturdy Linden Wood, it features a curved desktop designed with careful consideration for ergonomics, significantly enhancing the user's work efficiency.\nThere are rumors that claim that the designer, taking practical use into account, intentionally added a metal "bulletproof layer" to this type of office desk to ensure the client's safety. However, since no one in the Fortress dares to challenge the Duke's authority, it seems that this desk may never have the opportunity to prove its defensive capabilities. ｜ 可见于梅洛彼得堡「公爵」办公室的大型办公桌，以厚重的「椴木」打造而成，有着充分考虑人机功效的弧形桌面，充分提升了使用者工作的效率。\n有传言称，考虑到实际使用情境，设计师特地为这型办公桌增加了金属的「防弹夹层」来保护客户的安全。只不过，由于梅洛彼得堡中完全没人敢冒险挑战「公爵」的权威，这种办公桌的恐怕是永远没有证明自身防御力的机会了…

I do believe an excess of meditation has fried his brain! ｜ 师兄已获『神之眼』，本应荡涤世间魔物，但他却问我，世间魔物是否生而为恶？这些魔物祸乱世间，滥害无辜，难道不是恶劣至极？我看师兄真是修炼得人都傻了！

- Gain the "Scorching Brilliance" effect when using an Elemental Skill or Burst: CRIT DMG increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>25%</color> and ATK increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color> for 6s. This effect can trigger once every 10s.\nWhile a "Scorching Brilliance" instance is active, its duration is increased by 2s after Normal or Charged attacks deal Elemental DMG. This effect can trigger once every second, and the max duration increase is 6s.\nAdditionally, when the equipping character is in the Nightsoul's Blessing state, "Scorching Brilliance" effects are increased by 75%, and its duration will not count down when the equipping character is off-field. ｜ 施放元素战技或元素爆发时，获得「焚光」效果：暴击伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>25%</color>，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>，该效果持续6秒，每10秒至多触发一次。\n持续期间内，普通攻击或重击造成元素伤害后，将使此次「焚光」效果的持续时间延长2秒，该效果每1秒至多触发一次，至多通过这种方式使持续时间延长6秒。\n此外，处于夜魂加持状态下时，「焚光」效果提高75%，且「焚光」效果在装备者处于后台时不进行计时。

- After the equipping character hits an opponent with a Plunging Attack, all nearby party members' Plunging Attacks will deal <color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color> increased DMG for 20s. This energy regain effect can be triggered even if the equipping character is not on the field. ｜ 装备者下落攻击命中敌人后，队伍中附近的所有角色下落攻击造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>，持续20秒；队伍中附近的角色的下落攻击命中敌人时，为装备者恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>2.5</color>点元素能量，每0.7秒至多通过这种方式恢复一次元素能量，装备者处于队伍后台时依然能通过这种方式恢复元素能量。

- Alright. Then I will get back to work... ｜ 嗯，那我要继续忙了…

- Ugh, he's surrounded... We can't see what's going on at all... ｜ 唔…它们围得死死的，不知道里面的人到底怎么样了…

- Oh, that's good to hear. ｜ 嗯，那真是太好了。
- The hands of time will never come to an end, but the same cannot not be said for those cherished years of the young maiden's life when she was doted upon. ｜ 指针的旋转不会有尽头，但少女受人宠爱的岁月则相反。
- Take it easy over there... ｜ 您悠着点…
- Is the dark mud even related to the Ley Lines? ｜ 可是黑泥和地脉有什么关系啊？

- Then I shall make one more final gamble... and see my experiment through to its end. Leave me for now, and come back in two hours. ｜ 那就让我再赌一把，把实验进行到底吧。你先离开这里，两个小时后再来找我。
- If I tell you some of the ingredients, I think you can figure it out. First, you need to combine Tainted Hydro Phantasm tissue with Transoceanic Pearls at a ratio of around three to seven. ｜ 我把部分配料说出来，你应该能理解的。首先是用浊水幻灵的组织成分和异海凝珠进行调制，配比在3:7左右。

- The monsters were as tall as mountains, spewing light as bright as fire. They made the forests weep and bushes wail in the howling fire. ｜ 这些怪物有山那么高，喷出像火一样的光芒，那个时候，森林也发出哀叹，灌木在熊熊燃烧的烈焰中哭泣…
- A prestigious circlet. However, the royal insignia has been scratched out, and it is no longer the symbol of distinguished status that it once was. ｜ 尊贵的头冠，昭示身份的徽记被用刀划破，原本的显贵身份已被废黜。
- You're leaving already? ｜ 你这就要走了？
- Hold on... There's a few things I'd like to clear up. ｜ 稍等。我有几句话要说。

- The 20th aniversary of Acara Crafts is coming up. Paimon wonders what the children thought of the Aranara carvings we helped create! Let's go check it out. ｜ 快要到阿折罗造像二十周年店庆了，也不知道小朋友们到底喜不喜欢我们辛苦准备的木刻，一起去看看吧？
- The answer's simple — if you doubt who I am, come face me in the ring. ｜ 答案很简单，要是有所怀疑的话，来和我摔上一局就好！
- People enjoy life in different ways, but both approaches are equally valid. ｜ 在我看来，形式不同，但都是热爱生活的表现。
- So that was a spatial rift. ｜ 原来那是空间裂隙。
- Melus actually did most of the interior decor at my place. I've always been quite fond of his style, and now that I've gotten used to it, I'm reluctant to change things up. ｜ 我家的布置很多都是迈勒斯安排的，我喜欢那种感觉。一旦习惯，就很难突然变更布设了。
- *sigh* Please do not be alarmed, I will keep my eyes on Lisa. Especially since she seems to enjoy electrocuting people just to break up a scuffle. Not to mention shocking drunkards until they beg for mercy... ｜ 不过各位请放心，我会监督好丽莎的。就算她喜欢用电击的方式分开斗殴市民、把惹事醉汉电到求饶…

- A harpastum fired along a specific trajectory. Predict its path to catch it! ｜ 以特定弧线轨迹飞行的羽球，需要预判其飞行轨迹才能接住！
- Who is it? ｜ 请问是谁？
- C'mon, let's go! ｜ 我们快过去吧！
- Answer me. Yes? Or no? ｜ 回答我，「是」还是「不是」！
- Character Preview ｜ 角色预览
- Every boatman in Chenyu Vale will hum songs while sailing, and these songs are passed down to the young from the old. ｜ 沉玉谷的每位艄公都会在行舟之时哼唱歌谣，歌谣都是老人们教给年轻人的。
- Hmm... I doubt Mr. Tenehua's lying. There's only one possibility left, which is that you all saw Tozan on the same day, but in different places. ｜ 嗯——特纳华先生也没有说谎。所以只有一种可能，你们的确在同一天的不同地方都看到了托赞。
- "I feel very guilty about not spending more time with my family because of the war..." ｜ 「因为战争的缘故，没能多陪陪家人，真是对不起…」
- Read ｜ 阅读
- Because of the Sakoku Decree, I could not enter Inazuma City. When I was about to leave out of disappointment, I ran into him... ｜ 因为锁国令的缘故，我无法进入稻妻城。而就在我要失望离开的时候，我遇见了他…
- What did she say? Don't tell me she's already forgotten about me? ｜ 她怎么说？会不会已经忘记我了？
- I do agree that it's awful. But that doesn't change the fact that— ｜ 虽然我也觉得很凄惨，但是我的立场…
- I see... Was it the work of wild animals...? ｜ 是这样吗？难道是有野兽闯进去了吗…
- Echoing Sound From Days Past ｜ 昔时回映之音
- #Wait, don't move, {M#Big Bro}{F#Big Sis} Blondie! Those are bait to attract Flowcurrent Birds! ｜ #啊，不可以乱动喔，金发的{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！那些是用来吸引浮流鸟的啦！
- Ahh, the mountain. Now there's a romantic location! ｜ 嗯，雪山啊，真是有情调的地方呢。
- "A Thousand Texts in the Central Hub" ｜ 「中枢的浩繁卷宗」
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- As I'm sure you're aware, we faced continuous attacks from bands of monsters for the entire duration of the Stormterror incident. ｜ 你也知道，在龙灾期间，不断有魔物聚集在城外攻击蒙德城吧。
- (Hopefully, I will be able to think uninterrupted here.) ｜ （在这里思考问题应该不会被打扰了吧。）
- "It appears that they simply stopped where they were after failing to satisfy the formation requirements... A baffling design choice..." ｜ 「看上去是未能满足队列要求，停摆了…怎么会有这样奇怪的设计…」
- Yep, finding Qiqi is the number-one priority right now. We'll update you as soon as we can. ｜ 没错，先去找七七比较要紧。等我们消息吧。

- After you activate a Petrified Tree, a Ley Line Outcrop, or open a Treasure Chest, restore 20% HP and an extra 1,200 HP to all party members. This effect can occur once every 5s. Lasts 900s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 激活石化古树、地脉衍出，或者开启宝箱后，为队伍中所有角色恢复20%生命值，并额外恢复1200点生命值，此效果每5秒至多触发一次，持续900秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Instead of placing your bet on a sketchy legend, catching up on some rest seems like the better option for Layla right now. ｜ 与其把希望寄托在不着边际的传说上，不如先帮莱依拉把状态调整过来吧。

- The blueprint for this exquisitely decorated restaurant is a famous tavern in Sumeru City... modified for use within the Serenitea Pot, of course. Steam and the scent of spices alike waft through the air, each doubling up on an already joyful experience. All one would then need was some friends for company and a few jugs of fine wine, and this would be the perfect dining experience.\nFor those who travel together often, barbecue places are perfect when considering the number of seats and amount of food needed. As for those who move alone, the raucous atmosphere of such establishments allows them to conceal their movements, alongside providing safe conditions for observing, tracking, or even plotting.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Alhaitham, Dehya, Sethos ｜ 以须弥城内有名的酒馆与咖啡馆为蓝本，根据壶中洞天宅邸布局进行调整后，精心布置的餐厅。热雾与香气弥漫，令人倍感享受。若是有挚友相伴，再备上几壶好酒，就能在此获得完美的用餐体验。\n常与团队同行之人挑选饭馆时，往往会提前考虑餐位的数量和菜品的份量，在这类人看来，烤肉店是相当稳妥的选择。而独行之人也能借助烤肉店的热闹氛围隐去自己的行踪，或是为观察、追踪与思考谋取相对低调与安全的条件。\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：艾尔海森、迪希雅、赛索斯

- A swarm of incandescent meteors rise from the foot of the cliff, shooting upwards into the starry sky. Holding you by the hand, Yoimiya bounds off the edge, vaulting into the dazzling meteor shower together. One star among the countless multitudes carries you heavenwards.\nInfected with your joy and courage, Avin steadily stands with Arashani's assistance. Abandoning the wheelchair, she bravely charges into the flood of meteors. Like you, she is carried aloft by a meteor, and soars freely above the clouds.\nAs the shooting stars gradually begin to dive, Yoimiya falls from her star. As she descends, golden stars explode like fireworks before her eyes, one after the other. Opening your wind glider, you catch Yoimiya, and together with Paimon, Arashani, and Avin, you watch the meteor shower bloom brilliantly against the dark sky. ｜ 璀璨的流星群从悬崖下方升起，直冲云霄。宵宫拉上你和派蒙，从悬崖上一跃而下，跃入耀眼的流星雨中。无数星星中的一颗载着你们飞上了高天。\n被你们的快乐和勇气感染，艾文被兰莎妮扶起后，抛开了轮椅，勇敢地向流星群飞起的地方冲去。她和你们一样，乘上了流星，在云层上自由地飞行。\n当流星雨渐渐落下，宵宫从载着她的星星上落下。在坠落的她面前，一颗又一颗的金色流星像烟花一样绽开。你展开风之翼接住宵宫，和派蒙、兰莎妮还有艾文一起看流星群灿烂地绽放。

- You— ｜ 你——
- The tutors who guide Ayaka in her various arts once used to say: whether in tea ceremony, chess, the art of the sword, or all other affairs of elegance, Ayaka is already a master.\nShe is clearly already a noble lady of superb bearing, skilled with both the pen and the sword. To be able to teach such a pupil is a teacher's pride and joy.\nStill, Ayaka thinks quietly to herself, does she truly have no regrets?\nThe essence of tea is peace and quiet.\nThe heart of the sword is the keenest edge.\nThe soul of chess is the wisdom to grasp the bigger picture.\nThese three she has grasped indeed, and the spirit of true friendship also.\nAnd yet, Ayaka is still waiting for a friend to emerge who can walk alongside her on equal footing and stand by her side.\nThat person cannot see her as a member of the Yashiro Commission, or as the Shirasagi Himegimi, nor will their conduct towards her be bound by decorum or status. And if possible, they might also be well-versed in a great many fields of study, and have witnessed all manner of interesting things... and perhaps they might even be able to tell her a story in a pinch.\nOnly such a person might become Ayaka's bosom friend.\n"Surely, this is not too much to ask... But where might I find such a person?" ｜ 指导绫华诸门技艺的老师们曾欣慰地表示：无论茶道、剑道或棋道，诸般风雅，绫华都已完全掌握。\n她俨然是一位文武双全、风姿超绝的贵族小姐了。能教导这样一位学生，身为老师也感到非常愉快。\n但遗憾之情…当真完全没有吗？绫华默默想道。\n茶心，和敬清寂的正心。\n剑心，锐不可当的武心。\n棋心，审时度势的慧心。\n茶心、剑心、棋心，俱是她心，此外，却也有着一颗对友人的真心。\n绫华始终等待着世上能出现一个与她平等相对、并肩而立的友人。\n那个人不会将她看作「社奉行」或「白鹭公主」，不会为礼数和地位所束缚。最好还能懂得各种知识，见识过各种奇闻异事…必要时，还能给她讲讲故事。\n如此，才能成为她绫华的好友。\n「也并不是那么难的事吧…可这样的人，究竟在哪里呢？」

But... which stall is "the stall" exactly? ｜ 在「荒泷极意堂堂斗虫大试合」中，协助「真剑斗虫大鬼王」荒泷一斗对抗「花角玉将」一派的斗虫好手后得到的谢礼，也是「鬼王的左膀右臂」和「破空白铁小堇瓜」两位斗虫新星迅速崛起的证明。\n「真剑斗虫大鬼王」声称，只要向店家出示这张优惠券，就能「连续两个月，每天都免费吃一碗拉面」。不过…这张优惠券究竟能被用在哪家拉面店呢？

- The Children of Echoes believe in and worship the Wayob, which manifests upon the land with the power of totems and Nightsouls.\nThe people of Natlan believe that the Wayob dwell in the kingdom of the Lord of the Night, and have no fixed form, instead attaching themselves to anything in order to provide guidance to lost tribespeople. Wayob manifestations are particularly special, and the figure revealed through the totems often has an important purpose.\nThe Children of Echoes believe that their Wayob has the power to shape mountains and valleys, and can control the echoes created when rock meets stone. ｜ 「回声之子」部族所信仰与崇拜的「大灵」，借由图腾与夜魂之力，于大地之上显化的形体。在纳塔部族民的认知之中，「大灵」生活在夜神的国度，并且不具备固有的形体，因为「大灵」可以依附于任何事物上，给迷茫的部族民以指引。而大灵显化身在其中尤为特殊，借助图腾的形态展露的身姿，往往有其重要的使命。\n「回声之子」的人相信他们的「大灵」拥有塑造山峰与低谷的力量，能够执掌山石摩擦的回响。

- Performance Assistance: When your Performance Level is 1/2/3 respectively, all party members gain <color=#FFCC33>40%/80%/160%</color> Geo DMG Bonus.\nAdditionally, if your Performance Level is 3, when your character triggers <color=#FFCC33>Crystallize</color> against an opponent, unleash a <color=#FFCC33>Knightwave</color> at the character's position that deals True DMG to nearby opponents. 1 <color=#FFCC33>Knightwave</color> can be produced in this way every 4s. ｜ 「助演增益」：「表现等级」分别为1/2/3级时，队伍中所有角色获得<color=#FFCC33>40%/80%/160%</color>岩元素伤害加成。\n另外，若「表现等级」为3级，角色对敌人触发<color=#FFCC33>结晶反应</color>时，将在角色的位置释放<color=#FFCC33>「骑士冲击波」</color>，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害，每4秒至多通过这种方式释放一次<color=#FFCC33>「骑士冲击波」</color>。

- "Meow..." "There once was a legend concerning the Witch of Embers, who the historians are loath to remember. Her searing flames were like a bouquet. Even we cats have never forgotten it..."\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "La Signora" is immune to Frozen, Stun, and Petrification, and starts with the Talent Card "Pain for Pain" equipped. End Phase: If "La Signora" has already changed into the "Crimson Witch of Embers" state, attach "Blazing Heat" to your active character. If she hasn't changed yet, "La Signora" loses 1 Energy, and "Sheer Cold" is attached to your active character.</color> ｜ 「喵…」「曾有这样一个传说，与史家不愿记载的炽炎魔女有关，她炽烈的火焰像花束，即便对猫儿们来说也过目难忘…」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「女士」免疫冻结、眩晕、石化，并且初始装备有天赋牌「苦痛奉还」；结束阶段：如果「女士」已转换为「焚尽的炽炎魔女」，则对我方出战角色附属「炽热」。如果「女士」未转换，则「女士」失去1点充能，并且对我方出战角色附属「严寒」。</color>

- Don't try to stop me! Today's the most important day for treating Thelxie! We'll use the guidance method. Didn't you also say that you think it'd work? ｜ 不要拦着我！今天是治疗特尔克西最重要的日子！我们会用引导幻想的疗法，你也觉得会有用的，不是吗？
- Also... I am the only one out of all of us who could know what it would look like. To me, that confirms that this place really is reading our minds. ｜ 然而…我们之中只有我知道那些东西长什么样，这片空间果然在读我们的心。
- Cryo Crystal: <color=#e09800>Initial Iceburst</color> ｜ 冰晶·<color=#e09800>初阶冰迸</color>
- And if you're still not convinced, we'll do the next battle on your home turf. I'll prove that it's about the beetle fighter, not the location! ｜ 看你不服气的样子，之后的较量，就去你的主场吧。本大爷要让你明白，场地没什么影响，关键还是斗虫的人！
- Even the most delicious of dishes, if eaten three times a day, every day, for hundreds or even thousands of meals in a row, would become unbearable for your average person.\nYet in Mizuki's world of dream-cuisine, bland nightmares are a blessing to be savored.\nSome people's nightmares are like the apocalyptic aftermath of a kitchen explosion — a chaotic mix of seasonings with acrid undertones of charred woodsmoke, a slight tang of rust, and harsh, acidic notes to round it all off.\nBut what about good dreams?\nVery few yumekui-baku even know what they taste like, for their kind follow an unwritten rule: "Never eat someone else's good dreams without permission."\nIt wasn't until her tenth year as a clinical psychologist that Mizuki finally had the rare privilege of tasting such a precious delicacy.\nOne day, a girl who had made a full recovery thanks to Mizuki's therapy came to express her gratitude with a gift. As they chatted, the girl suddenly suggested the idea of sharing one of her colorful, vibrant dreams.\nIt was a dreamscape brimming with innocence, energy, and dazzling fantasy. Mizuki was utterly captivated by its flavor... Pleasant, warm, and delicately sweet.\nFrom that day on, Mizuki developed a love for all kinds of desserts, and soon, a bold idea began to take root in her heart.\nCould the indescribable beauty of a good dream be a remedy in itself, powerful enough to dissolve negative emotions all on its own?\nIf she could create such dreams with her youkai powers, they might serve as a potent medicine for her patients' emotional struggles.\nAnd maybe, just maybe... they could also be treasured as exquisite delicacies, a treat for herself, every now and then?\nSadly, however, the baku do not possess the power of creation. Good dreams are, in a sense, the pure and untainted projections of a person's desires. As such, they cannot easily be replicated by outside forces, let alone conjured out of thin air...\nSince everyone's desires differ, there can be no universal "recipe" for creating a one-size-fits-all sweet dream. Attempting to probe a person's innermost thoughts — to fathom their deepest secrets — might itself become an act of intrusion, only adding to their anxiety and unease.\nRegrettably, therefore, Mizuki was unable to figure out the secret to creating a cure-all dream.\nBut fortunately, the decades of searching and studying were not in vain. Her dedication was eventually rewarded...\nOne weary yet fulfilling night, Mizuki dreamt of becoming a little baku once more, and of sharing a meal with her dearest friend by a ramen stall.\nThis particular dream had a delicate, smoky feel to it, almost like a gentle breeze, and it seemed to share the same outline that many happy dreams had in common.\nUnbound, unburdened, and carefree...\nAs the dream unfolded, a radiant, crystalline Vision silently appeared by Mizuki's pillow.\nFrom then on, Mizuki took a new approach, as if she had been inspired.\nShe resolved to guide people towards tranquil, soothing dreams, rekindling memories of the things they treasured most.\nShe believed that all the good and beauty that people cherished deep inside them would surely awaken at crucial moments, coloring their dreams and transforming them into the most magnificent forms imaginable. ｜ 就算是无比可口的料理，一日三餐重复不变，吃上百遍千遍，也会令普通人难以忍受。\n而在瑞希的味觉世界中，品尝寡淡的噩梦，已是一种幸运。\n有些人的噩梦就如厨房爆炸后的产物，各种调料混杂其中，还有木炭烟熏的苦味，甚至锈味和强酸。\n那美梦呢？\n鲜有食梦貘知道美梦的味道，因为食梦貘一族有着不成文的规矩：「未经允许，不得吞食他人的美梦。」\n成为心理诊疗师后的第十年，瑞希才有幸品尝到宝贵的美梦。\n一位接受了瑞希诊疗，完美痊愈的女孩带着礼物前来感谢她。闲聊之时，女孩突发奇想，要与瑞希分享自己色彩斑斓的好梦。\n饱含童真、活力与绮灿幻想的梦境，味道实在惬意、温暖细腻的清甜令瑞希完全沉浸其中。\n从那以后，瑞希就爱上了各种甜品，心底更是萌生了一个大胆的想法。\n妙不可言的美梦或许本身就是一种解药，足以消融人们的负面情绪？\n若是能够用妖力制造美梦，作为一剂良药，对病患的情绪想来大有裨益。\n而且…也能将其作为珍藏的美食，偶尔给自己一点调剂？\n不过，食梦貘毕竟没有造物的权柄。某种程度上，美梦是愿望投影在人们心中的产物，无比明净，难以用外力重现，凭空捏造更是一种奢求…\n每个人的愿望都有所不同，自然不能用笼统的「配方」调制万能的美梦。若是为了了解人们的真实想法，探寻人们内心深处的秘密，本身又可能成为越界的行为，加重人们的紧张和不安…\n结果略有遗憾，瑞希没能参悟解药之梦的制作方法。\n好在，上万个日夜的探寻与钻研也没有白费，瑞希的心意终究得到了回应——\n某个疲惫而充实的夜里，瑞希梦见自己变回了小小的梦貘，与挚友在拉面摊前享用料理。\n这梦境呈现出轻烟与柔风般的质感，似乎隐含着诸多美梦之间富有共性的轮廓。\n脱离束缚，自由自在，悠悠哉哉…\n梦境行至此处，一枚玲珑剔透的神之眼悄然出现在瑞希的枕边…\n此后，瑞希似乎得到了启发，换了个思路。\n她要将人们引向松弛与舒然的梦，唤起人们心中对宝贵事物的回忆。\n相信人们心底珍藏的美好，必定会在关键的时刻苏醒，为梦境着色，将其装点成最瑰丽的模样。
- Joining Party: I ｜ 加入队伍·其一

- How is that possible... ｜ 怎么会这样…
