- Very good. You memorized it after hearing it only once, did you? I see great things in your future, I do. ｜ #了不起，这么复杂的名字居然说一遍就记得，真是前途可期啊{M#少年}{F#少女}。
- (An aged diary. The pages bear some strange purple-black burn marks.) ｜ （一本略经风霜的日志，纸上有奇怪的紫黑色烧痕。）
- A mantle brooch that has lost its luster. The gold plating that once adorned it was ground away by the wind and the waves long ago. ｜ 色泽暗淡的斗篷别针。原本镀上的金色已经被海风磨去。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a "Slippery Shack."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『滑滑小屋』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Thank goodness, she's fine. ｜ 还好，她没事。
- Pyro DMG dealt by all party members increased by 75%. ｜ 队伍中所有角色造成的火元素伤害提高75%。
- And after all these flavors comes... sweetness, passion, and refreshed hope. So, that's why I was able to taste a sweet dream at our first meeting... ｜ 最终是…甘甜，热烈，清新，所以初次见面我品尝到的才是美梦啊。
- Time to go see the village chief. Paimon wants to see how he'll explain himself this time! ｜ 我们去找村长吧！看看他这次要怎么解释！
- I thought that some bad guys were coming to ruin it again... But I've got to protect the flowers we worked so hard to grow together! ｜ #还以为又有坏东西要弄坏柯莎的花圃呢…好不容易才和{NICKNAME}一起种出来的，一定要保护好才行！
- A Curious Sound ｜ 奇妙的声音
- Look for Gorou ｜ 寻找五郎
- Guild Master, please! ｜ 会长！你就饶了我吧！
- I have nothing against the opinions of others, but the moment a whirlpool of conspiracy forms, it inevitably affects the innocent. ｜ 我并不在意人们对我的态度，然而阴谋的旋涡一旦形成，就会不受控制地牵连无辜。
- Talk to Virgil ｜ 与维吉尔对话
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- But you end up waiting longer than you expected... ｜ 只不过，等待的时间似乎长了一些…
- This... This is impossible! Goodness gracious! ｜ 这…这不可能！天哪！
- #Seishimaru saved my life yesterday, and {M#he}{F#she} didn't ask for rice or money. ｜ #势至丸昨天救了我的命，但{M#他}{F#她}不要稻米也不要钱。
- Caterpillar ｜ 卡特皮拉
- A simulated device that contains a large amount of hazardous material. This device will <color=#F39000>explode vigorously</color> upon being hit by a bullet, destroying its surroundings.\nIt's a good thing that high-value targets can't be damaged under the simulation rules. ｜ 桶状的情景模拟机关，内装有大量危险物品。该机关被子弹击中时会引发<color=#F39000>剧烈的爆炸</color>，并对周围造成破坏。\n好在由于模拟规则限制，不会对高价值目标造成伤害。
- Ministry of Civil Affairs' Affidavit ｜ 总务司备案文件
- Two is enough. ｜ 两株就足够了。
- Leaves and flowers often drop onto the ground of the Avidya Forest, sometimes perfectly intact. Leaving them on the ground would be such a pity... I can't help but pick them up and keep them as biological specimens. They can be used as educational materials for Forest Rangers or as decorative pieces. Very versatile. ｜ 道成林里经常有掉在地上的树叶和花朵，有些在掉落的时候还很完整，就这么扔在地上太可惜了…我总是忍不住把它们捡回来做成标本。既可以变成培训巡林员的教具，还可以当作漂亮的装饰品，一举多得。
- You're not wrong. Mercenaries are driven by Mora, and my faith lies with whoever's paying me. As long as there's a profit to be made, anyone can become my friend. ｜ 你没说错，佣兵只认钱。雇主才是我唯一的信仰，只要有利可图，谁都能成为我的朋友哦。
- Obtain a score of {param3} in Show of Force ｜ 在「小试锋芒」中获得{param3}评分
- Complete Hard Difficulty ｜ 达成困难难度
- Student ｜ 学生
- #If it isn't my favorite client, {NICKNAME}! It's been a while, how are things? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，哎呀，稀客呀，你好你好。
- Chief Mate ｜ 大副
- Eh? U—Um, Paimon just means that he'd be in deep trouble if he went to Dragonspine. ｜ 我、我是说，他去雪山，肯定会遭遇危险的啦。
- How to put this... Mr. Faurobert is indeed the champion jumper — that much is indisputable. ｜ …该怎么说呢？福罗贝尔先生的确是无可置疑的跳跃冠军。
- Wait! Check this out. Looks like this part got wet at some point. ｜ 啊！你们看这里，是沾到什么液体了吧？
- Just like a certificate, this Vision is solid proof of my capabilities. The only difference is that I'm still not certain about a Vision's assessment criteria. ｜ 和证书一样，这是对我能力的肯定和证明。但不同的是，我至今不知道它的考核标准。
- Um... Lynette, do you... have a moment? ｜ 那个…琳妮特小姐，请问您有空吗？
- Anyway, let's get a move on. We need to pick all this stuff up. ｜ 好了好了，我们快行动吧，把忍具都捡起来。
- Maybe Osial can create water creatures, but it's extraordinary to be able to imagine creatures with rich personalities. ｜ 或许幻化出水做的小动物奥赛尔也能办到，但是有丰富人格的小动物确实很不一般。
- Oh, you mean the group that tried to sell us the Divine Knowledge Capsule! Yeah, they weren't friendly at all... ｜ 哦，是那个卖神明罐装知识的团！确实感觉不像好人…
- It brings more people through the door and presents a great opportunity to introduce new dishes while they're here... ｜ 既能为餐厅带来更多人气，也能顺便推广新的料理…
- Invalid Online ID, please check and re-enter ｜ 输入的Online ID有误，请重新输入
- The fault is mine for not explaining everything to you sooner. Because in my experience, trying to explain is a futile pursuit. ｜ 也怪我之前未与你们解释清楚。因为从过往的经验来看，解释也是徒劳。
- #{NICKNAME}? I didn't expect to see you here. ｜ #{NICKNAME}？没想到会在这里遇见你。
- Now then, Traveler, pursue the scent one has put you on and retrieve the requisite Rice. ｜ 旅行者，你快循着气息的踪迹，去把本仙要的那种稻米拿回来吧。
- Mask of Solitude Basalt ｜ 不动玄石之相
- However, The Withering nearby disappeared lately. The plants that were once gone started growing again, and the reproduction of Shroom-Kin was somehow restrained. ｜ 但最近这段时间里，「死域」却消失了。很多曾经消失的植物如今重新生长了出来，蕈类的繁殖也有所收敛。
- That's why I focus on encouraging people nowadays. I'm sure that approach will get results just fine too. ｜ 所以现在的方针已经改成鼓励为主了，相信多夸夸也能有进步的。
- The knight that I want to be someday... Ohh... that feels so far away that it's a little difficult to imagine... ｜ 理想中的骑士…对我来说，可能还是有点远吧…
- Purchased from the Shop ｜ 商城中购买获取
- Are you alright? How do you feel? ｜ 你还好吗？有没有哪里不舒服？
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Happy Adventurer ｜ 高兴的冒险家
- (If you think that every Mondstadter likes to compose poetry, you are sorely mistaken.) ｜ （要是觉得每个蒙德人都喜欢写诗可就大错特错了。）
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- If Jemma gave us the right location, then the workshop should be right nearby... Huh, looks like these boxes are blocking the entrance. Let's shift them away first. ｜ 按照嘉玛指的位置，魔术工坊应该就在这附近。看来是箱子压住了入口，我们先将它们搬开吧。
- Here's the dish you ordered. ｜ 这是您订的餐。
- Ever since I came across these peculiar mushrooms in The Chasm, I've been curious about the long-term consequences of eating them, but I haven't found a willing assistant yet. ｜ 来层岩巨渊发现特殊蘑菇的时候，就想研究长期食用这种蘑菇会有什么后果…但是找不到愿意协助我进行实验的助手。
- There is one other piece of information I got incidentally from my negotiations with The Knave that I believe may be useful to you. ｜ 还有一个于你们来说可能会有用的情报，那是我之前与「仆人」谈判时，不经意间获知的…
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- No problem. Trust me on that! ｜ 没问题，你就放心吧！
- We can't get through that wall easily, remember? Caravan Ribat would never let so many unregistered members of the Eremites enter Sumeru City. ｜ 你怕是忘了，我们这些人轻易过不了那堵墙。喀万驿不可能放任如此大量未经登记的镀金旅团成员前往须弥城。
- With those who could not solve such a small problem proving unfit to call themselves Yasnapati. For how then would they aid me in my great work of extinguishing the Sign of Apaosha? ｜ 若是连这样的小小难题也解不开，那自然不配做吾辈花灵的「谒颂主」，又何谈协助我完成熄灭「焚真之天象」的伟业？
- She must have gone sampling some rare plants she found. Typical Amurta behavior and stuff... I mean, how do you still not know how they're like? ｜ 她一定又是发现了什么珍稀植物，忙着去采标本了。你还不知道她们阿弥利多的德行吗？
- And she wore a shrine maiden outfit. ｜ 穿着巫女服装。
- I relied on him for a lot of things. But, I'm sure with enough time, even the deepest of attachments can fade. ｜ 从心底里对他产生的那些依赖，只要时间过得足够久，总有一天可以「戒掉」的吧。
- Bored? Heard it all before? Not to worry. We're doing things differently from now on. ｜ 听腻了？老掉牙了？没关系。从现在开始，一切都不再相同。
- Well, this is embarrassing, but even though the Fontaine Research Institute did organize diving training sessions, we strategically held a dinner each time... ｜ 这个，说来惭愧，虽然枫丹科学院的确组织过潜水培训，但每次我们都以聚餐为名…
- Seats ｜ 座椅
- Adventurer ｜ 冒险家
- If there's any souvenirs anyone still wants to buy, the time is now. ｜ 假如还有什么东西想买的话，也要抓紧时间咯。
- Have you finished your paper? ｜ 你的论文已经写好了？
- Achieve victory within 5 Rounds ｜ 5回合内胜利
- Reply ｜ 回复
- Masose ｜ 马索瑟
- Someone Else's Message ｜ 又一人留言
- Has anyone come to... uh, play this game? ｜ 真的有人来…玩吗？
- But I would prefer to assure my victory in this contest, and upon giving it some thought, you came to mind! ｜ 这场较量，我想稳操胜券，考虑之后，我就想到了你！
- Of course! ｜ 当然！
- It's way too dangerous for her to go out there all alone. ｜ 要是可莉一个人跑进奔狼领，那就太危险了。
- See, such high-quality ore like this used to go straight to the Shogunate. Now, even adventurers like yourself can buy these unblemished gems, and at a fair price too! ｜ 您看，成色这么好的晶石以前只能卖给幕府，现在冒险家和旅行者也可以买到了，价格公道，品质无瑕！
- The feeling's mutual. You don't have to thank me every time. ｜ 彼此彼此，不必每次都道谢。
- Oz ｜ 奥兹
- Talk to Mary-Ann ｜ 与「玛丽安」对话
- And if it makes friends with a Fungus, that makes it a Shroomcat! ｜ 那和蕈兽伙伴们交了朋友的猫，就是「蘑菇猫」！
- Talk to Ann ｜ 与安对话
- I don't think it works that way. ｜ 应该不是这回事吧。
- Lady Keqing, these two strange people suddenly appeared. They seem to have designs on the Guizhong Ballista. ｜ 刻晴大人，这两个怪人突然出现，似乎对归终机有所图谋。
- Realm Dispatch ｜ 洞天关牒
- And who are you then? ｜ 那你又是谁？
- You are... that person who seems very nice on the surface. ｜ 你是…那个表面上很亲切的人。
- You're the one who has remained resolute in the face of your illness. ｜ 是你自己没有被病痛打倒。
- Exactly. ｜ 对。
- But thinking about it... Since we're already this far, then I'll turn a blind eye to any new grievance. ｜ 但是，我想过了。都已经到这个份上了，这些仇不计较也罢。
- I have to say, the title suits you well! Just look at you, all hardworking and... Ahem. ｜ 不得不说，这头衔和您非常相衬！瞧您这副吃苦耐劳的样子…咳。
- Freeze her! Nice! ｜ 冻她冻她！干的漂亮！
- By the way, Paimon just remembered, didn't Nadia say that she "heard" someone say that there's treasure here? ｜ 对了！我突然想到，纳蒂亚之前不是说过吗？她是听别人说这里有宝物…
- I'm just glad that we've seen some progress, so uh... No reason to be dejected! Albedo said I did a good job! ｜ 实验能有进展我很高兴，所以…呃，也算不上垂头丧气吧！阿贝多先生鼓励过我了！
- Mondstadt Exploration Reward ｜ 蒙德地区探索奖励
- If the things we catch define a fisherman's world, then his world truly is vibrant and full of life. ｜ 如果说钓上来的东西能构成钓鱼爱好者的世界，那他的世界可真是多姿多彩。
- I guess you've heard that I... sometimes sing for the people in Mondstadt? ｜ 你应该听说过吧，我偶尔会在蒙德城里唱歌给大家听。
- Yup. ｜ 找到了。
- Kanjou Commission Officer ｜ 勘定奉行役人
- Talk to Arashakun ｜ 与兰沙恭对话
- Starglitter Exchange ｜ 星辉兑换
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Completing quests of great importance to Inazuma,\nrelieving the worries and woes of those living under the aegis of the Electro Archon...\nThis is another way to improve one's repute in Inazuma.\n\nYou will be rewarded with Reputation for completing certain quests. ｜ 完成与稻妻息息相关的重要任务，\n为雷神守卫的大地上居住的人们排忧解难，\n也是提高稻妻声望的重要途径。\n\n一些任务在完成后，可以获得声望奖励。
- I gave up my Vision. I'm not worthy of it anymore, nor do I have any real use for it. ｜ 我的「神之眼」已经收起来了。我不配再用它了，也不再需要了。
- Sometimes, the answer you're looking for is right under your nose... ｜ 近在眼前。
- We've already come all this way, so we might as well try to get to the bottom of this. ｜ 嗯，来都来了，不如把问题解决得彻底一点。
- Uh, no, no, it's a self-proclaimed title at the moment. One day, though, I'll be a proper agent, just like Sedile! ｜ 不是不是，现在还只是自封的而已啦。但总有一天，我会像瑟琪前辈那样，成为正式探员的！
- #You know, we should go check on Rana, {NICKNAME}. Maybe she's better now! If so, we can bring her here! ｜ #嗯，我们去看看拉娜吧，{NICKNAME}。说不定有所好转了呢！哎呀，那我们就能把她带来了！
- Here, these are for you. You've been out and about all day. Go buy something nice to eat, and rest your legs a bit. ｜ 来，这些给你们，跑了这么久，拿去买点好吃的，休息休息吧。
- You've got some nerve! You just used us to make some quick Mora! ｜ 还敢说，拿我们赚稿费了吧！
- If only his dream can be realized, no one will ever have to lose their wings again. Our aerial prowess will be greater than ever before... ｜ 如果他的梦想真能实现，从今往后，就不会再有「失翼者」了。我们的空中力量将远胜从前。
- "The people celebrated and worshiped the Prinzessin's authority, and followed her call to migrate to the sacred land that would eventually be known as the Immernachtreich." ｜ 「臣民欢呼朝拜皇女殿下的威能，遵循她呼唤，纷纷迁至该片后被称作『幽夜净土』的神圣国度之中。」
- It's my job to assign quests to our adventurers and provide intelligence support. Our service is all year round. ｜ 负责为冒险家们提供任务发布和情报支援工作，而且这份服务全年无休喔。
- Hi there, do you know where Garvipidam lives? ｜ 你好，请问你知道伽吠毗陀住在哪儿吗？
- I used to believe... if I was to stamp out evil, I would have to walk alone in darkness. However, seeing your perseverance, I know I was wrong. Friend... I owe you my thanks. ｜ 我原以为——要扫荡罪恶的话，我必须独自行走在长夜之中。\n但你的坚持让我意识到，我又一次错了。「同伴」，我向你致以感谢。
- Jam ｜ 果酱
- Alright, Paimon thinks that should be enough! Let's go back to Rana! ｜ 嗯，这个量应该够了吧！我们回去找拉娜吧！
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- "Mr. Shroomy" ｜ 「蘑菇先生」
- But everyone has their own understanding of justice. If everyone were to pursue their own definition of it, there would be no more order in this world. ｜ 但若每个人都对「正义」有自己的理解，每个人都去追寻自己的「正义」，「规则」将不复存在。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Music Town's Breeze Bells: "Cheeping Finches."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「乐镇风铃-『呖呖雀语』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- (I hope one day my customers will value me for my craft, and not just the stories...) ｜ （还是希望大家认可的是我的手艺呀…）
- After hearing some "secrets" of the House of the Hearth from Clervie, the conflicts between the children have begun to surface... ｜ 听克雷薇讲述了一些壁炉之家的「秘闻」，孩子们之间的矛盾也逐渐浮出水面…
- So why did you lie to Xingxi? ｜ 那不用对星稀说谎也没事。
- Ousia Block ｜ 荒性能量块
- 40% ｜ 40%
- Wushou Dance Costume: Roaring Suanni ｜ 舞兽戏服-「嗷嗷威猊」
- "Fin of Watatsumi" ｜ 「海祇之鳍」
- Shibasuke ｜ 柴助
- See you, in that case. ｜ 那么再见。
- Keep Our Island Secure ｜ 增强岛内治安
- Rather than concluding that the nightmare creature, on top of everything, now has the ability to disappear without a trace, I think there's a different possibility... ｜ 与其考虑「噩梦怪物」突然有了神出鬼没的能力，不如考虑另一种可能…
- Huh? But we can't just leave him here either... ｜ 欸？可是，总不能扔下他不管吧…
- Really? Wow, that sounds tough... ｜ 是吗，真是辛苦啊…
- Let's go with the joyful pose instead, shall we? ｜ 还是开心的姿势合适。
- But... how? Just moments ago, they were everywhere... ｜ 可是，为什么？明明它们刚刚都还在附近…
- Complete "Drills by Lamplight: General Insights" to unlock ｜ 完成「灯下演武·通解」后解锁
- Something is stirring in the field... ｜ 花田中爆发出了异样的躁动…
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- And what should I sell? Wine or coffee? ｜ 还有卖什么…是卖酒还是卖咖啡呢…
- Heavy Hit Taken: I ｜ 重受击·其一
- Uh, it's kinda hard to explain... ｜ 呃…应该说有，还是没有呢…
- I don't really understand these grand ideals... I'm just an ordinary person. But I guess Eternity is something that never changes? ｜ 我嘛，只是个粗人，不太能理解那些大道理…「永恒」应该就是不会变的东西吧？
- Now, I know that we can't place our hopes in you any longer, since you've been stripped of your ambitions, too... ｜ 我知道，你的愿望已经被夺走了，所以你无法再回应我们的期待…
- Hey there, Shenhe! ｜ 你好呀，申鹤！
- Cooking? Paimon was looking forward to more mad scientist stuff! ｜ 还以为你是去准备奇奇怪怪的东西，原来是食谱啊？
- This house doesn't seem to have been occupied by any person... Err, Paimon means, any Aranara, in a while... ｜ 难道这个房子最近一段时间都没有人…我是说，都没有兰那罗住吗…
- Thinking ｜ 思考
- Do you know about the giant dragon that suddenly emerged from the toytanium mines? ｜ 你们知道那头从积木矿窟里突然窜出来的巨龙吗？
- Peculiar to the touch, this type of crystal seems as if it has a will of its own... Performing an attack with Scarlet Quartz releases its energy, which is capable of even melting Ancient Rime formed by unknown energy. ｜ 某种有着奇特质感的结晶，似乎有着某种意志…\n攻击时，深赤之石的力量会释放出去。即使是未知能量形成的远古坚冰，也会被这种力量融化…
- More About Yaoyao: II ｜ 想要了解瑶瑶·其二
- ... ｜ ……
- Offer Delicacy ｜ 致献美食
- The next step requires some visual preparation. So don't open your eyes until I say so. ｜ 接下来的环节需要一些视觉上的准备，我说睁眼的时候才可以睁开哦。
- Radiant Spincrystal 5 ｜ 旋曜玉帛·其五
- It's all thanks to Nepecha's resilience — she never gave up. If it weren't for her bravely trying to get help, then I wouldn't have noticed Auntie's plans so easily. ｜ 这也是多亏了妮佩卡一直没有放弃。要是没有她一直那么勇敢地尝试求救，我可没那么容易就察觉到婶婶的计划。
- A special motif that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 特别的纹样，可用于装饰祝柬。

- Hitting an opponent with Normal and Charged Attacks has a <color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color> chance of forming and dropping an Everfrost Icicle above them, dealing AoE DMG equal to <color=#99FFFFFF>80%</color> of ATK. Opponents affected by Cryo are instead dealt DMG equal to <color=#99FFFFFF>200%</color> of ATK. Can only occur once every 10s. ｜ 普通攻击与重击命中敌人时，有<color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color>概率在敌人上方生成恒冰晶核并坠落，造成<color=#99FFFFFF>80%</color>攻击力的范围伤害。若敌人处于冰元素影响下，则造成<color=#99FFFFFF>200%</color>攻击力的伤害。该效果每10秒至多触发一次。

- Perhaps there's some kind of trigger condition... Or could it be because of my connection to Lord Al-Ahmar? ｜ 难道需要某种条件来触发吗…还是说，与我身为阿赫玛尔大人的子民有关…
- But if you get good at it and feel ready for a challenge, just be patient. I'll add some new wrinkles and twists to it as soon as possible! ｜ 假如你们玩得非常熟练，慢慢感觉这个项目的挑战性不够了，也请别心急，我会争取尽早做出新的关卡！
- If Ganyu has a secret and she wishes to keep it that way, nobody should make it their business to try and get it out of her. That's just basic decency, is it not? ｜ 甘雨有不想被人知道的秘密，他人自然不该过问。事关「礼貌」，本应如此，不是吗？
- Mm... Shibasuke... ｜ 呜呶呶…柴助…
- But ever since they startled several children whilst feeding, I have banned them from going out without me. I've started making food for them. ｜ 但自从它们进食的时候吓到了几个孩子之后，我就不敢让它们自己出去了，都是自己调制口粮给它们吃。
- A jet-black egg, formed by absorbing the essence of flame and rock. - An ordinary shrine made from Otogi Wood.\nShrines shoulder the faith that the people of Inazuma have in the Raiden Shogun. As such, praying at these shrines is regarded by some as the most important of rituals. Thus, they will come forth while wearing and looking their best, having made most careful preparations.\nAs for the valiant and loyal servants of the Shogunate, these shrines also serve as a warning that they must always bear the Almighty Shogun's ideals in mind, and be prepared to sacrifice their all for the cause. ｜ 由御伽木打造的普通神龛。\n神龛承载着稻妻民众对雷电将军的信仰。在神龛前祈祷，则是一些民众最为看重的仪式。为此，他们会整衣敛容，精心准备一番。\n而在忠诚勇毅的幕府人士眼中，神龛多了一层「警示」之意，提醒他们时刻牢记将军大人的理念，并做好为之献出一切的准备。

- So "tent"... ｜ 难道说「帐篷」…
- Oh? And you dare to utter the Commissioner's name? You outlanders have no respect for the rules. ｜ 哦？居然敢直呼勘定奉行大人的名字，哼，外来人果真是一点规矩都没有。
- I see. So your primary objective — which has been foiled so far — was to have a chat with the Hydro Archon. ｜ 这样啊…你们的首要目的是来找水神聊天，可一直没找到好机会。

- Though the battle with the Lord of Eroded Primal Fire has ended, this ring-shaped flame yet burns.\nIn the beginning, in the deepest of nights, as the darkness gradually consumed the starry sky and filled the people with fear, the master of flame emulated the sun by hanging rays of light throughout the sky, thus keeping the unending enemies from beyond the universe at bay.\nThough its glow has been halfway corroded, the glory of a flame that once illuminated the world of old still shines forth. ｜ 在与蚀灭的源焰之主战斗后，仍在不息燃烧的环状火焰。\n从前，在最深邃的夜晚里，逐渐被黑暗吞噬的星空是令人恐惧的，而执掌火焰的主人仿照太阳将光芒悬挂于夜中，以此抵挡永无边际的宙外之敌。\n一半的火焰已受侵蚀的焰芒之辉，似乎还能看出映照旧日世界的光采。
- So how do you do it? ｜ 那你是怎么看见的？
- When you discover the location of a Future Star, the puzzle that conceals it will appear. Solve the puzzle to collect your prize. ｜ 发现「未来星」的踪迹后，隐藏「未来星」的谜题将显现出来，解决谜题即可发现「未来星」。
- Perhaps I should read it a nicer passage... ｜ 唉，下次我得挑一篇更好的念给它听了…
- *sigh* Looks like there is another hurdle in front of me and Mr. Garcia... ｜ 唉，看来我和加尔恰先生的面前，又多了一道跨不过去的河啊…
- I couldn't both hold the invitation and a glass at the same time. But surely I wouldn't put it in just any random place, it could easily be misplaced. ｜ 这样不就没办法再拿着邀请函了嘛，可如果把邀请函随便放在哪里，又可能会忘掉。

- Hmm, this doesn't feel like a divination technique from beyond this world. My school of shamanism relies on the earth rather than the sky. When the fake inauspicious stars show their teeth, I bind them with the spirit of the earth, the bones of dead animals, and the power of the obscuring smoke. ｜ 不像是提瓦特外面世界的占卜技术，我——至少我这一系不依靠天，反而更依靠大地。天上虚假的凶星恶曜显露之时，我就依靠迷烟、大地之灵和动物骨头将其绑缚。

- Do you know what the most distinctively Inazuman item of all is? No, it is not a blade of any sort. It is a lacquerware carving of the Statue of Her Excellency, the Almighty Narukami Ogosho, God of Thunder. They are hand-made by old and skilled lacquerware craftspeople, and nearly every single home in the city has one. My house, you ask? I have five. ｜ 知道稻妻最具代表性的特产是什么吗？不对，并非刀具。是「御建鸣神主尊大御所大人像」造型的漆器，由老练的漆器师傅手工打造，城内几乎每家每户都供奉着一座。我的屋里？有五座。

- 50 years... In some ways, it's a long time, in others, it's no time at all. Really, it's just a number. ｜ 五十年说长也长，说短也短，不是什么了不起的事。

- That isn't something they could've accomplished with their scholarly talents alone. In the Sanctuary of Surasthana, there's a device of Greater Lord Rukkhadevata's that she once used to isolate herself while meditating. ｜ 光靠那些学者的水平自然不行。净善宫中其实原本就有大慈树王为了独自冥想而隔绝一切外物的装置…

- It's been a while, Layla. ｜ 好久不见，莱依拉。

- However... it's inevitable that some evidence will be left behind during a crime, and as long as there is evidence, it is only a matter of time before the crime is solved. ｜ 但可惜的是…人在犯下罪案的时候，几乎都会留下痕迹。只要留下了痕迹，这桩罪案被侦破也是早晚的事。

- I mean, I'll be making a loss! What do you say? You've never seen such an awesome deal in your life, am I right? ｜ 算下来我亏了好多呢！哼哼，没见过这么划算的生意吧？
- But are you sure there's no danger? I couldn't bear for him to go around harming people. ｜ 可是，这也不能证明狼哥的事没有危险，我真的很不想看到他去到处害人。
- ...Wait, wh—who is there? How did you get in here? ｜ …不对，谁，谁在那里？你是怎么到这儿来的？

- Those three have close links with Khaenri'ah, and have as such been deemed suspects. They have been locked in the hanging prison beneath Dainichi Mikoshi. ｜ 和坎瑞亚人有密切接触的三人被怀疑是嫌疑人，囚禁在大日御舆下方的悬空牢内。
- *cough* I'm sorry that Nara had to see me in such a messy state. ｜ 咳咳。让那菈目睹我狼狈的模样，真是十分羞愧。
- Dawn ｜ 黎明
- You're kinda cute when you bargain. I'm listening. ｜ 你提条件的样子还挺可爱的，愿闻其详。
- Neko, "Provisional Head Priestess of the Asase Shrine," seems to have something she wants to do... ｜ 浅濑神社的代宫司寝子，似乎有什么事想做…
- You can find everything... ｜ 无所不有…
- Well then. May we meet again, Traveler. ｜ 那么，我们有缘再见吧，旅者。
- (That smells good... Really good.) ｜ （好香，好香啊。）

- Is that really important right now, Master Diluc!? ｜ 迪卢克老爷应该批评更重要的地方吧！
- (These notes seem to have been plundered during a recent raid on the Fatui. The age of these notes has made the words difficult to recognize.) ｜ （似乎是最近被搜刮的愚人众翻出来的记事。因为年岁，大部分文本已经无法辨识了。）
- Massive amounts of Hydro energy are coursing through this damp ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou shall earn Weapon Ascension Materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座潮湿的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的水元素之力。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得强化装备的物质。
- "By past fuel, and present flame, life marches ever on." ｜ 「柴火的往日，烈焰的今时，皆为永不回头的生命。」
- Aarav, are you sure this is the right place? Something feels off... ｜ 阿拉夫，你确定是这里吗？我怎么觉得怪怪的？
- Sorry. My memories are jumbled up with many others. I cannot be sure about many things. ｜ …抱歉喔，我的记忆和许多的记忆混在一起，有很多事情还没弄清楚。
- Whoa, are you serious? But this is all just a hunch you have, right? ｜ 不会吧…这些也只是你的推测吧？
- *sigh* It has been fun, of course. I'm not doubting that. The scenery's good, the food's pretty nice, and they've got all manner of interesting life here, especially the cute little baby Saurians... ｜ 唉，虽然纳塔确实挺好玩的。风景不错，吃的也不错，还有各种有趣的生物，特别是那些龙宝宝也很可爱…
- That means Director Zosimos... I mean, all of Daiya, is working so very hard on the plays, day after day! ｜ 这说明佐西摩斯导演…不对，是「黛依阿」的所有成员，每天都在专心创作，超级努力！
- Turns out that it's you. An encouraging sign. ｜ 确认是你，我就放心了。
- ...Actually, never mind. Yeah... Don't bring that one up with Master. ｜ …还是算了，嘘…这话题可别让师父听到了。
- I'm searching for my husband, Inaba Tousaburou Kyuuzou. He is a tall man without any facial hair and has a scar on the side of his forehead. He has yet to return home despite the ceasefire. ｜ 寻夫稻叶藤三郎久藏。高大无须，额角有剑疤。自停战以来尚未归家。

- That's right, and she's had lots of baby thunderbirds too! They're all up in the clouds right now, though, and they don't come down much! ｜ 对！而且，而且还生了好多小雷鸟！他们现在都在云层上面飞，基本不会下来见人了！
- Is there anything else to be done for Festival Utsava? ｜ 要准备无忧节，还有什么要做的？

- See you soon. ｜ 下次再见啦。
- The first lesson as an apprentice: Vigor, Strength, Will. These words are written on the bandana so you'll never forget them. ｜ 入门第一件事，精气神。绑上头巾，随时提醒自己勿忘这三字。
- A cloud atlas symbolizing Dvalin and his former master, the Anemo Archon. It details the winds and clouds of the northern regions and contains the powers of the sky and wind. ｜ 象征风龙与其主风之神的云图集。细致记载了北地天空的风与云，蕴含苍空与长风的力量。
- Even I was a little surprised to hear that you'd decided to leave on a trip. ｜ 听说你决定出门远游，即便是我也感到有些意外。
- Okay. See you shortly. ｜ 那一会儿见。
- With the two of us fighting together, I feel like we could take on any enemy! ｜ 感觉我们两个一起战斗，不管是什么样的敌人都能打败！
- So my question is, how could a proud oni like yourself go and abuse the weak and plunder the innocent? Why break the oath that our kind swore all those years ago? ｜ 高傲的青鬼怎么会去恃强凌弱，掠夺无辜？为什么你要打破坚守至今的承诺！
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- You mean, that same dog who keeps leading me down strange paths no matter how long I've fed it, and leaves me to face the hilichurls on my own? ｜ 你们是说，不顾我喂养它这么久却带我走进歧途，还留我独自面对丘丘人的家伙吗？
- Restores <color=#3399CCFF>70–100</color> Stamina. ｜ 恢复<color=#3399CCFF>70-100</color>点体力。
- When It's Windy ｜ 起风的时候…
- Seems like we've completed Ioroi's commission. ｜ 五百藏的委托也算是完成了吧。
- Go to Mondstadt's alchemy store ｜ 前往蒙德城的炼金铺
- Go to the next person you need to apologize to ｜ 与下一位道歉对象对话
- Really, I insist — it's no trouble. Besides, hang out with me enough and I'm sure you'll be speaking fluent Gaming-ese before long! ｜ 哎呀小意思，我们饮多几次茶聊多几次天，自然什么都听得懂了！
- For every point of the entire party's combined maximum Energy capacity, the Elemental Burst DMG of the character equipping this weapon is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>0.18%</color>. A maximum of <color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color> increased Elemental Burst DMG can be achieved this way. ｜ 队伍中所有角色的元素能量上限的总和，每1点能使装备此武器的角色的元素爆发造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>0.18%</color>，通过这种方式，元素爆发造成的伤害至多提高<color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color>。
- Hmm? Did I hear you wrong? Is this a music festival or a food festival? ｜ 咦？是我听错了吗？是音乐庆典？还是小吃庆典？
- Since Cowell was the deceased, we haven't placed much attention on him. ｜ 由于他是死者，之前我们并没有把目光过多地放在他的身上。
- I'll go find a suitable place outside to set a furnace up, and then I'll start making my tools. ｜ 等会我就去外面找个合适的位置搭炉，然后制作工具。
- If so, or if not... what is it to you? ｜ …是又怎样，不是，又怎样？
- C—Congratulations... ｜ 恭…恭喜你…

- ...Fine, whatever. ｜ …行。可以。

- *cough*... ｜ 咳咳…

- Focalors must have counted on you to make that decision as well... Your verdict was the key to making the prophecy appear to have come true while saving everyone. ｜ 芙卡洛斯竟然算到了这里…这就是让预言看似发生，但又能够拯救所有人的关键点吧。
- Huh. Why are these still so many bandits? C'mon, we can't let them destroy that Warding Stone. Let's get 'em! ｜ 怎么还有这么多盗贼…不能让他们破坏「镇石」，打倒他们吧！

- Oh, so I just need to go drink some of this spring water, and then I'll be able to sing? I'll be right back, Mama! ｜ 那我也去喝这种泉水就行了吧？妈妈，我出门一趟！

- A moment later and you'd have missed us. ｜ 差一点点就不在了。

- A creation left behind by the ancient dragons of Natlan. It can change the direction of phlogiston flow, creating a Spiritway. This might be the prototype on which Spiritdoors are based. ｜ 纳塔古龙遗留的造物，可以改变燃素的流向，从而创造出「游隙灵道」，很可能是「灵道刻印门」的原型。

- Defeating an opponent instantly restores 8% HP for the current character. ｜ 角色每击败一个敌人后自身生命值立即恢复8%。
- Plus, I always wanted to do something to thank you for saving me from the Night Kingdom... ｜ 我被救回来之后，还一直都没有机会用行动向火神大人道谢…
- Well, then you'd best keep the share you got from our little Yumkasaurus well. As for what I gave you... Haha, just spend it on whatever you want. ｜ 那你可要把小匿叶龙送给你的那一份收好了。我给你的那一份嘛…哈哈哈，就随你怎么花吧。
- Before the beginning of all stories, after the end of all tales, in the interstice between reality and fantasy, there is an endless drama unfolding, never ceasing upon the stage — There is no beginning, nor an end, for in the telling of the "story," the two differ not. ｜ 在一切故事开始之前，在一切故事终结之后，在幻想与真实的隙间，如今依然上演着永无休止的剧诗——没有起始，也没有终结，因为两者在「故事」的叙述中并无分别。

- Massive, uniformly shaped stone pillars that are adorned with fine metal embellishments. Mostly found above the entrances to the various major zones within the Stadium of the Sacred Flame, they stand as symbols of the countless heroes of Natlan's past.\nAs depicted on the so-called Wall of Despair, it was by the valiant efforts of the heroes that Natlan's path was carved, opening up the way forward for the generations to come. May all be inspired by their great deeds, and the young ones follow courageously in their footsteps. ｜ 形状规则的大型岩柱，其上带有精致的金属装饰，据说多见于圣火竞技场内各个大区墙壁的门庭之上，象征着纳塔曾经的无数英杰。\n在名为「绝望」的墙壁上，正是英杰们用自己的奋战为纳塔闯出了门庭，并打开了道路。愿他们的伟业激励所有人，愿孩童们能勇敢地跟上英杰脚步…

- Although she has lived her entire life in Sumeru, the city of wisdom, Nilou has never shown any talent in the field of "knowledge." However, she always knows how to soothe the emotions of others in her own way.\n"This is probably a generous gift to me from Lesser Lord Kusanali."\nAfter learning to dance with her teacher, Nilou became deeply aware of the power of body language.\nCombining her talents and knowledge of body language, she created her very own form of "body movement therapy."\nFor example, when Mr. Zubayr is angry, everyone in the theater would be walking on eggshells.\nBut Nilou would keep a warm smile, drawing wonderful patterns one after another in the air with her arms and fingers.\n"Imagine that we are in the rainforest that has just rained, and that you are following me as we walk onward, saying hello to every animal that passes by, waving, leaving everything else behind..."\nPerhaps this may seem childish and funny to a bystander, but for those who are wrapped up in the moment, Nilou's gentle voice can cause the anger that clouds their minds to disappear before they even know it.\nWhat's even more amazing is that, according to Mr. Afshin, this body movement therapy has been trending recently — and it even works on his two stubborn Sumpter Beasts... ｜ 虽然一直身处智慧之都——须弥，但妮露并没有展露出任何「知识」方面的天赋。不过，她似乎总能用自己的方式安抚他人的情绪。\n「这大概就是小吉祥草王大人慷慨赠送给我的礼物吧。」\n跟着老师开始学习跳舞之后，妮露深刻地感受到了肢体语言的力量。\n她将她的天赋和肢体语言相结合，自创出一套肢体动作疗愈法。\n比如，遇到祖拜尔先生火冒三丈的时候，整个剧场都会战战兢兢如履薄冰…\n只有妮露温柔地笑着，用手臂和手指在空中接连比划出奇妙的图案。\n「想象一下，现在在刚刚下过雨的雨林里，你跟着我一直往前走啊走，和每一只擦肩而过的动物朋友都打打招呼，挥挥手，把其他事情远远地甩在身后…」\n或许在旁人看来这难免有些幼稚滑稽，但对当事人来说，在妮露轻声细语的叙述下，脑中的怒火不知不觉间就已烟消云散。\n更为奇妙的是，据阿夫辛先生说，这一套肢体动作疗愈法最近还有发展的趋势，甚至对他那两只脾气倔强的驮兽都有效果…

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Summary</color>\nIn a corner of Port Ormos, you and Paimon encounter friends whom you made during the inaugural Nilotpala Cup Beast Tamers Tournament. They are currently preparing for the next tournament, and to that effect have come up with a new game with which to advertise for the Beast Tamers Tournament...\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nYou must reach Adventure Rank 30 and complete the prerequisite Archon Quest "A New Star Approaches." (Complete the Archon Quest "Akasha Pulses, the Kalpa Flame Rises" for the best experience.)\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nA new stage will unlock on each day after the event begins. Complete these Mechanicus stages and complete the corresponding challenge objectives to obtain the matching rewards. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n在须弥奥摩斯港的一角，你与派蒙遇见了首届「月莲杯驯兽师大赛」上结识的友人，他们正在筹备下一届赛事，并为此推出了宣传驯兽师大赛的全新游戏…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到30，并完成以下前置任务：魔神任务「迫近的客星」。（完成魔神任务「虚空鼓动，劫火高扬」后体验更佳。）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动开启后的每天，将解锁一个棋阵关卡。通关棋阵关卡，并完成相应的挑战目标，即可领取对应的奖励。

- The youngest disciple of Streetward Rambler.\nShe is gentle and considerate, treating others with sincerity and generosity, and is always actively taking on the responsibilities of others.\nShe is a gifted, enthusiastic learner, and though she is young and sometimes plays harmless pranks, she will surely grow into a learned and erudite woman in time. ｜ 歌尘浪市真君座下最年幼的弟子。\n性格温柔体贴，待人真诚慷慨，总是主动担负起照料他人的责任。\n她天资聪颖，积极好学，虽说年齿尚幼，偶尔闹出些无伤大雅的小笑话，但只要假以时日，定会成长为学识渊博的女子。

- Mysterious Stone Slate (VI) ｜ 神秘的石板·六
- A large commercial building with a design almost identical to that of Lepaute Horlogerie. Lepaute Horlogerie made full use of the building's piping to hang an exquisite, large watch face on the central pillar of the outer wall.\nFrom the outside, this building appears slightly larger than the other stores in Quartier Lyonnais. However, from the beginning it had an integrated design with an anti-earthquake foundation, which was shaped like a bathtub and laid with slag cement. Additionally, both internal and external gaps were filled with shock-absorbing materials like Mallow Tree leaves and Seagrass. This prevents vibrations from things like clockwork meka and passing freight trailers from disturbing the personnel delicately constructing the exquisitely designed clockwork devices within. While most people would find such vibrations almost impossible to perceive, they can cause inaccuracies in an intricate mechanism like a timepiece. Therefore, preventive measures are necessary... ｜ 尺寸宽大的商用建筑，与「勒波特钟表店」的形制相同。「勒波特钟表店」还充分利用了建筑内部预留的管路，在外墙中轴挂上了精巧的大型表盘机关。\n从外表上看，这型建筑只比其他利奥奈区的商铺稍大了一点，实际上，它有着整体设计的「防震地基」——打下地基之时，工匠们就用炉渣水泥敷设了一个浴缸型的地基，并在外部和内部间隙填入诸如悬铃树叶与海草层压物之类的减震材料，以便建筑内的人员设备在制造钟表这类精密发条机关时，可以尽可能排除诸如发条机关和货运拖车路过时产生的震动干扰。一般人很难感受到这类震动，但对于精密的机关而言，它们足以让制造出来的钟表失准，不得不防…
- Guest Challenge: Gorou ｜ 来客挑战：五郎
- Big cold person. ｜ 人很大很冰。
- Yes, I've seen them before. ｜ 嗯，我见过。
- *sigh*... I have to do this. ｜ 唉…没办法了啊。
- So this is what you meant by bringing the festival to me... *sigh* Is there no end to the peculiarities of human behavior? ｜ 这就是你们搬来的海灯节？人类的行为，非要如此怪异吗？
- Hehe, don't worry. I'm always happy to help a junior colleague from Yuehai Pavilion. ｜ 呵呵，没有的事，既然是月海亭的后辈遇上麻烦，我随时愿意帮忙。
- To this end, I offer advice and tell the truth. ｜ 为此，我提供建议，说出真相。
- No news... ｜ 没有消息…
- #Morning {NICKNAME}. Time to fire up the stove for another day of customers. Thanks again! ｜ #早，今天也有劳你咯，{NICKNAME}。
- But I must warn you that your sentence will be extended if you fail to restrain yourself and end up seriously injuring or killing your opponent. ｜ 对于这件事我必须提醒一下，失手重伤或者致死对手的话，刑期会延长。
- A bird feather touched by the witch who once dreamt of burning away all the demons in the world. Its eternal flame burns hot. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的魔女触碰过的鸟羽，在恒常的燃烧中挥发着烈焰的温度。
- Get behind me! ｜ 到我身后。
- I will enter first. Mein Fräulein need not worry. ｜ 打头阵的正是在下。小姐自己是不会动的。
- Gorou is to Sangonomiya Kokomi as I am to the Raiden Shogun. He is fiercely loyal, and I have great respect for this. It's a shame we're on opposing sides, so we'll never get to work together... Still, I am glad to have an admirable foe. Also... I hear he's a fifth-born son. That just makes it even better. ｜ 他之于珊瑚宫心海，正如我之于将军大人。同为坚守忠义之人，我很欣赏他。只可惜立场不同，注定没办法同行。但有这样值得敬佩的对手，还不赖。而且，「五郎」…可是个好名字。
- I studied maps of Natlan before we left, Monsieur Montluson. I don't remember ever seeing such a name... ｜ 蒙吕松先生，出发之前我仔细翻阅过纳塔的地理图志，根本不记得纳塔有这个地名。

- Don't you think that's a bit long? ｜ 好长！
- Give the appropriate documents to Jiayi ｜ 将相应材料交给嘉义
- We are already stuck, my friend. The more people we can lead into this pit and stack as padding beneath our feet, the more comfortable our lives will be. ｜ 我们也在火坑里，学弟。多找点人帮我们垫着，我们才不会被火烤焦。
- Not sure. I'll probably start heading back to Liyue, but I might change my plan on the way. ｜ 不知道，打算回一趟璃月港，但可能中途就改变了计划。
- "Also"? I take it that someone's done this to you before? ｜ 「也」？这招曾经有用过？
- Even as Nechca's illness grew worse, Tlazolli never gave up. Like a torch in the night, she was determined to burn bright, even as darkness encroached from all directions... ｜ 在小妮赫佳病情最严重的那段时间，特拉佐莉就像是一束陷入泥潭的火炬。拼了命的发着光和热，底下的泥水却追逐得越来越近…

- Shrine maidens, huh? I guess I could give that a try... ｜ 巫女？现在的巫女，还、还真有新意…

- <color=#D3BC8E>Normal Attack</color>\n(Prepare for 1 turn)\nDeals 2 {SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG</color>. If this character has at least 6 HP, then this DMG is increased by 1 and this character deals 1 Piercing DMG to self. ｜ <color=#D3BC8E>普通攻击</color>\n（需准备1个行动轮）\n造成2点{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素伤害</color>，如果本角色生命值至少为6，则此伤害+1并对自身造成1点穿透伤害。
- Uh... Uncle, you just mentioned that you're looking for a job, right? ｜ 唔…大叔，你刚才说，你在找工作对吧？
- Hehe, I only fear that you won't be able to keep up with me. ｜ 呵呵，只怕你画霄灯的速度，跟不上我出灯谜的速度。
- I came straight back once the previous incident concluded. ｜ 上次的事结束之后，我就直接回来了。
- It would need to give you the option of scrubbing the board clean. ｜ 还要有擦除画面的功能。
- A member of the decentralized criminal organization that has footprints all over the continent and even deep within unknown domains.\nCryo Potioneers are quite the welcome sight amongst the Treasure Hoarders due to their elixirs having the ability to rapidly cool things down. Even out in the wild where there are no Mist Flowers to be found, they can have some cold liquor to make merry with. ｜ 足迹遍布大陆各处，甚至深入未知秘境的松散盗贼组织中的一员。\n冰之药剂师在盗宝团当中相当受欢迎，因为他们调配的冰之灵药有快速降温的作用。即使是在没有冰雾花的野外，也可以制作冰镇酒类饮料。
- Captain! Are you back on Watatsumi Island to lead Swordfish II again? We've all been feeling your absence. ｜ 队长！你这次回海祇岛，会重新接手剑鱼二番队吗？我们大家都很想你！
- A pot made by Arapacati.\nThe Aranara hold a primal fear of fire. Only Arapacati's brothers dare to approach fire due to their fascination about a Nara tradition known as cooking. To protect them from getting burned by the dancing flames, Arapacati invented this pot.\nWhen future Nara friends come to future Festival Utsava, they should be able to enjoy some more palatable dishes then. ｜ 兰帕卡提制作的烹饪锅灶。\n兰那罗对火怀有原始的恐惧。只有兰帕卡提的「哥哥们」因为迷醉于烹饪这一那菈风俗，所以敢于接近火。为了不使他们为跳动的火苗所惑而灼伤，兰帕卡提设计了这样的锅灶。\n未来的那菈友人来到未来的无忧节时，或许能尝到更美味的菜肴吧。
- I've never been so encouraged by someone else before! ｜ 我还从没被别人这么鼓励过！
- Lyney, what're you looking at? ｜ 林尼在看什么？
- Houzhang ｜ 侯章
- Oh no, no, no... The Fisherman, what is the Fisherman doing here!? ｜ 哎吔…「渔夫」，「渔夫」怎么会在这里？！

- That was never recorded in the orphanage's records... ｜ 这些可没写在孤儿院的记录里…

- Come forth and perish! ｜ 我还能再消灭一百个呢！

- Too many notes added within a short time, cannot add more. ｜ 短时间内添加音符过多，无法继续添加
- Fish grilled thoroughly with moderate fire, locking the delicious juice inside the meat under the crispy skin. A small bite is all that's needed to unlock its wondrous and delicious taste. ｜ 小火细烤的鱼串。火烤后的油脂细腻地分布在酥脆鱼皮与香嫩鱼肉之间，轻轻一抿就已满口留香。
- Recipe ｜ 食谱
- Look! The seal really was broken! Mr. Zhongli is indeed quite remarkable! ｜ 快看！封印真的被打开了！不愧是钟离先生！
- Faf-54466 ｜ Faf-54466
- The weirdo with the snake around his neck? What do you wanna speak to him for? ｜ 那个脖子上挂着蛇的怪家伙？为什么要去找他呀？
- Hm, it would seem you're not completely devoid of intelligence — fitting for my future subjects. Still, you're overlooking a very important detail. ｜ 你们是挺聪明的，我没有看错人，哎，但你们搞错了最重要的一件事…
- Oh, not at all. It's just that the monitoring data I gathered have sunk to the bottom along with the observation station, and I don't know how I can fish them back out. That's what's got me so worried. ｜ 啊，那倒不是，只是因为之前汇总好的监测数据和观测站一起沉下去了，不知道怎么才能打捞上来，所以才在犯愁呢。
- To be fair, I've heard that the two of you are extremely dangerous and that we might be attacked even while en route to work. ｜ #虽说早就听闻{NICKNAME}和派蒙非常危险，有的时候只是走在执行公务的路上也会被突然袭击…
- A smirking woodcarving head that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving." It's painted pink and reminds people of huge flowers in full bloom.\nA fairy tale writer wrote several fairy tales about the mischievous Aranara who used to be pranksters and eventually admitted their mistakes. Unfortunately, these fairy tales have inspired more naughty children... ｜ 嚣张坏笑着的木刻脑袋，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。以颜料涂制成粉色，让人联想起大朵盛放的花。\n有一位童话作者，编写了数篇喜爱恶作剧的兰那罗改正错误的童话，成功让调皮捣蛋的邻居家小朋友认错。不幸的是，这些童话启发了更多的顽皮小朋友…
- I just scouted out all of Wolvendom... but I did not see you. ｜ 我刚在奔狼领侦察了一番…没想到遇见了你们。
- Listen here, you. It's not just Kinich and Mualani's time you're wasting, but mine too! MINE! ｜ 我告诉你，你耽误的可不只是他们两个的时间，还有我，我的时间！
- Pavlo ｜ 愚人众·帕夫洛
- Skyward Sonnet ｜ 高天之歌
- Err, you wanna go in too? Well... Ugh, alright. I—If that's the case, Paimon's not that scared anymore. ｜ 咦，你也愿意吗？真的吗…好、好吧，既然这样好像也没有那么害怕了。
- Character Ascension material.\n"Welcome to this world." ｜ 角色突破素材。\n「欢迎来到世界。」
- A wooden seat renowned for its water-blue soft cushion and intricate floral-patterned backrest, offering an exceptional seating experience, commonly seen in places like the "Golden Dusk," used to welcome visiting guests. It is said that to enhance the vacation experience, a leader of the "People of the Springs" sought out a master craftsman from the "Children of Echoes" to create a chair that would provide supreme comfort. "When one thinks of the 'People of the Springs,' the sea comes to mind; and when thinking of the sea, one inevitably will think of sapphires!" —Thus, the master craftsman proposed the idea of inlaying a massive sapphire into the seat. Naturally, such an expensive solution was impractical for the "People of the Springs." Ultimately, they chose a more reasonable option — opting for a thick and comfortable water-blue cushion as a substitute for the sapphire. ｜ 以水蓝色软质坐垫与镂空花纹靠背闻名的木质座椅，有着极佳的使用体验，常见于「黄金傍晚」等地，被用于招待远来至此的游客。据说，为了给大家提供更好的度假体验，「流泉之众」的某任首领特意找来了「回声之子」的大师级工匠，试图打造一款能提供舒适坐感的靠椅。「说起『流泉之众』，就让人想起大海；而说起大海，必然就会提到蓝宝石！」——因此，大师提出了在座椅上镶着巨大蓝宝石的构想。当然，「流泉之众」不可能接受一个如此昂贵的方案。最终，他们选了一个相对合理的方案——用厚实而舒适的水蓝色坐垫来代替蓝宝石。
- Electro Elemental Infusion ｜ 雷元素附魔
- I haven't got anywhere else to be, either. I'll take a stroll nearby and see if I can spot anything. ｜ 我也没什么事，到附近散散步，顺便看看能不能找到。
- So... another bomb? ｜ 其实还是炸弹吧…
- For him to correct the error of his ways, he must feel for himself the same suffering he has inflicted on Chang the Ninth. ｜ 要让他不再做同样的事，只能让他切身感受到和常九爷同样的痛苦。
- Well, anyway, Paimon thinks this magic suits you perfectly, Nilou! ｜ 嘿嘿，我总有种这魔法很适合妮露的感觉呢。

- Please go, you two. Time waits for no one! ｜ 二位请快点去吧，时间可不等人的！
- So a creature may not speak, even if it has a mouth. I've never seen a creature like you before, so I dared not make the assumption that you could speak. ｜ 有嘴也不一定会说话，你是我从来没见过的生物，我不会妄下定义。
- Whoa! The voices are coming from all over the place! ｜ 呜哇！声音从四面八方传过来了！
- Well, practice makes perfect... ｜ 只能说是熟能生巧…
- Please, be careful. ｜ 你一定要小心。

- The story goes that the antlers were made from the very essence of Rex Lapis' divine power, which made it the hardest material in all of Liyue. ｜ 据说，他的角吸收了岩王帝君岩之力的神髓，曾是整个璃月最坚硬的东西。
- So all of this was just because you got lost!? ｜ 居然是这么现实的理由？！
- A plain and simple noodle dish. The buckwheat noodles are boiled and then cooled. Their texture is smooth and they have just the right amount of toughness. The inexpensive ingredients and simple make of this dish have made it very popular amongst Inazumans. ｜ 朴素简单的面食。将荞麦制成的面条水煮后晾凉，入口滑爽，富有韧性。由于原料便宜、制作简单而广受稻妻人民欢迎。
- Martial arts and thaumaturgy are alike in that there are always new dimensions to explore. Thanks to your guidance, I can see myself making progress. ｜ 习武与术法一样，都有境界。受你指导，我又有进益了。

- Yeah! We're so close! We can't call it quits now! ｜ 是啊，都到这里了，怎么可能放弃！

- Excuse me, are you here to help me find my grandpa? ｜ 请问，你们是来帮我找爷爷的吗？
- "I have long since passed the age of caring about my appearance. It's just, I don't know why but it keeps me up at night... If only there was some kind of product against hair loss." ｜ 「我早就过了在乎外形的年纪。只是，究竟为什么，会让我如此烦恼呢…如果有治脱发的方法就好了。」

- We'll help too. ｜ 我们也来帮忙吧。
- It's so sturdy... ｜ 啊哟…好结实…

- Moo... ｜ 哞…
- Hah... ｜ 哈…

- I'm sure I've seen this scene before... ｜ 好像之前也见过这样的情景…
- Help Needed:\nLiyue Harbor's noodle dishes are very unique, indeed — totally different from the ones in Mondstadt.\nHmm, I'd like to compare and contrast the two — a most rigorous avenue of research, I assure you.\nAnd when one speaks of Mondstadt's noodle specialty, it has to be Flaming Red Bolognese.\nIf someone's willing to help, please bring me <color=#3399CC>two servings of Flaming Red Bolognese</color>. ｜ 求助：\n璃月港的面食居然这么有特色，和蒙德城的完全不一样。\n嗯…我想把两座城市的特色面食对比着吃吃看，然后再细致地进行研究。\n说到蒙德城的特色面食，我最熟悉的就是火火肉酱面了。\n如果有人愿意帮忙的话，就请带<color=#3399CC>两份火火肉酱面</color>来给我吧。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>For every 3 Action Cards you use that did not exist in your initial Deck:</color> Create 2 $[K411]. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>我方每打出3张名称不存在于初始牌组中的行动牌后：</color>生成2个$[K411]。

- A ceremonial cup that holds the blood of the innocent. It is brimming with the thundering fury of the prayers that echo within. ｜ 注入无辜者鲜血的祝圣的仪式之杯，祈愿雷鸣回荡其中。最终溢满了如雷的盛怒。
- And its wings are very huge and frightening. ｜ 魔龙翅膀大大，很可怕。

- ...Perhaps we should just leave them alone. ｜ 那、那我们就不打扰了。
- Blueprints? Oh, that's right! Granny handed us some when she gave us the teapot, didn't she? Let's take them out and have a look! ｜ 图纸…对了！婆婆在给我们壶的时候，不是也给了我们图纸吗？快拿出来看看吧。
- Oroo... ｜ 唔…
- Notes left by an adventurer of an unknown era. In them, they recorded their adventures in Ochkanatlan. ｜ 不知是哪个时代的冒险家遗留下来的笔记，上面记载了此人在「奥奇卡纳塔」中的冒险经历。
- I have never regretted my decision to leave the Akademiya... and I don't think that will change in the future. ｜ 当初执意告别教令院，这个决定我至今没有后悔，将来的话…想必也不会后悔。
- So what was with the warning letter? ｜ 所以三天前那封预告函…

- The "hidden rule" of the production zone... people are not supposed to work three days in a row, and if they do, they'll get "strange meat" in their welfare meal. ｜ 生产区的「隐秘规矩」…不能连续进行三天的打工，如果这样做的话，就会在第三天中午的福利餐中发现「诡异的肉」。
- Teyiz's funeral was held on a low mountain outside of the tribal settlement. For her tribe, the passing of this Name Engraver did not come as a surprise.\nShe had grown old, and often told those looking after her that she could hear the whispers of the Wayob in her dreams.\nBut she said that she couldn't leave just yet, as there were still things she needed to pass on — once she had found the right person, of course. She could not answer the Wayob's call until that time had come.\n"...With the blood of this land."\n"Burn away all impurities, and souls gather in the fire."\nAnd with that, Xilonen let go of the torch, and the pyre began to roar.\nShe stayed there the entire night. The next morning, she gathered her teacher's ashes into an urn and placed them in the cave she had always spoken of.\nYet in the world outside, Teyiz's story scattered like a wild wind blowing through the valley.\nOne person, for instance, claimed that he had been initiated into the true craft of forging Ancient Names by Teyiz herself, producing a signed book from her as proof. Another said that she had left them her workshop, showing the key as evidence. But Xilonen did not concern herself with such petty bickering, such maneuvering for personal gain. What troubled her more deeply were the more insidious lies.\n"Apparently, when Teyiz taught the stories of our heroes, she would sometimes question their grounding in truth..."\n"So you heard that too? Good grief... It all sounds quite academic, but what about the children? Surely there's a risk of them being led astray?"\n"Exactly what I was thinking! And I also heard that when she was young, Teyiz concerned herself with nothing other than technical research. Should someone like that really have been teaching our young ones the right way to go about forging Ancient Names? Hmm..."\nThrough word of mouth, Teyiz's story was twisted beyond all recognition — one moment held up as a paragon of virtue and selflessness, the next as a pernicious schemer driven purely by ulterior motives. In one version, she was the hero; in the next, a petty villain.\nWhen people fail to grasp the wind, they instead begin to create for themselves a variety of boxes, then claim that the wind is whatever shape they've made.\nBut the true story will only ever be — can only ever be — that dark, heavy stone.\nThe next day, the tribespeople were shocked to see that Xilonen, usually so laid-back, seemed like a changed person. As if driven by an endless store of energy, she traveled all over the Children of Echoes' lands, interviewing everyone and anyone connected to Teyiz, reviewing every document she could find that mentioned her old teacher's name. Yet that wasn't enough for Xilonen. She left the tribe, consulting couriers from the Scions of the Canopy, meeting musicians from the People of the Springs, requesting access to the woven scrolls of the Masters of the Night-Wind, scaling the cliffs of the Flower-Feather Clan, stepping through the gates of the Collective of Plenty... With the utmost rigor and painstaking care, Xilonen meticulously recorded every single trace that Teyiz had left out there in the world.\nNot only were these documents what she needed to refute the slanderous stories and malicious rumors about Teyiz — they were enough to dismiss the strange titles that some had bestowed upon her too.\nWhat Xilonen wanted to leave behind was a true, unblemished version of Teyiz.\nOnly flawless ores of the utmost strength could be refined, forged, and eventually tempered into something worthy of being handed down to posterity.\n...\n"Xilonen, why did you set out to become a Name Engraver in the first place? It all looks so tiring..."\nXilonen's hammer blows rang out loud as her apprentices watched her, resting their chins in the palms of their hands.\nXilonen paused for a moment to wipe away the sweat from her brow.\n"I never really did. But my father, my mother, my teacher... They all did before me. So what choice did I have?\n"And besides..."\nShe raised her hammer once more.\n"Someone has to shoulder the responsibility of telling stories, right?" ｜ 泰伊吉婆婆的葬礼在部族外的一座矮山上举行。这位铸名师的离去，其实已经在大家的意料之内。\n她已经老了，时常和照顾她的人说，能听见大灵在梦里对自己低语。\n但她还不能离开，还有话要找一个合适的人留下。在那之前，她不能回应大灵的召唤。\n「…山之血，壑之眼。」\n「炙浊焚秽，魂聚火渊。」\n火把从希诺宁手里投下，柴堆燃起。\n她在这里等上了一整晚，到了次日早晨，再将婆婆的骨灰收整进瓮，安置在婆婆一直念叨的那个岩窟里。\n但在岩窟之外，泰伊吉婆婆的故事却如同山谷里的狂风一般凌乱了起来。\n有人说，泰伊吉把打造古名的真正技艺传给了自己，他手里有泰伊吉签名的典籍为证；有人说，泰伊吉把工坊留给了自己，自己拿着那个工坊的钥匙…这些事关利益的撕咬并不值得希诺宁留意。真正让她在意的，是某些更为狡诈的谎言。\n「我听说，泰伊吉在授课的时候，有时候会质疑那些英雄故事的真实性啊…」\n「你也这么听说了？我也…唉，虽然这只是学术上的问题，但这样会不会带偏孩子呢？」\n「是啊是啊，我之前听说，泰伊吉年轻时候一直专注于纯技术研究，这样的人来教授铸造古名…嗯…」\n在口耳传递中，泰伊吉婆婆的故事扭曲讹变，她时而伟大无私，时而别有目的，在一个人嘴里变成英雄人物，转眼又变成了卑劣小人。\n人们没法抓住风，就想尽办法做出了各种各样的盒子，对外谎称风的形状就是这样。\n但，真实的故事永远只会是——只能是——那块沉甸甸，黑漆漆的石头。\n第二天，部族里的人惊讶地发现，平时懒懒散散的希诺宁仿佛换了个人，她就像是有着无穷的精力一般，走遍了整个「回声之子」，采访了所有和泰伊吉婆婆有关的人，查阅了所有和泰伊吉婆婆有关的资料。这样还不能使希诺宁止步，她走出了部族，询问「悬木人」的讯使，拜访「流泉之众」的乐师，请求「烟谜主」让自己查阅织卷，爬上了「花羽会」的高崖，踏入了「沃陆之邦」的大门…泰伊吉婆婆在世界上留下的每一道痕迹，都被她尽收笔下。\n这些资料，足够希诺宁驳倒任何一条对泰伊吉婆婆的污蔑和恶谣，也能让她踢开某些冠给泰伊吉婆婆的怪异名号。\n希诺宁想要留下的，是一个真实无差的泰伊吉婆婆。\n只有毫无裂隙，拥有最坚实力量的矿石，才能淬火受锻，久炼成材。\n……\n「希诺宁姐姐，你为什么要做铸名师呢？看起来好累喔…」\n锻锤震响，旁边观看希诺宁锻造的学徒们托着下巴问道。\n希诺宁停下锻打，抹了把汗水。\n「我也不想做铸名师，谁叫我爸我妈我婆婆都做过呢？」\n「而且…」\n希诺宁再次举起了锻锤。\n「总要有人，担起讲故事的责任吧。」

A plan, passed down for 500 years like kindling, finally came to fruition — and at last, all the sacrifices that had been made bore their finest reward.\nIn a nation flowing with memories, an indelible impression of that moment was etched into obsidian.\nRelive this battle through recollection, and perhaps you may gain new insights... ｜ 笼罩在纳塔之上的阴影终究折服于众火之火的光芒，如薪相传五百年的计划里，一切的牺牲最终迎来了最好的回报。\n在流淌记忆的国度之中，这一幕也被刻入黑曜石间的影像。\n在回忆中再现这场战斗，或许能有新的收获…

- The following effect will trigger every 10s: The equipping character will gain <color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color> of their Elemental Mastery as bonus ATK for 12s, with nearby party members gaining 30% of this buff for the same duration. Multiple instances of this weapon can allow this buff to stack. This effect will still trigger even if the character is not on the field. ｜ 每10秒，产生如下效果：基于装备者的元素精通的<color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>，提升该角色的攻击力，并基于该提升的30%为队伍中附近的其他角色提升攻击力，持续12秒，多件同名武器产生的此效果可以叠加。角色处于队伍后台时也能触发效果。

### Part 129

- That's what the Calligraphy Tavern looks like, now it's lost all of its color... ｜ 那就是曾经的墨色酒馆褪去颜色后的样子…

- A flame-spitting urn left behind by the Crimson Witch of Flames, who once dreamt of burning away all the demons in the world. The fire in the urn burns eternally, as did its former master. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的炎之魔女留下的流火之甕。瓶中火永不熄灭，一如其人。

- Their numbers are increasing. We can't let their plans come to fruition. ｜ 它们的数量越来越多，绝不能让它们的阴谋得逞。

- The Scions of the Canopy love to get around using grappling hooks, a habit they most probably picked up off their Yumkasaur companions.\nSome of their warriors have even learned to combine grappling hooks with weaponry, enabling them to catch their enemies off guard. ｜ 「悬木人」的部族民喜爱使用钩绳在日常生活中进行移动，这或许深受匿叶龙平时移动的习惯影响。\n部分「悬木人」的战士，甚至会将钩绳与武器结合，使出出乎敌人意料的攻击。

- And perhaps the same is true for me. After living for so long... to die in the act of saving others would not have been a terrible thing. ｜ 我也是如此。我已活了许久…若是能为救人而死，称不上太坏的事。

- Watch Sorush recount the past ｜ 见证斯露莎回顾过往

- Beydim was Forest Ranger Asti's messenger Dusk Bird. After seeing the monsters and being caught in the downpour, Asti chose to have Beydim send the message to the other Forest Rangers. It was traveling through the downpour that drenched Beydim. ｜ 佩迪姆是巡林员阿斯蒂用以传递信息的暝彩鸟。在见到了野兽后，因为天降暴雨无法行进，阿斯蒂选择让佩迪姆飞去把信息带给其他的巡林员，因为在暴雨期间的林间飞行，所以佩迪姆的全身才湿透了。

I simply can't let you go until you promise me you will go through with it! ｜ 我要和你结拜，就去绝云间的祭坛那边。不行，不能拒绝。你知道了我的底细，也就知道了一直被我掩饰着的真实的自己…我不能放你走。除非…你答应我不会撒手不干！

- Ei ｜ 影
- That makes sense! Esnoir's wish is to see this lamp hung high for all to see, right? ｜ 喔！很有道理，毕竟埃斯诺尔先生的心愿，就是把这盏灯挂得高高的，让所有人都能看见呢。
- Some years ago, the Clan underwent a huge change, and a heavy burden fell upon Ayato's shoulders. At that time, Ayaka was not yet the mature and capable person she is now.\nShe was originally a playful child, one who knew nothing of the clan's duties, and thus lacked the skill and experience needed for dealing with various kinds of people altogether.\nBut seeing her mother on her sickbed and her brother hard at work, Ayaka sensed that she too had to grow up.\nSo she decided to take up her long-disused sword arts and poetry, both staples of nobility. If she could master these two, she could at least pass for a decent lady of the Kamisato Clan, and thus help her brother show up at some festivals, alleviating his burden.\nTruth be told, Ayaka was not preternaturally gifted and would spend much time being troubled by her inability to memorize poetry, write elegantly, or brandish her sword.\nYet she did not waver — a poem she failed to memorize once would be memorized fifty times, a poorly-written word would be written fifty times over, and a sword technique that failed would be swung fifty times more.\n"None may deflect a swing that has been practiced a thousand times." — This was something her mother told her.\nWhen her mother left this world, Ayaka was no longer "Little Ayaka." She was now Kamisato Ayaka, the young lady of the Kamisato Clan, one of the Shogun's three great clans.\nSword art training thus became part of her daily life and has remained so to this day without pause.\nOn one particular day, Ayaka, at last, defeated an opponent in a single strike. In that instant, as she stood in the middle of the dojo, icy flowers condensed all about her. And there, upon the tip of her sword, now hung a Vision, icy and bright.\n"None may deflect a swing that has been practiced a thousand times" indeed — and even the gods may thus be moved. ｜ 好些年前，家中发生重大变故，重担落到了兄长绫人肩上。那时，绫华还不是如今这副成熟能干的模样。\n她本是爱玩的孩子，并不懂得家族责任，更缺乏应对种种人物的手腕与经验。\n但看着病床上的母亲与劳碌的兄长，绫华意识到：她非得成长起来不可。\n于是她决定，首先拾起荒废许久的剑术与诗歌——这是身为贵族的基础修养，若能掌握此二者，她便算是面上过得去的神里家千金了，能代替兄长出席一些祭典之类的场合，为他分忧。\n事实证明，绫华并非天赋异禀，也曾为诗歌背不下来、写字不够风雅、剑术毫无章法之类的事而苦恼。\n她从未动摇过——一遍背不下来的诗就背五十遍，一遍写不好的字就练五十遍，一遍使不好的剑术就使五十遍。\n「千般锤磨，素振亦无人可当。」——这是母亲告诉她的话。\n母亲离世后，她不再是从前那个小绫华。如今的她，是神里绫华，将军御下三家之一，社奉行神里家的大小姐。\n剑术训练成为了日常生活的一环，从开始那日延续至今，从未间断。\n不知第多少天，绫华终于能做到一击退敌。霎时，道场内冰花凝结，道场正中，她的刀尖上挂着一枚如冰棱般璀璨的「神之眼」。\n千般锤磨，素振亦无人可当，就连神明也为之动容。

The only reason I have not sought to bring him into line so far is that his investigations deliver results... \n*sigh* He is such a headache. ｜ 鹿野院…虽说这位是我的同僚，但我对他没什么好感。总感觉他有很多自己的盘算，没有把组织的事放在第一位。要不是看在他探案有功的份上，早该对他多加管束。\n唉，真是头疼。

- Except, perhaps... Hmm, yes... The exception would be one's disciples... One cares for them as if they were one's own children. ｜ 可能…或许…嗯…除了那几个孩子。

- Ararycan knows nothing about any Ruin Golem. As for the giant iron mountain, it has been here, since a long, long time ago. ｜ 兰利遮不知道什么遗迹巨像。不过大铁山的话，是从很久很久以前就在这里了。
- Most people taking a break there are relaxed and in pretty good spirits, so they're always willing to listen to a song or two. ｜ 在公园休息的人们，大多心情舒畅，愿意静下心来，听我小唱一曲。

- Yup! And outside of competition season, it's the place where our inter-tribal gatherings are held. ｜ 是的，比赛在那里举行，平时部族之间有集会也会在那里办。

- Enough about that, let's get down to business. See this door beside me? Behind it is another peculiar Domain. ｜ 先不说这些，我们说正事。你看见我旁边这道门了吗？门后也是一个奇怪的秘境。

- Sometimes, force is required to calm someone down and get them to listen to what you have to say. ｜ 有的时候还得用实力让人冷静下来听自己说话。
- #Oh no, that's more flowers trampled... {NICKNAME}, we should slow down and really watch our steps! ｜ #哎呀…又踩到了…{NICKNAME}，要不还是慢一点，小心一点吧？
- What an impressive aspiration. ｜ 真是了不起的愿望。
- In the end, even the Akademiya had to rely on century-old records in the Akasha to confirm her existence... ｜ 到最后，就连教令院，也只能靠虚空百年前的记录来确认她的存在。
- "Fell Shield of Narcissus"? ｜ 「纳西索斯邪恶魔法罩」？
- How do you explain white chalk in black soil, or the earth's dense crust amidst the emptiness of space? Same reason the purest soil gave birth to human life... It's an ancient power with unmistakable properties. Trying to harness it is dangerous indeed, I can't imagine what would happen if someone lost control of it in the city... Ah, never mind! What goes on within Mondstadt's walls is up to Mondstadt's people to deal with! ｜ 黑土与白垩、宇宙与地层，无垢之土创生原初之人…特征实在太明显了，难以忽视呀。这么危险的古老技术，万一在城里失控——嗨，算了，就让蒙德人自己解决蒙德的问题吧。
- You saw my past self and said goodbye to him. Only when you witness my whole story does it become truly consigned to history. ｜ 你们见证了过去的我，还与他告别。等你们亲眼看完属于我的一切，它们才真正成为历史。
- Xavier trots off... ｜ 泽维尔小跑着离开了…

- The House of Daena is a public space. Anyone can come here, no? ｜ 这是公共场所，谁都可以出现在这里。
- Alright, well, I hope it turns up soon. Bye now. ｜ 嗯，祝你早点找到吧，再见。
- Anemo Amber, Hydro Amber, same? ｜ 风琥珀，水琥珀，一样？
- Well, we've ruled out two gods so far — the Anemo and Geo Archons. So, next... ｜ 于是，现在已经排除了两位神明，风之神和岩之神…那么接下来…
- Not yet. ｜ 还没有。
- Alright, that's a wrap! *yawns* If there's nothin' else, I'll go take a nap somewhere... ｜ 啊，收工了收工了，哈…没什么事的话，我去打个盹儿。
- You step on the pedal when the timing is right. If the machine gets jammed, give it a good whack or two and it'll fix it right up. You got it? ｜ 看准合适的时机踩下踏板，如果机器卡住了，就用拳头「维修」一下。听明白了吗？
- It almost makes one wonder whether they had a hand in the shogun's sudden decision to issue the Vision Hunt Decree... ｜ 不过话说回来，将军忽然做出眼狩令这样的决定，又是否有什么来由呢…
- *cough* Well, Hora's rarely this well-behaved. It just occurred to me that I won't need to chase him around the entire tribe today, so I couldn't help feeling happy... ｜ 咳…难得看见霍莱这么听话。一想到今天我不用追着霍莱跑遍整个部族，我就不由自主地高兴…

- Let us continue! More trials await. ｜ 继续吧，前方还有试炼在等着我们。

- Ugh, he's gone off on his own. So rude! ｜ 这个人好没礼貌！自顾自地就跑了…
- Obtain the basic Overloaded blessing:\nAfter triggering <color=#f39001>Overloaded</color> on an opponent, apply the <color=#f39001>Embrittled</color> effect to that opponent: Decrease their Pyro and Electro RES by <color=#f39001>{0}%</color>, max {1} stack(s). ｜ 获得基础的超载祝福效果：\n对敌人触发<color=#f39001>超载反应</color>后，将对该敌人施加<color=#f39001>易碎</color>效果：敌人的火元素与雷元素抗性降低<color=#f39001>{0}%</color>，至多叠加{1}层。
- Tiny Miracle's Feather ｜ 奇迹之羽
- The Price of Desolation ｜ 噩地的代价
- Something to Share ｜ 有什么想要分享…
- Hah, naturally. Many a time have I seen Hibiki seal them... and unseal them, too. ｜ 哼，奴家可是看着阿响封印了好多好多次的，也看过她怎么解开封印。
- The greenery planning personnel in Sumeru City once received a mysterious letter. The sender was, apparently, "An Enthusiastic and Perfectly Leisurely Citizen of Sumeru City."\nThe letter contained detailed suggestions and thoughtful planning that took both the weather and practicality into consideration.\nJudging by the professionalism of the letter's contents, it was natural to assume that the letter was from a well-known Amurta researcher who would prefer to stay anonymous.\nDespite the writer's anonymity, the greenery planning personnel carried out their work in the city exactly as stated in the letter, as if they were implementing orders from their superior.\nThe outcome reaped high praise. Later one day, when Nahida was finally able to take a break, she took a walk on the streets of Sumeru City. To her great joy, she found out that the arrangement of plants was exactly the same as she had expected.\nThe letter was from Nahida, of course. She had written it because she thought that though knowledge is important, practice is also essential.\nAs a goddess, Nahida has higher priorities than planning the positions of some plants. But after careful consideration, she made up her mind and sent this seemingly useless letter anonymously all the same.\nSo encouraged was she by the great success of her first attempt at putting knowledge into practice that in the following days, even when she walked, she was ever so full of elated confidence.\nBut then she rounded a corner and noticed unexpectedly that several flowers of completely mismatched colors had been planted together.\nAfter careful examination, she found out that it was because she had not considered the possibility that one of the flower species might change colors, nor had she specified the cultivation environment for the flowers very strictly in her plans.\nThen it occurred to her that this bunch of flowers could have been here for dozens of days, during which everyone might have witnessed her "complete lack of aesthetic sense"...\nThat day, many claimed that they saw Lesser Lord Kusanali crouching next to a pot of flowers, her hands covering her blushing face. ｜ 负责须弥城绿植规划的工作人员，曾经收到过一封神秘信件，署名是「热心而且很闲的普通须弥城市民」。\n信里写满了详实的建议，规划也十分周全，既考虑到风雨日照等各类影响，又兼顾了实用需求。\n从信件的专业程度就可判断，这是出自某位不愿透露姓名的生论派著名学者之手。\n虽然不知道他为何匿名，但工作人员就像是收到了上级命令那样，完全按照信中规划将设计在须弥城复现出来。\n这次设计收获了很高的评价。后来某一天，当纳西妲终于有时间来到街道上时，她欣喜地发现，绿植的摆放跟她预想的一模一样。\n——信是纳西妲写的，她觉得知识固然重要，但实践也不可或缺。\n然而，神明威严，似乎不应该干涉这类小事。思考再三，她才决定匿名发出这看上去并没有什么用的信件。\n就结果而言，初次实践大获成功，她备受鼓舞，走起路来都充满自信，仿佛随时都要飘到天上。\n然而在走到下一个拐角时，纳西妲就注意到意料之外的几朵颜色完全不搭的花被栽到一起。\n她仔细确认，发现是自己没有考虑到其中一种花变色的可能性，也没有严格规定栽培的环境。\n又想到这盆植物可能已经在这里放了好几十天，人人都目睹了她「毫无美感」的布置…\n——那天，有好多人都自称看到了「小吉祥草王」蹲在一盆花旁边双手捂脸，害羞到满脸通红，只是没人愿意相信。
- Nobody is capable of having absolute empathy. ｜ 做不到绝对的共情。
- Skill DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F1P}

- The host of this world is busy, unable to join world ｜ 世界主人暂忙，无法加入世界

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启

- Harness the abilities of a Tepetlisaurus or companion from the Children of Echoes to move quickly and reach the destination within the time limit, while looking out for Shock Drills and Tune-Up Devices and doing your best to complete Tune-Up Goals. ｜ 运用「回声之子」部族伙伴或嵴锋龙的能力，快速移动，在限定时间内抵达终点，并留意挑战中的震荡钻机和砥砺装置，尽可能完成砥砺目标。
- Follow the inscription ｜ 跟随铭印
- That's right. I'm sorry. ｜ 是的。抱歉。
- A broken hourglass from which all the sand has escaped. But it's fine, because the passage of time means nothing to someone without a single worry in the whole world. ｜ 因为破洞而空空如也的沙漏。时光流逝对无忧无虑的人没有意义。
- ..."Prinzessin der Verurteilung"? ...Mmm, nope, sorry. I wasn't in Mondstadt for very long, so I didn't hear of her. That name, though... *grimace*... Ahem, nothing. ｜ …「断罪之皇女」？抱歉，我在蒙德待的时间不长，没有听过这样的人物。不过这个名字…嘶…咳，没什么。

- They'd also look great lined up by the window. Think about it — you wake up, and the first thing you see are these adorable critters. ｜ 而且你想想看，如果能把这个在窗边摆上一排，早上起来第一眼看到的就是这么可爱的东西。

- The best way to understand this world is to explore all that is around you, leaving no stone unturned.\nSolving the enigmas of old, helping hapless travelers, and following the trails of long-lost treasure will all become invaluable knowledge and experience...\nEven if you are not the least bit interested in ancient riddles or the plights of others, there is always treasure to be found at the end of the road. ｜ 了解这个世界最好的方式，就是在世上四处探索巡历。\n解开悠古的谜团也好，帮助失意的旅人也好，追寻宝藏的踪迹也好，或许都能成为宝贵的知识与经验…\n…就算对谜题与他人的困境毫无兴趣，旅途的终点也总会有宝藏吧。
- Nice and clean... ｜ 干干净净…
- This Kujou Takayuki is an evil lunatic! We've gotta report this to Ei. Whatever his current punishment is, it needs to be 10 times worse!!! ｜ 这个九条孝行实在太坏了！我们应该跟影告发他！让他罪上加罪！！
- They claimed that as they passed through here, the area suddenly grew dark and some ghostly flames appeared out of nowhere... ｜ 我听说他们路过这里的时候，周围突然变暗，紧接着鬼火不停闪烁…

- Even if it meant going against nature and the principles I follow, I would do so anyway. ｜ 即使那是违背自然的、违背我所遵循的道理的，我也会做。

- Dogma of the Brass Mask: Part III ｜ 「黄铜面具」的教导·其三

- Huh? ｜ 啊？
- One of the two sovereigns standing at the apex of the Fontemer Aberrants.\nPoets and authors often proclaim it to be proud and noble due to its solitary tendencies, but the true reason behind such adulatory descriptions is its elegant and slender body. As such, it is a "Pearl Seahorse," while the suzerain of the Armored Crabs is an "Emperor."\nIn the legends and rumors of Fontaine, a brutal war was once waged among the Aberrants of the Fontemer, leaving only the "Millennial Pearl Seahorse" and "Emperor of Fire and Iron" splitting the great lake into two courts, one ruling over the north, the other the south. In the "Song of Dobharcu," the writer describes the outcome of the war: the great Hunter's Ray known as the Stormlord stirred huge waves in its death throes, causing what is now known by the people as the "first diluvian period"...\nOf course, all of this is nothing more than the romantic imaginations of people who are unwilling to accept the bland realities of the world. For the Fontemer Aberrants are in fact just simple aquatic animals, and they have no grand courts nor fallen kingdoms, nor do they possess words meant to exalt or curse. ｜ 矗立在原海异种顶端的两位霸主之一。\n诗人与作者常因其独行而称之孤傲而高洁，但能成为这类描绘的对象归根到底是因为它身姿修长优美。也因此它为「骏麟」，而重甲蟹的王是「帝皇」。\n在枫丹的传奇逸话中，原海异种当中曾经爆发过无比酷烈的战争，只留下「千年珍珠骏麟」与「铁甲熔火帝皇」在大湖南北分庭抗礼。在《多尔库之歌》中，作者曾经描绘了战争的结局：被称为风暴王的巨大猎刀鳐在死前掀起了巨浪，导致了人们口中所谓的「第一次涨水期」…\n所有的这一切当然只不过是人不愿习惯于毫无幻想可言的现实生活而进行的浪漫想象。原海异种归根到底不过是水生动物罢了，既没有华丽或破败的王庭，也没有昂扬或恶毒的话语。
- Rana ｜ 拉娜

- That's right! So here it is — some confectionery from Yumeno Tennenan, a fine purveyor of Inazuman delicacies. Each one costs a small fortune. ｜ 没错！您看，这是「梦野天然庵」出品的糕点，出自稻妻名家之手，每一块都非常昂贵。
- Oh, if it isn't... Wait, no. Who are you? ｜ 哦哦，原来是…等等，不对，你们是谁？

- You tell everyone about the Fatui camp and the strange machine you found on the day you arrived... ｜ 将登岛那天遇到愚人众营地和奇怪装置的事仔细说给其他人听…

- Restore the Hydro Eidolons to their original form ｜ 让水形幻灵恢复原状
- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装
- At a birthday party many years ago, Navia took her favorite tabletop game out.\nPerhaps it was because this was also her coming of age, but the participants playing that day were especially numerous. Amid this lively atmosphere, everyone — apart from the birthday girl, the star of the show — racked their brains coming up with characters exceedingly ill-suited to themselves.\nMelus, the steady hand, became the rash and careless commissioner, inviting all present to solve — or suffer under, more like — the ancient curse afflicting his family. Sonny, ever elegant in speech and etiquette, would play a potty-mouthed petty thief, even making the grand sacrifice of shedding his pale outer coat, which usually stuck to him like a second skin. The nervous rookie, Silver, having been dragged into this by dint of passing by, was made a mighty, mysterious mage.\nThe most lethal blow came when Clorinde, who usually took charge of proceedings, decided to "band together" with the famed adventurer known as "Demoiselle" as a private doctor who missed every shot she fired. Someone had to do the healing, she reasoned — but alas, this left the role of game master open, with Callas unfortunate enough to be the only one left to fill that post. Thus was he forced to put his soft drink aside, and leave the audience stands (the bench) for the crowd of players (the sofa).\nNavia was most pleased with this start.\nThe game, however, got off to a bumpy beginning, with the strange commissioner bursting his way into Demoiselle's residence during her birthday party, only to misjudge and crash head first into a triple-layered cake, nearly drowning himself in dessert and ending the millennia-spanning family curse by his own hand within the first five minutes.\nDemoiselle would quickly get the good-hearted doctor to save the man, with the doctor musing if letting him live on was tantamount to helping their enemies as she rolled the dice.\nThe game master's expression did not change as he went faithfully about his duty in a low voice:\n"The young man, having braved the rain, was soaked to the bone, and both his hands were set a-trembling."\n"He did his best to clean the cream off his face and body, though he missed a few spots."\n"'Thank you, kind souls, thank you, for joining in my battle against this curse most wicked!'"\nThey were unusually lucky during the middle portion of the game. To solve a problem, one must investigate its source. According to the mage's hypothesis, the commissioner's ancestor must have made a contract with a demon for some reason. "Ah, if I had only rolled higher, we would already know that reason..." grumbled the mage. "Bloody signed a high-interest contract without a care for his descendants, didn't 'e, the blithering idiot?" The thief blurted out. "Well then, can we steal the document and destroy it?" Demoiselle asked offhandedly.\nThe inexperienced game master would regret allowing their actions for all time, for the thief's luck was truly ludicrous.\n"...Demoiselle was clever indeed, and the thief just as profoundly skilled."\n"No one thought that the contract would fall into their hands so easily, and yet the words written upon it were nigh indecipherable..."\nThe ending, too, was unusually happy. Thanks to the hardworking and kind (and also sufficiently rusty) game master, Demoiselle would finally drag the rest of the party, riddled as they were with status effects, into a confrontation with the ancient demon. The battle was as chaotic as ever, with the mage losing his sanity first, and the doctor not landing a single shot. But just as everyone's hit points were about to bottom out, the adventurer Demoiselle would hazard a venture. Using up a turn to move beside the demon, and tanking a full round of its attacks head-on, she knowingly gave the doctor a desperate order, as everything was going to hell: "Shoot me instead!"\nThe doctor's dice were rolled before the game master could say anything. Callas counted the dice in silence, before taking three deep breaths.\n"...The bullet pierces the demon's weak spot, and the giant creature collapses into the abyss."\n"It returns to the darkness, and into slumber, taking that absurd curse with it."\n"Rejoice, rejoice, for the adventurer's courage and for her ill-omened ally!"\nPerhaps it was to go with the President's flow or out of genuine emotion, but there was indeed much rejoicing. Amidst the din, only Callas, who had begun to sort out the various items used for play, was stunned. He retrieved a golden-yellow jewel from within the dice box.\n"Navia... I think this is yours."\nThere were many people present, but this Vision did indeed belong to Navia, for it was with a flash of her thought that a great blade of Geo would slice her birthday cake in two... along with the table.\nLater at night, when the party and her excitement both had settled down, Navia would lie on her bed, unable to remember what she had been thinking when she had obtained the Vision. Had her mind lingered on the final victory, obtained only after much struggle and hardship? Or had she wished that her birthdays henceforth would be spent surrounded by friends, just like this one?\nIf it was the former, that seemed to obliquely indicate that a happy ending must be preceded by many tribulations... so best to go with the latter.\nThus were her thoughts as she lay at dreamland's door, still clutching the Vision. ｜ 在许多年前的一场生日会上，娜维娅拿出了自己最喜欢的桌上游戏。\n大概因为那天是代表她终于成年的日子，参与游戏的人格外多。在热闹的氛围中，除了寿星娜维娅仍是主角以外，每个人都绞尽脑汁创造了非常不适合自己的角色。\n稳重的迈勒斯成了冒失粗心的委托人，邀请大家一起解决——或者不如说是承受——自己家族的古老诅咒。衣着讲究、礼貌文雅的桑尼变身满口粗话的毛贼，为此他做出巨大牺牲，脱掉了几乎一直长在他身上的浅色外套。因为路过现场而被拖入战局的西尔弗那时才刚加入刺玫会不久，于是大家为这个战战兢兢的小年轻量身定制了一位神秘又强大的术士角色。\n最为致命的是，以往负责控制局势的克洛琳德这次选择了和代号为「大小姐」的知名冒险家「同流合污」，作为一名开枪百发百失的私人医生登场。总得有个人负责治疗吧，这是她给出的理由。这直接导致游戏主持人缺失，于是卡雷斯先生便遭了殃。他只好放下手中的软饮料，离开一旁的观众席（板凳）坐到众人中间（沙发）。\n娜维娅对这个开局非常满意。\n游戏开头意外地坎坷。在大小姐的生日会上，陌生的委托人夺门而入，因为糟糕的判定一头扎进三层蛋糕里喘不上气，差点在最初的五分钟内就自行解决了长达千年的家族诅咒。大小姐连忙让好心的医生为他进行救助。让他活下去算是在帮助我们的敌人吧，医生边说边扔骰子。\n主持人面不改色，用低沉的声音忠实履行着自己的职责：\n「冒雨赶来的年轻人浑身湿透，双手颤抖。\n「他尽力抹掉脸和身上的奶油，却还是有些地方遗漏。\n「『谢谢，谢谢你们这些好心人，愿意帮我与这邪恶的诅咒战斗！』」\n游戏中段意外地好运。要想解决问题，必须先调查问题的根源。根据术士的推测，委托人的先祖因为某种原因与恶魔签订了契约。「要是点数更好就能知道原因了吧…」术士懊悔道。「所以他那傻瓜祖宗是签了高利贷合同咯，真是个违背后人的决定！」毛贼不屑一顾道。「那我们可以把它偷来毁掉吗？」大小姐随口提议道。\n经验不足的主持人余生一定都在后悔自己允许了他们的行动。毛贼的运气好得离谱。\n「…『大小姐』足智多谋，『怪盗』同样造诣深厚。\n「谁也没成想契约就这样轻松到手，但上面的文字却难以参透…」\n游戏结尾意外地圆满。多谢主持人，他足够努力且足够善良（也足够生疏），终于，大小姐拖着状态各异的队友们见到了远古的恶魔。战斗轮一如既往地混乱，术士永远第一个失去理智，就像医生的子弹一颗也没有打中。眼看大家的生命值都要见底，冒险家大小姐只好冒险行事。她耗费了一次行动移动到恶魔身边，艰难扛下了一轮正面攻击，然后破罐破摔地对医生说：「你不如拿枪打我好了！」\n还没等主持人说话，医生的骰子就扔了出去。卡雷斯默默计算着点数，深深呼吸了三次。\n「…恶魔的弱点被子弹洞穿，巨大的身体坠入深渊。\n「它要回到黑暗中沉睡，要将那荒谬的诅咒带走。\n「欢呼，欢呼吧！为了冒险家的勇敢，也为那厄运缠身的战友！」\n不知是为了配合会长的说辞还是情不自禁，大家都在欢呼。在一片喧闹声中，只有开始动手整理道具的卡雷斯先生在发愣。他从放骰子的盒子中拿出了一颗金黄的宝石：「娜维娅…我想这是你的。」\n在场的人不少，但这颗神之眼的确属于娜维娅。因为她稍一闪念，一柄岩元素的巨刃就将生日蛋糕一切为二…连带桌子一起。\n等到深夜，生日会现场和她的兴奋劲儿均已收拾妥当，娜维娅平躺在床上，却怎么也回忆不起获得神之眼时自己正在想些什么。是在感叹历经千辛万苦的游戏终于得到胜利，还是在许愿今后的每个生日都能有亲朋好友陪伴？\n如果是前者，似乎侧面说明想迎来圆满的结局必先遭遇重重困境…所以，还是后一个吧。\n娜维娅在半梦半醒间这么想着，手握神之眼慢慢睡着。
- I have something I'd like the Knights of Favonius to do for me, and I want you to pass on my request to the Acting Grand Master. ｜ 我要委托骑士团一些事，想要麻烦你们带话给代理团长。

- Hah, do you think it'll be that easy? I am so very mighty in magic — how could I be your assistant? ｜ 要请我做搭档哪有这么容易，我的魔术那么厉害，怎么可能做你的助手…
- A large box that can be found in Fontainian harbors. Its dimensions are somewhat larger, with two of them being able to be stacked securely atop any given pallet.\nTo increase shipping efficiency, harbor staff hired researchers from the Fontaine Research Institute to carefully examine "how best to ship lots of small cargo." The answer they found was this: miscellaneous goods could be stored inside medium-sized boxes of fixed dimensions, and these boxes could be fit snugly into larger boxes like building blocks, thus making efficient use of space. Eventually, a whole series of boxes was made, and the throughput of various harbors was increased greatly by this new optimized system. ｜ 可见于枫丹港口的大型木箱，尺寸较大，两个一组固定在便于运输货盘上。\n为了提升货运的效率，港口人员聘请了枫丹科学院的研究者，仔细探讨「怎么样才能把大量小体积货物更有效率地装船运输」。研究员们给出的答案则是：将散货塞入固定尺寸的中型木箱，再将中型箱体像积木一样，整整齐齐装入大型货箱，以优化空间利用率。最终，一系列输运木箱应运而生，各个港口的吞吐量也在新设备的优化下大大提升。
- Emergency ｜ 临危受命
- She said I just need to reach the destination as quickly as possible. But it seems that I was never quick enough... ｜ 她说我只要尽快到达终点就好…但我每次用的时间都实在太长…
- Paimon feels... wait, we just got here! We can't be lost already, can we? ｜ 总感觉…刚才也来过这个地方吧，我们该不会是迷路了吧！

- Because what you saw is of significant importance, not just for the nation of Sumeru, but the entire world of Teyvat. ｜ 因为你能够看到的东西，对于须弥乃至世界来说，都非常重要。
- But this Domain was abandoned. The only people to have come here since are yourselves. What use does a weapon discarded by its owner have to offer... ｜ 可如今这座秘境已经没用了。除了你们，没有人会来这里…被主人抛弃的兵器，还有什么价值可言呢…

- A mysterious ruin machine that can reconfigure itself into various forms. In battle, the Perpetual Mechanical Array will enter the Absolute Defense state, in which it splits and summons several different kinds of Ruin Sentinels. After <color=#FFE14BFF>defeating the enhanced Ruin Sentinels</color>, Absolute Defense state will be removed and it will enter a weakened state. ｜ 能够变换组合成不同形态的谜样遗迹机关。在战斗中，恒常机关阵列会进入绝对防御状态，分裂并召唤数个形态各异的遗迹机兵。<color=#FFE14BFF>击败其中获得了强化的遗迹机兵</color>后，它的绝对防御状态将解除，并进入虚弱状态。

We'll see how many patients suffering from weird and wonderful ailments start flooding into the Bimarstan every day! ｜ 为了更好地管理道成林，我时不时会给巡林员们开设「培训」课程。要是逐字逐句深究的话，这些课程其实都算是在「传播知识」。不过教令院又能怎样呢？有本事就把我关起来，看看「健康之家」每天要多收多少千奇百怪的病患吧。

- A strange life form that mostly appears in Elynas.\nThe nature of a Breacher Primus defies known categories: they are not animals, plants, Shroom-Kin, nor Elementals. The debate among scholars of Sumeru never formally reached a consensus on just what it is, until it was finally banned as a research topic. The reason is that based on the current system of knowledge, this problem is like "the definitions prescribed by language and the true nature of things," and it is impossible to have a meaningful, final answer. ｜ 主要出现在厄里那斯的奇异生命体。\n隙境原体在基本的生物特征上超出了已知的范畴：不属于动物、植物、蕈类与元素类。须弥的学者因此关于它到底是什么的争论从未正式结束，直到它一同被禁止作为学术研究课题立项，因为就目前人类的知识体系而言，这个问题与「语言的定义与本质」一样，无法得出有意义的确切结论。

- When character HP falls below 70%, their ATK increases by 5%, and Normal and Charged Attacks will unleash shockwaves. Shockwaves can be unleashed this way once every 5s. Following this, every loss of 10% of HP will result in 5% increased ATK. A maximum of 25% ATK can be gained in this way. Conversely, the ATK of characters at above 70% HP is decreased by 50%. ｜ 角色的生命值低于70%时，攻击力提升5%，并在普通攻击或重击命中时会释放冲击波，每5秒通过这种方式至多释放一次冲击波。此后生命值每降低10%，就会获得5%攻击力提升。通过这种方式，至多获得25%攻击力提升；相反，角色的生命值高于70%时，攻击力降低50%。

- While in an area with Phlogiston Mechanics within Natlan, he can use Nightsoul Transmission: Ororon. When the active character is currently in the air, the following will trigger when switching to Ororon: Ororon will leap up high. Nightsoul Transmission can be triggered once every 10s by your party.\n\nHolding Aiming Mode will cause Ororon to enter the "Spiritspeaker" state, which will allow him to interact with "Nightspirit Graffiti" and "Nightspirit Sigils," extracting information and power from them. The rules for interacting with these objects follow the same rules as those governing Iktomisaurus interactions.\n\nAdditionally, holding the jump button will cause Ororon to consume 75 Stamina and leap. In areas within Natlan where Phlogiston mechanics are present, Ororon will prioritize consuming 5 Phlogiston to leap to a height higher still.\nWhen in the air, Ororon can Hold his Normal Attack to consume Phlogiston or Stamina and enter Aiming Mode. ｜ 在纳塔存在燃素机制的区域时，能够进行夜魂传递·欧洛伦。当前场上角色位于空中时，切换欧洛伦登场时触发：欧洛伦将高高腾跃而起。自己的队伍每10秒可以触发一次夜魂传递。\n\n长按瞄准时，欧洛伦会进入「灵觉」状态，处于这种状态下时，欧洛伦可以与「灵谜涂鸦」和「灵谜纹」交互，提取其中的信息与力量，这些物件的交互规则沿袭暝视龙的交互规则。\n\n此外，长按跳跃时，欧洛伦将消耗75点体力腾跃而起；在纳塔存在燃素机制的区域时，欧洛伦会优先消耗5点燃素，腾跃至更高的高度。\n位于空中时，欧洛伦可以长按普通攻击，消耗燃素或体力进行瞄准。
